Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च 1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 no. Green chili, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 sprig Curry leaves, chopped, कड़ी पत्ते ½ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा 1 tsp Oil, तेल For Tadka 3 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 3 no. dry Bedgi red chillies, सूखी बेड़गी लाल मिर्च 2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते Other Ingredients Oil for greasing, तेल For Garnish 1 no. Green chilli, cut into diagonally, हरी मिर्च ½ medium Onion, sliced, प्याज 1 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Chilli oil, धनिया पत्ता Process For Appe In a bowl, chana dal, urad dal, curd, semolina and water. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into smooth paste. Transfer it to a big bowl, add ginger, green chillies, curry leaves, coriander leaves, salt to taste and give it a good mix. In a small bow, add oil, baking soda and mix it well. Add the soda mixture to the batter and whisk it well. Heat a appe chatti, add oil, once it's hot, add a spoonful of batter and cook it for 5-6 minutes on both sides until cooked well. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Dal In an earthen pot, add toor dal, yellow moong dal, water, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, asafoetida and give it a good mix. Cover it with a lid and pressure cook it for 4-5 whistles until cooked well. Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. For Tadka In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add fenugreek seeds, mustard seeds, cumins seeds and let it splutter well. Add button chillies, shallots, curry leaves and saute it for a minute until shallots are translucent. Add turmeric powder, degi red chilli powder, coriander powder, asafoetida and mix it well. Add tomato and cook it well for 2-3 minutes. Add boiled dal, salt to taste and simmer it well for a while. Finish it with some curry leaves and boil it for a minute. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with green chillies, coriander sprig and some lemon juice. Serve hot with appe or drop it in with the dal. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #daltadka #dalfry #ranveerbrar #appedal #apperecipe #paddurecipe #dalchawal

ingredients: 1 ½ kg Keema with bones, मटन कीमा | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tbsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही | 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | 1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस | ⅓ cup Oil, तेल | 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी | 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी | 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च | 2 tbsp Fresh mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता | 2 tbsp Fried onions (optional) तले हुए प्याज | 5-6 cups Water, पानी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 kg Sella basmati rice (soaked for 1 ½ hr) सेला बासमती चावल | 3 large Tomatoes, cut into quarter, टमाटर | 2 drop Kewra water, केवड़ा जल | 2 drop Rose water, गुलाब जल | 1 tbsp Ghee (for finishing) घी | 8-9 no. Now you can try it at home too :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3DLybrO 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** MUTTON KEEMA TAHARI Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-35 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Marination 1 ½ kg Keema with bones, मटन कीमा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tbsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tbsp Ghee, घी ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Keema Pulao ⅓ cup Oil, तेल 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग 5-6 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 3 large Onions, sliced, प्याज Marinated Keema, मैरीनेटेड कीमा 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, chopped, धनिये के डंठल 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Fresh mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता 2 tbsp Fried onions (optional) तले हुए प्याज 5-6 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ inch Ginger, julienned, अदरक 1 kg Sella basmati rice (soaked for 1 ½ hr) सेला बासमती चावल 3 large Tomatoes, cut into quarter, टमाटर 2 drop Kewra water, केवड़ा जल 2 drop Rose water, गुलाब जल 1 tbsp Ghee (for finishing) घी For Lehsun Mirch Ki Chutney 8-9 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish fresh Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता fresh Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Marination ● In a large bowl, add keema with bones, salt to taste, degi red chilli powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, ghee, curd, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Keema Pulao ● In a handi, add oil & ghee, once it's hot, add cinnamon stick, bay leaf, cloves, black peppercorns, black cardamom and let it splutter well. ● Add onions and saute it until golden in color. ● Add marinated keema and cook it for 20-25 minutes on until it's 60-70% cooked. ● Add tender coriander stems, green chillies, fresh mint leaves, fried onions and cook it for a minute. ● Add water, salt to taste, ginger, sella basmati rice, tomatoes, kewra water, rose water, mix it well and give it a quick boil. ● Cover it with a lid and allow to cook for 10-15 minutes on low flames. ● Keep it aside to cool down the temperature. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and mint sprig. ● Serve hot with prepared lehsun mirch ki chutney. For Lehsun Mirch Ki Chutney ● In a mortar pestle, add garlic, degi red chili powder, salt to taste, and grind into coarsely paste. ● In a bowl, add prepared mixture, curd, salt to taste and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl and garnish it with mint sprig. ● Serve with prepared keema pulao. *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Aloo Mutton Keema Masala - https://youtu.be/9YOGqIGw1Wk Mumbai Keema Masala -https://youtu.be/Tjzar3cktro *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #keemapulao #taharirecipe #ranveerbrar #muttonkeema #muttontahari #ramadanrecipes

title: साग पनीर की आसान रेसिपी | Restaurant style Saag Paneer | Spinach gravy | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: SAAG PANEER/साग पनीर - If you thought Saag Paneer and Palak Paneer are the same, check again! Both are super exciting recipes to make with Palak or winter Saag of your choice :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3DLybrO
ingredients: 2 medium bunch Spinach, roughly chopped, पालक | ⅓ cup Wild spinach, बथुआ | ½ cup fresh Fenugreek leaves, मेथी | 1 medium bunch Mustard greens, सरसों का साग | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tbsp Ghee, घी | 9-10 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन | 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & slit into half) हरी मिर्च | 1 medium Onions (cut into half) प्याज | 1 cup Water, पानी | 1 tbsp Jaggery, गुड़ | 800 gms Paneer, medium cubed, पनीर | 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही | 1 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | 2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना | 3-4 no. dry kashmiri Red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च | Prepared Saag, तैयार किया हुआ साग | 2 medium Tomato, cut into diced, टमाटर

Both are super exciting recipes to make with Palak or winter Saag of your choice :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3DLybrO 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Lehsuni Palak Paneer - https://youtu.be/BnYVJr-zZW4 Saag Meat - https://youtu.be/O5I5gQp6q6M *********************** SAAG PANEER Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Saag 2 medium bunch Spinach, roughly chopped, पालक ⅓ cup Wild spinach, बथुआ ½ cup fresh Fenugreek leaves, मेथी 1 medium bunch Mustard greens, सरसों का साग Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 9-10 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & slit into half) हरी मिर्च 1 medium Onions (cut into half) प्याज ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 1 cup Water, पानी 1 tbsp Jaggery, गुड़ Remaining mustard oil, बचा हुआ सरसों का तेल For Marinating Paneer 800 gms Paneer, medium cubed, पनीर 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Frying Paneer 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल Marinated Paneer, मैरीनेटेड पनीर For Saag Paneer 2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 3-4 no. dry kashmiri Red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च Prepared Saag, तैयार किया हुआ साग Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर 2 medium Tomato, cut into diced, टमाटर For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Ginger, julienned, अदरक Process For Saag ● In a pressure cooker, add spinach, wild spinach, fresh fenugreek leaves, mustard greens, salt to taste, ghee, garlic, green chillies, onions, ginger, add jaggery,and saute it for a minute. ● Add water and mix well. ● Cover it with a lid and cook it for 2-3 whistles until cooked well. ● Keep it aside to depressurize the cooker. ● Blend it with the hand blender until smooth, add remaining mustard oil and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Marinating Paneer ● In a bowl, add paneer, ginger garlic paste, curd, mustard oil, salt to taste, degi red chili powder and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Frying Paneer ● In a pan, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add marinated paneer and fry them until golden in color on both sides. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Saag Paneer ● In a kadai, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add a pinch of asafoetida, cumin seeds, fenugreek seeds, dry kashmiri red chillies and let it splutter well. ● Add prepared saag and cook it for 4-5 minutes on medium flames. ● Add fried paneer, tomato and simmer it for a while until it thickens. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and ginger julienned. ● Serve hot with roti or paratha. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #saagpaneer #wintergreen #ranveerbrar #palakpaneer #paneerrecipe #saagrecipe #sarsondasaag

raw_text: LAUKI EK & DISHES ANEK!! - Don't disregard the humble bottle gourd just yet! See what all you can make from it :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3DLybrO 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Instant Masala Dosa - https://youtu.be/rJSICjc5s84 5 in 1 Tiffin Ideas with Sooji - https://youtu.be/Ww_hAHHUb_g *********************** Lauki ka Nashta Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Lauki Mixture 1 large Bottle gourd (peeled & grated) लौकी 2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 ½ cups Semolina, सूजी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ⅓ cup Gram flour (optional) बेसन A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही ⅓ cup Water, पानी ¼ cup Cheese, grated, चीज़ ⅓ cup Water, पानी 2-3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 2-3 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा 1 tbsp Oil, तेल For Tadka 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Urad dal, उड़द की दाल 1 tsp Small mustard seeds, छोटी राई 2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Other Ingredients Oil for greasing, तेल 1 tsp Baking soda with oil, बेकिंग सोडा Green chutney, हरी चटनी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Tomato, cut into quarter, टमाटर Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़ A pinch of degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Process For Lauki Mixture ● In a bowl, add grated bottle gourd, lemon juice and mix it well. ● Squeeze out the moisture from the bottle gourd, add salt to taste, sugar, ginger garlic paste, gram flour, a pinch of asafoetida, curd, water and give it a good mix. ● Add cheese grated, water, green chillies, coriander leaves and mix it well. ● Divide the mixture into two equal parts and keep it aside for further use. For Tadka ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add urad dal, small mustard seeds, curry leaves and let it splutter. ● Add turmeric powder and cook it for a minute. ● Transfer it to a batter and give it a good mix. For Dhokla & Uttapam ● In a steamer mold, grease the mold with oil, add a ladleful of batter, place it in the steamer and cook it for 12-15 minutes on medium flames. ● Remove the mold and keep it aside to cool down the temperature. ● Demold the dhokla, cut it into a desired shape, transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with green chutney. ● Take an uttapam pan, add oil, once it's hot, pour a ladleful of batter and cook it for 2-3 minutes on both sides until cooked well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with green chutney. For Appe & Waffle ● In an appe chetti, add oil, once it's hot, pour a spoonful of tadka batter in each cavity and cook it for 4-5 minutes on both sides until cooked well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with green chutney. ● In a waffle machine, grease the mold with oil, pour a ladleful of tadka batter and cook it for 5-6 minutes until cooked well. ● Demold the waffle, transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig, lemon wedge, tomato wedges, mayonnaise and sprinkle a pinch of degi red chili powder. ● Serve hot with green chutney. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #laukirecipes #nashtarecipe #kidsrecipes #ranveerbrar #khamanrecipe #apperecipeinhindi #waffle #laukikofta #pakodarecipe

title: Panjeeri Desi Superfood | दादी की spl पंजीरी & पिन्नी | Sugarcane Shikanji bonus | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: PANJIRI, PINNI AND SUGARCANE SHIKANJI - ये video dekhkar गाँव ki yaad na aaye to paise वापस 🥲 Stay healthy this winter with this Biji spl recipe for Panjiri & Pinni. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3DLybrO
ingredients: 500 gms Ghee, घी | 50-60 gms Edible gum, गोंद | 150 gms Almonds, roughly chopped, बादाम | 150 gms Cashew Nuts, roughly chopped, काजू | 1 kg Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा | 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च | 1 tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन | 1 tbsp Dry ginger powder, सोंठ का पाउडर | 200 gms Powdered sugar, पिसी हुई चीनी | 150 gms Sugar, चीनी | 1 cup Sugarcane jaggery, grated, गन्ने का गुड़ | 1 inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक | 1 cup Hot water, गरम पानी | 2 cups Water, पानी | ¼ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर | 2-3 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly torn, पुदीना पत्ता | A pinch of salt, नमक | 1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस
instructions: For Frying Nuts | ● In a handi or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add edible gum and fry them until golden in colour. | ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. | ● In the same handi or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add almonds, cashew nuts and fry them until golden in colour. | ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. | ● In the same handi or kadai, add remaining ghee, once it's hot, add whole wheat flour and dry roast it for 25-30 minutes until it's golden in color. | ● Add crushed black peppercorns, carom seeds, fried nuts & edible gum, dry ginger powder and give it a good mix. | ● Transfer it to a big tray or parat and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. | ● Add powdered sugar, sugar and mix it well. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with almond slivers. | ● Serve with hot milk. | For Sugarcane Shikanji | ● In a bowl, add sugarcane jaggery, ginger, hot water and give it a good stir until the jaggery melts. | ● Add water, black pepper powder, fresh mint leaves, a pinch of salt, lemon juice and give it a stir. | ● Transfer it into the serving glass and serve cold. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: PANJIRI, PINNI AND SUGARCANE SHIKANJI - ये video dekhkar गाँव ki yaad na aaye to paise वापस 🥲 Stay healthy this winter with this Biji spl recipe for Panjiri & Pinni. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3DLybrO 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Til Laddu & Chikki - https://youtu.be/-sz2N_rmxpY 3 Dry Fruit Mithai - https://youtu.be/wPWm7LqImoU *********************** PANJIRI, PINNI AND SUGARCANE SHIKANJI Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-40 minutes Serve 6-7 Ingredients For Frying Nuts 500 gms Ghee, घी 50-60 gms Edible gum, गोंद 150 gms Almonds, roughly chopped, बादाम 150 gms Cashew Nuts, roughly chopped, काजू For Panjiri Remaining ghee, घी 1 kg Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च 1 tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन Fried Nuts & Edible gum, तले हुए मेवे और गोंद 1 tbsp Dry ginger powder, सोंठ का पाउडर 200 gms Powdered sugar, पिसी हुई चीनी 150 gms Sugar, चीनी For Sugarcane Shikanji 1 cup Sugarcane jaggery, grated, गन्ने का गुड़ 1 inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक 1 cup Hot water, गरम पानी 2 cups Water, पानी ¼ tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर 2-3 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly torn, पुदीना पत्ता A pinch of salt, नमक 1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Garnish Almonds, sliver, बादाम Process For Frying Nuts ● In a handi or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add edible gum and fry them until golden in colour. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. ● In the same handi or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add almonds, cashew nuts and fry them until golden in colour. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Panjiri ● In the same handi or kadai, add remaining ghee, once it's hot, add whole wheat flour and dry roast it for 25-30 minutes until it's golden in color. ● Add crushed black peppercorns, carom seeds, fried nuts & edible gum, dry ginger powder and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a big tray or parat and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. ● Add powdered sugar, sugar and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with almond slivers. ● Serve with hot milk. For Sugarcane Shikanji ● In a bowl, add sugarcane jaggery, ginger, hot water and give it a good stir until the jaggery melts. ● Add water, black pepper powder, fresh mint leaves, a pinch of salt, lemon juice and give it a stir. ● Transfer it into the serving glass and serve cold. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #panjiri #pinnirecipe #ranveerbrar #punjabipanjiri #panjiriprasad #pinniyaankaisebanatehain #gudkipanjiri #panjeerirecipe

Cloves, लॉन्ग 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी A pinch of asafoetida, हींग Prepared Curd Mixture, तयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण ½ cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Jaggery, गुड़ For Roasting Chillies 6 no. fresh Green & Red chillies, ताजा हरी और लाल मिर्च For Tadka 1 tbsp Ghee, घी ¼ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते 5-6 no. Button chillies, बटन मिर्च For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल 1 tsp Ghee, घी Roasted chillies, भुनी हुई मिर्च Process For Soaking Rice ● In a bowl, add surti kolam, water as required and rinse the rice well. ● Add fresh water and keep it aside to soak for at least 10-15 minutes. For Lilva Khichdi ● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fresh pigeon peas, green garlic and saute it for a minute. ● Add turmeric powder, salt to taste, soaked surti kolam, water and mix it well. ● Cover it with the lid and cook for 2-3 whistles or until it's cooked well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with ghee. ● Serve hot with prepared gujarati kadhi and prepared roasted chillies. For Curd Mixture ● In a bowl, add gram flour, curd, water, ginger green chili paste, salt to taste, water, jaggery and give it a good mix. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, add gram flour and whisk it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Roasting Chillies ● Take a cooking rack, place fresh chillies on it and roast them for 2-3 minutes until cooked well. ● Transfer it into the tray, deskin the chillies and keep it aside for further use. For Gujarati Kadi ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, cloves, cinnamon stick, a pinch of asafoetida and let it splutter well. ● Add prepared curd mixture and give it a quick boil. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, salt to taste, jaggery and simmer it for at least 10-12 minutes on low flames until thickens. ● Add prepared tadka and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with coriander sprig and chilli oil. ● Serve hot with prepared lilva khichdi and roasted chillies. For Tadka ● In a small pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, cumin seeds, curry leaves, button chillies and saute it for a minute. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #lilvakhichdi #gujaratikadhi #ranveerbrar #sankrantispecialrecipe #lilvapulao #surtipapdi #kadhirecipe

Soaked Cashew Nuts, भीगे हुए काजू ⅓ cup Cheese, cubed, चीज़ ⅓ cup Cheese spread, चीज़ स्प्रेड 4-5 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल ½ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही ½ tsp Cardamom powder, इलाइची पाउडर ½ tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 no. Egg yolk, अंडे की जर्दी For Finishing Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन Prepared 2nd marination, तैयार किया हुआ दूसरा मैरिनेशन ¼ tsp Nutmeg powder, जायफल पाउडर 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Masala 1 ½ tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 3 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलाइची 2-3 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Flavoured Mixture 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी 3-4 no Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन 3 tbsp Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Cooking Chicken 1 tbsp Ghee, घी Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन For Smoke Coal, कोयला Ghee, घी For Garnish Pickled onions, सिरके वाले प्याज़ Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता A pinch of prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Process For 1st Marination ● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For 2nd Marination ● In a bowl, add fresh cream, soaked cashew nuts, cheese, cheese spread, garlic, salt to taste and tender coriander stems. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into smooth paste. ● Transfer it to a bowl, add hung curd and give it a good mix. ● Add ginger garlic paste, green cardamom powder, egg yolk and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Finishing ● In a bowl, add marinated chicken. Prepare 2nd marinade and marinate well. ● Finish it with nutmeg powder, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, crushed black peppercorns, salt to taste and mix everything well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Masala ● In a pan, add black peppercorns, black cardamom and dry roast them for a minute. ● Add dry fenugreek leaves, salt to taste and dry roast it well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Flavoured Mixture ● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add garlic and cook it for 2-3 minutes until golden in colour. ● Transfer it to a bowl, add fresh cream, lemon juice and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Chicken ● Take skewers and put the marinated chicken and arrange it well. ● In a grilled pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place skewer chicken and grill them from all sides until the tikkas are tender. ●Brush the tikkas with prepared flavoured mixture in intervals. ● Place the steel bowl in the grilling pan, place burnt coal into the bowl, add some ghee and cover it with a lid. Keep it aside for a while to get the smoky flavours in the tikkas. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with pickled onions, coriander sprig, some prepared masala and lemon wedge. ● Serve hot with mint chutney. . . . . . . . #chickentikka #chickenmalaitikka #ranveerbrar #chickenrecipe *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickentikka #murghmalaitikka #ranveerbrar #chickentikkarecipe #murghtikkakebab #notandoor

raw_text: PAHADI KHATTE ALOO - Aloo like you've possibly never had before..this aloo sabji is straight from the hills :) Try my recipe for Pahadi style Khatte Aloo *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3DLybrO 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/PotatoRecipesbyRB *********************** Khatte Aloo Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 3-4 Ingredients For Boiling Mustard seeds Water as required, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp Yellow mustard seeds, पीली सरसों के बीज For Paste 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 2-4 no. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 2-3 tbsp Boiled Yellow mustard seeds, उबले हुए पीली सरसों के बीज For Potato Marination 8-9 large Potatoes (peeled & cut into half) आलू ¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल ½ tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Frying ½ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल Marinated potatoes, मैरीनेटेड आलू For Khatte Aloo 3-4 tbsp Remaining mustard oil, बचा हुआ सरसों का तेल Prepared paste, तैयार किए हुए पेस्ट 2 large Onions, finely chopped, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar (optional) चीनी 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 large Tomatoes, finely chopped, टमाटर 1 cup Water, पानी Fried Potatoes, तले हुए आलू 1 medium Onion (peeled & cut into quarter) प्याज 1 large Onion (peeled & cut into quarter) प्याज ½ cup Water, पानी ¼ cup Water, पानी 1 ½ tbsp Dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर 2 tbsp Remaining mustard oil, बचा हुआ सरसों का तेल 1 tbsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Frying Chilli 1 tbsp Remaining mustard oil, बचा हुआ सरसों का तेल 2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 4-5 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च For Garnish Fried chillies, तली हुई मिर्च Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Boiling Mustard seeds ● In a pan, add water as required, salt to taste, yellow mustard seeds and boil for 4-5 minutes. ● Strain the mustard seeds and transfer it to a bowl. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Paste ● In a bowl, add tender coriander stems, ginger, green chillies, garlic, boiled yellow mustard seeds. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Potato Marination ● In a bowl, add potatoes, mustard oil, degi red chili powder, salt to taste and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Frying ● In a kadai or handi, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add marinated potatoes and shallow fry it for a while until half cooked. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Khatte Aloo ● In a handi, add remaining mustard oil, once it's hot, add prepared paste and saute it for 2-3 minutes. ● Add onions, salt to taste, sugar and saute it until golden in colour. ● Add turmeric powder, coriander powder, degi red chili powder and cook it for a minute. ● Add tomatoes, water and cook it for a while until tomatoes are mushy. ● Add fried potatoes, onions, water to adjust the consistency, cover it with the lid and cook it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames. ● Finish it with dry mango powder, remaining mustard oil, lemon juice, fresh coriander leaves and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fried chillies and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with dal rice paratha. For Frying Chilli ● In a pan, add remaining mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add dry kashmiri chillies and fry them until crispy in texture. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. #khattealoo #alookegutke #ranveerbrar #aloosabjirecipe #pahadialoo #himachalialoosabji *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

raw_text: RASAM VADA- Rasam is an any time favorite right? In fact it is an artisanal soup that is heart warming throughout the year. Here's my recipe for the famous Rasam vada *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Rasam Vada Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 30-40 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Boiling Dal 4-5 cups Water for boiling, पानी 2 cups Toor dal, तूर दाल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Rasam Powder 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 heaped tbsp Chana dal, चना दाल 4-5 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 2-3 sprig Curry leaves, roughly torn, कड़ी पत्ते 1 heaped tbsp Urad dal, उड़द दाल 3 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Vada Mixture 1 cup Semolina, सूजी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही ¼ cup Water, पानी Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का ¼ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा For Tadka 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई 1 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते 1 ½ tsp Urad dal, उड़द दाल 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च For Rasam 2 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई 5-6 no. Button chillies, बटन मिर्च 2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते 2 no. Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन 3 large Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 heaped tbsp Prepared Rasam powder, तैयार किया हुआ रसम पाउडर ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल और जड़ें Toor Dal Water, तूर दाल का पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Jaggery, गुड़ For Finishing 1 ½ medium Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर ¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ते Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च 2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल For Garnish Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता ¼ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च Process For Boiling Dal ● In a sauce pot or handi, add water, toor dal, salt to taste, turmeric powder and mix it well. ● Let it simmer for 30-40 minutes on medium flame until cooked well. ● Strain the dal and keep it aside for further use. Keep the dal water aside for rasam. For Rasam Powder ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add chana dal, dry kashmiri red chillies, curry leaves, urad dal and toss it for a minute. ● Add coriander seeds, cumin seeds, fenugreek seeds, black peppercorns and toss it for another 2-3 minutes. ● Add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Vada Mixture ● In a bowl, add semolina, salt to taste, curd, mix it well and leave it aside to rest for 10 minutes. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, prepared tadka, baking soda and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside to rest for 5-6 minutes. ● Take non-stick kadai, add oil, once it's hot, drop lemon sized balls vada mixture in hot oil and fry them until golden in color. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Tadka ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, curry leaves and let it splutter well. ● Add urad dal, tender coriander stems, ginger, green chillies and saute for 2-3 minutes. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Rasam ● In a handi or sauce pot, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, button chillies, curry leaves, garlic and saute it for a minute. ● Add tomatoes, salt to taste and cook it for a while until cooked well. ● Add prepared rasam powder, tender coriander stems and saute it well. ● Add toor dal water, salt to taste, jaggery and simmer it for 10-15 minutes on low flame. ● Finish it with a prepared finishing mixture and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl, add fried vada, garnish it with lemon wedge, coriander sprig and crushed black peppercorns. ● Serve hot. For Finishing ● In a bowl, add tomatoes, coriander leaves, curry leaves, salt to taste, crushed black peppercorns, lemon juice and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #rasam #rasamvada #ranveerbrar #bondasoup #souprecipe

Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 3-4 tbsp soaked Semolina, भीगी हुई सूजी 2 tbsp Semolina, सूजी Little water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा 1 tbsp Oil (for greasing) तेल A pinch carom seeds, अजवायन For Gravy 2 tbsp Oil, तेल A pinch of fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & cut into diagonally) हरी मिर्च 2 large Onions, chopped, प्याज ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 ¼ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़ा टमाटर की प्यूरी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup Water, पानी Other Ingredients Oil for shallow frying, तलने के लिए तेल Prepared Kofte, तैयार किए हुए कोफ्ते For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Kofta Mixture ● In a bowl, add grated bottle gourd, salt to taste, turmeric powder, mix it well and leave it aside to release the moisture. ● Take a muslin cloth, transfer the mixture into it and squeeze out the extra moisture. ● Take a clean bowl, add mixture, ginger garlic paste, crushed dry fenugreek leaves, semolina, gram flour, green chillies, crushed black peppercorns, curd and make a smooth batter. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, salt to taste, fresh coriander leaves, oil, baking soda and give it a good mix. ● Take a steaming mold and tray, grease it with oil, top it with a pinch of carom seeds, pour prepared kofta mixture on the tray and spread it evenly. ● Transfer it to a steamer and cook for 12-15 minutes until cooked well. ● Gently demold the mixture and cut it into a desired shape. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Gravy ● In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add a pinch of fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds, green chilli and saute it for a minute. ● Add onions, ginger garlic paste and cook it for a while until golden in colour. ● Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and saute it for a minute. ● Add fresh tomato puree, salt to taste and cook it for 5-6 minutes until cooked well. ● Add water to adjust the consistency and simmer it for a while until it thickens. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, place fried koftas and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti and steam rice. For Frying ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add prepared koftas and shallow fry them until golden in color. ● Transfer the koftas in an absorbent paper and keep it aise for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #laukikofte #laukikoftarecipe #ranveerbrar #laukirecipes #koftarecipe

Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसो का तेल 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता 1 ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Process For Roasting Eggplant ● In a parat, take eggplants, make an insertion, add garlic cloves in the cuts and apply mustard oil. ● Place it on a cooking rack and roast it for 7-8 minutes until tender. ● Transfer it to a tray or a parat and peel off the skin gently. ● Chop it well and keep it aside for further use. raw_text: METHI DAL TADKA - Winters aren't complete without Methi..and what better dish than Methi Dal Tadka? *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Methi Chicken - https://youtu.be/jSFVG-xOs1Q Sarson ka Saag - https://youtu.be/-yhf5fx6LQM *********************** Methi Dal Tadka Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-35 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients 1 cup Toor dal (washed) तूर दाल ½ cup Chana dal (washed & soaked for 1 hr) चना दाल For Cooking Dal 2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 no. Dry kashmiri red chillies, broken into half, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च Washed Dals, धुली दाल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 3-4 cups Water, पानी For Methi Dal Tadka 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 1 no. dry Red chili, broken into half, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 3 large Tomatoes, chopped, टमाटर 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 3-4 heaped tbsp Soaked fenugreek leaves, भीगी हुई कसूरी मेथी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ⅓ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़ा टमाटर की प्यूरी ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 medium bunch fresh Fenugreek leaves, chopped, मेथी 1 tbsp Ghee, घी Cooked Dal, पकी हुई दाल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of sugar, चीनी 2 tsp Lemon juice (for finishing) नींबू का रस 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Soaking dry fenugreek leaves 3-4 heaped tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी Water as required, पानी For Garnish Chilli oil, मिर्च का तेल Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Cooking Dal ● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, dry kashmiri red chillies, washed dals, salt to taste and mix it well. ● Add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, water, cover it with the lid and cook it for 3-4 whistles until cooked well. For Methi Dal Tadka ● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, a pinch of asafoetida, ginger, dry red chili and saute it for a minute. ● Add tomatoes, tender coriander stems, green chillies, soaked fenugreek leaves, salt to taste and saute it for a while until tomatoes are mushy. ● Add fresh tomato puree and cook it for 5-6 minutes on high flames. ● Add coriander powder, degi red chili powder, fresh fenugreek leaves, ghee and saute it well. ● Add cooked dal, salt to taste and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes on medium flames. ● Finish it with a pinch of sugar, lemon juice, fresh coriander leaves and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish, garnish it with chilli oil and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti and steam rice. For Soaking Fenugreek Leaves ● In a bowl, add dry fenugreek leaves, water as required and soak it for 10-15 minutes. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #daltadka #methidal #ranveerbrar #daltadkarecipe #dalfry #methidaltadkac

Bay leaf, तेज़ पत्ता Prepared Ginger green chili paste, अदरक और हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट 4 large Onions, chopped, प्याज Prepared Curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण Little water, पानी Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन 1 ½ cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Curd Mixture 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही 2 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 heaped tbsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट For Chicken Marination 1 kg Chicken (thighs & drumsticks) चिकन ½ tbsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च 1-2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Raita 1 medium Cucumber (peeled & roughly chopped) खीरा 1 large Tomato, chopped, टमाटर 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज 1 ⅓ cups Curd, beaten, दही Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 tsp Roasted cumin powder, भुना जीरा पाउडर 1 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ tsp Degi red chili powder, धनिया पत्ता For Chai 2 cups Water, पानी 2-3 tsp Tea leaves, चायपत्ती 3-4 tsp Sugar, चीनी ½ inch Ginger (peeled & crushed) अदरक 1 cup Milk, दूध For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Ginger Green Chili Paste ● In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chillies, cumin seeds and grind it into coarse paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Curry ● In a handi, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add black cardamom, bay leaf, prepared ginger green chilli paste and saute it for a minute. ● Add onions and cook it for a while until golden in colour. ● Add curd mixture and let it cook for 7-8 minutes on medium flames. ● Add a little water, marinated chicken, cover it with the lid and cook it for a while. ● Add water, salt to taste and simmer it for 5-6 minutes until it thickens. ● Turn off the flames and finish it with coriander leaves. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti, steam rice and prepared raita. For Curd Mixture ● In a bowl, add curd, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, ginger garlic paste and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Marination ● In a bowl, add chicken, crushed black peppercorns, lemon juice, salt to taste, turmeric powder and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Raita ● In a bowl, add curd, cucumber, tomato, onions, salt to taste, lemon juice, roasted cumin powder, coriander leaves, degi red chili powder and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig. For Chai ● In a saucepan, add water, tea leaves, sugar, ginger and boil it for 4-5 minutes. ● Add milk and simmer it for 5-6 minutes. ● Transfer it to a serving cup and Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickencurry #chickenrecipe #ranveerbrar #chickenmasala #chefnehal #aakashgupta

raw_text: TAAZE MATAR KI KACHORI - Winter mein ताज़े हरे Matar की कचौरी is a must! Here's my recipe for a No-Fail flaky, cripsy Matar/ Peas Kachori and Ghughra as well. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Punjabi Samosa - https://youtu.be/EKPAfUCn_Jo Matar Paneer - https://youtu.be/tYt9s6-5MLc Matar ka Nimona - https://youtu.be/DrKy6T5HUvs *********************** Matar Kachori Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Ginger Green Chili Paste 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & cut into diagonally) हरी मिर्च For Filling 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 500-600 gms fresh Green peas, हरी मटर Prepared Ginger Green chilli paste, अदरक हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च Little water, पानी For Dough 1 cup Refined flour, मैदा 1 cup whole Wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा 1 tbsp Gram flour, बेसन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी Water as required, पानी For Tempering 2 tbsp Ghee, घी A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ़ 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, crushed, कुटे हुए धनिये के बीज Prepared kachori filling, तैयार किया हुआ कचौड़ी का मिश्रण 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 12-15 no. Raisins, chopped, किशमिश For Assembling Sweetened curd, मीठा दही Prepared kachori, तैयारी की हुई कचौड़ी A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Tamarind chutney, इमली की चटनी Green chutney, हरी चटनी A pinch of chaat masala, चाट मसाला A pinch of roasted cumin powder, भुना जीरा पाउडर Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Nylon sev, सेव Khari boondi, खारी बूंदी Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Ginger Green Chili Paste ● In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chillies and grind into a coarse paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Filling ● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add fresh green peas, prepared ginger green chili paste, salt to taste and cook for 2-3 minutes. ● Add crushed black peppercorns, little water and mix well. ● Cover it with the lid and cook until 2-3 whistles on medium flames. ● Keep it aside to depressurize the cooker. ● Mash the green peas with the help of spatula or masher and keep it aside for further use. For Dough ● In a parat or mixing bowl, add refined flour, wheat flour, gram flour, salt to taste, ghee and rub it well. ● Add water as required and knead it in firm dough. ● Cover it with damp cloth and keep it aside for resting. For Tempering ● In a non-stick kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add a pinch of asafoetida, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, crushed coriander seeds and let it splutter well. ● Add Prepare kachori filling, tender coriander stems and cook until mixture turns dry. ● Add raisins and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Matar Ki Kachori ● Divide the dough into small lemon size balls, flatten it with the help of a rolling pin, stuff with the prepared filling mixture and seal the edges properly and make it tikkis and coin size balls. ● Take a kadai, add oil, once it's medium hot, add prepared kachoris and fry them until light brown in color on low flames. ● Transfer it into the absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. ● Transfer it into the serving plate and serve hot with green chutney & tamarind chutney. For Ghughra ● Divide the dough into small lemon size balls, flatten with the help of a rolling pin, stuff the prepared filling mixture, seal the edges and give it a desired shape. ● Take a kadai, add oil, once it's medium hot, add prepared ghughra and fry them until golden in color on low flames. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, serve hot with green chutney and tamarind chutney. For Assembling ● In a serving dish, add sweetened curd, place prepared kachori, sprinkle a pinch of degi red chili powder, add green chutney, tamarind chutney, a pinch of chaat masala and a pinch of roasted cumin powder. ● Add pomegranate pearls, nylon sev and khari boondi. ● Garnish it with coriander sprig and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #matarkachorirecipe #matarghughra #ranveerbrar #matarkikachori #ghughra #khastakachori #ઘૂઘરા

Garlic cloves, लहसुन | 10-12 large Tomatoes, cut into quarters, टमाटर | 2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | ½ tbsp Sugar, चीनी | 2-3 cups Water, पानी | 1 tbsp Ghee, घी | ⅓ cup Butter, cubed, मक्खन | 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी | Prepared Gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी | ½ cup Water, पानी | ¼ cup Fresh cream, ताजा मलाई | 1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस | 1 drop of Kewra water, केवड़ा जल
instructions: For 1 st Marination | ● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice and mix it well. | ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. | For 2 nd Marination | ● In a bowl, add hung curd, ginger garlic paste, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, mustard oil, salt to taste and give it a good mix. | ● Add chicken, roasted gram flour and mix it well. | ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. | For Cooking & Smoking Cashew nuts | ● In a saucepan, add cashew nuts, water and let it boil for a while. | ● Strain out the water and transfer cashews to a bowl. | ● Add ghee and give it a good mix. | ● Place a small steel bowl, add burnt coal in the steel bowl, pour some ghee on top and cover it with the lid. | ● Smoke the cashew nuts for a while and keep it aside for further use. | ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add green cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick, bay leaf and let it splutter. | ● Add onions, ginger, green chilli and saute them for a while until translucent. | ● Add garlic, tomatoes, tender coriander stems with roots, salt to taste and cook it for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. | ● Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, sugar and cook it for a minute. | ● Add water, cooked & smoked cashew nuts and simmer it for a while until tomatoes are mushy. | ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | For Cooking Chicken | ● In a grill pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place marinated chicken and grill it for 5-6 minutes on each side until half cooked. | ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. | For Butter Chicken | ● In a handi, add butter, once it's hot, add degi red chili powder, dry fenugreek leaves and cook it for a minute. | ● Add prepared gravy, cooked chicken, water and simmer it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. | ● Finish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves, salt to taste, lemon juice, kewra water and give it a good mix. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves and coriander sprig. | ● Serve hot with naan or tandoori roti. | Garlic cloves, लहसुन 10-12 large Tomatoes, cut into quarters, टमाटर 2 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tbsp Sugar, चीनी 2-3 cups Water, पानी Cooked & smoked Cashew Nuts, काजू For Cooking Chicken 1 tbsp Ghee, घी Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन For Butter Chicken ⅓ cup Butter, cubed, मक्खन 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Prepared Gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी Cooked chicken, पका हुआ चिकन ½ cup Water, पानी ¼ cup Fresh cream, ताजा मलाई 1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 drop of Kewra water, केवड़ा जल For Garnish Fresh cream, ताजा मलाई dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For 1 st Marination ● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, ginger garlic paste, lemon juice and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For 2 nd Marination ● In a bowl, add hung curd, ginger garlic paste, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, mustard oil, salt to taste and give it a good mix. ● Add chicken, roasted gram flour and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Cooking & Smoking Cashew nuts ● In a saucepan, add cashew nuts, water and let it boil for a while. ● Strain out the water and transfer cashews to a bowl. ● Add ghee and give it a good mix. ● Place a small steel bowl, add burnt coal in the steel bowl, pour some ghee on top and cover it with the lid. ● Smoke the cashew nuts for a while and keep it aside for further use. For Gravy ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add green cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick, bay leaf and let it splutter. ● Add onions, ginger, green chilli and saute them for a while until translucent. ● Add garlic, tomatoes, tender coriander stems with roots, salt to taste and cook it for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. ● Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, sugar and cook it for a minute. ● Add water, cooked & smoked cashew nuts and simmer it for a while until tomatoes are mushy. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Chicken ● In a grill pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place marinated chicken and grill it for 5-6 minutes on each side until half cooked. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Butter Chicken ● In a handi, add butter, once it's hot, add degi red chili powder, dry fenugreek leaves and cook it for a minute. ● Add prepared gravy, cooked chicken, water and simmer it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. ● Finish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves, salt to taste, lemon juice, kewra water and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with naan or tandoori roti. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #butterchicken #sanjyotkeer #ranveerbrar #chickenrecipe #chickencurry

raw_text: PANEER CUTLET with TADKA DIP - How did I miss making this!! No further delay..let's get going with not one, but 2 types of Paneer Cutlet today :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** PANEER CUTLET & DIP Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Masala Fried Paneer 700 gms Paneer, sliced, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल (for shallow frying) For Cutlet Mixture 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल Remaining masala oil, बचा हुआ तेल 2 medium Onions, grated, प्याज 1 ½ inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक 4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 large Carrot (peeled & grated) गाजर 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems with roots, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल और जड़ें 5-6 medium Potatoes (boiled & grated) आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता Masala fried paneer, grated, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला फ्राइड पनीर 3-4 no. Bread slices (trim the edges & cubed) ब्रेड स्लाइस 1 tbsp Semolina, सूजी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च का पाउडर For Tadka Ketchup 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई 1 sprig Curry leaves, roughly chopped, करी पत्ता 2-3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च ½ tsp Chili flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स ⅓ cup Tomato Ketchup, टमाटर केचप ½ cup Water, पानी For Cornstarch Slurry 1 cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च ½ cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Other Ingredients 1 cup fresh Bread crumbs ( for coating) ताज़े ब्रेड क्रम Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedges, नींबू की फांक Process For Masala Fried Paneer ● In a parat, add paneer slices, sprinkle some salt to taste, degi red chili powder, cumin powder, coriander powder and marinat it well from both the sides. ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated paneer and shallow fry it for a while until golden brown. ● Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use. For Cutlet Mixture ● In a pan, add oil, remaining oil, once it's hot, add onion and saute it for a minute until translucent. ● Add ginger, green chilies and saute it for a minute. ● Add carrot and cook it well for a while. ● Add tender coriander stems, potatoes, coriander leaves and mix it well. ● Add prepared masala fried paneer, bread slices, salt to taste, black pepper powder, give it a good mix and cook it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. ● Take a lemon size ball and give it a desired shape. ● Dip the prepared balls in cornstarch slurry and coat it well with bread crumbs. ● Transfer it to a hot and shallow fry it until golden brown. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedges. ● Serve hot with prepared tadka ketchup dip. For Tadka Dip ● In a pan, once it's hot, add mustard oil and splutter it well. ● Add curry leaves, green chillies, a pinch of chili flakes and cook it for a minute. ● Add tomato ketchup, water and simmer it for 4-5 minutes until it thickens. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl and serve with a prepared paneer cutlet. *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: White Dal Makhani - https://youtu.be/3yGi8IPZSAM Paneer Kolhapuri Masala - https://youtu.be/Qg3HTf5DsA8 *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #paneercutletrecipe #cutletrecipe #ranveerbrar #paneersnack #paneerpakode #cutletdip

Cloves, लौंग A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 2 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, broken into half, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज Prepared curd mixture, तयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 cup Water, पानी 1 medium Tomato, diced, टमाटर 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी Fried Arbi, तली हुई अरबी For Curd Mixture 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही 1 ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Frying Arbi ● Take boiled arbi, flatten it with the help of a bowl or a napkin and keep it in a tray for further use. ● Heat oil in a non-stick kadai, add flattened arbi and fry it until half cooked. ● Transfer it to a tray for a minute and refry it on high flames until golden brown. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Tuk Masala ● In a bowl, add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, dry mango powder, salt to taste and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Arbi Tuk ● In a tray, add fried arbi, sprinkle prepared tuk masala and gently toss it well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with green chutney and chai. For Dahi Arbi ● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add cloves, a pinch of asafoetida, dry red chillies and saute it for a minute. ● Add onion and cook it for a while until translucent. ● Add prepared curd mixture and cook it for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. ● Add salt to taste, water to adjust the consistency, tomato, sugar and give it a quick boil. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, add fried arbi and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with steam rice. For Curd Mixture ● In a bowl, add curd, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, ginger garlic paste and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #arbikisabji #arbimasalarecipe #ranveerbrar #arvikisabzi #arbituk #alootuk

Ice cube Prepared kaju katli mixture For Cashew Fig Triangle Katli Prepared dates & fig mixture Prepared kesar kaju katli mixture For Double Decker Barfi Prepared kaju katli mixture Prepared dates & fig mixture For Fig and Dates Ladoo Prepared Fig & dates mixture ⅓ cup Tata Sampann Pistachios, finely chopped for coating 2-3 tbsp Poppy seeds, roasted (for coating) For Kaju Peda Prepared kesar kaju katli mixture For Garnish Silver vark Golden vark Saffron strands Almonds, sliced Cloves Chocolate, sprinkler Dessicated coconut dry Rose petals Process For Figs & Dates Mixture ● In a wok or non-stick kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add figs & dates mixture and mix it well. ● Cook it for 20-25 minutes on medium flames until it thickens and leaves the sides of the pan. ● Add ghee, Tata Sampann Almonds, Tata Sampann Cashew Nuts and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a tray and refrigerate for a while to set well. For Kaju Katli Mixture ● In a non-stick kadai, add water, sugar, lemon juice and give it a quick boil. ● Add chilled Tata Sampann Cashew Nuts powder and mix it well. ● Cook it for 15-20 minutes on medium flames until it thickens and leaves the sides of the pan. ● Transfer it to a tray, layer it with silver vark and refrigerate for a while to set well. ● Demold the mixture and cut it into any desired shape. ● Garnish it with kaju katli flowers and cloves. ● Transfer it to a serving dish or assorted mithai box. For Fig & Dates Ladoo ● Take the fig & dates mixture, divide it into small lemon size balls. ● Give it a desired shape, coat it well with Tata Sampann Pistachios and roasted poppy seeds. ● Transfer it to a serving dish or assorted mithai box, garnish it with prepared kaju katli flowers and Tata Sampann Saffron strands. For Kaju Peda ● Take a prepared kesar kaju katli mixture, divide it into small lemon size balls. ● Give it a desired shape, garnish it with golden vark, dry rose petals and almonds. ● Transfer it to a serving dish or assorted mithai box. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

For Anda Bhurji Masala ● In a shallow kadai or pan, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, ginger garlic paste and saute it for a minute. ● Add onions and cook it for a while until translucent. ● Add coriander powder, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, cumin powder and saute it well. ● Add salt to taste, fresh tomato puree, capsicum, butter, crushed dry fenugreek leaves and cook it for 7-8 minutes on medium flame. ● Add a little water, whole eggs and scramble it well. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, butter and finish it with some fresh coriander leaves.. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with butter, lemon wedge and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with ladi pav. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

title: Shahi Kaju Katli | सिर्फ 3 चीज़ों से काजू कतली | easy Diwali Mithai at home | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: SHAHI KAJU KATLI - What's Diwali without Kaju Katli, right? Banate हैं सिर्फ 3 ingredients se Shahi Kaju Katli.. Kaise? Milkmaid hai na! 😎 #collab #kajukatli #DiwaliMithai #ranveerbrar #shahikajukatli #milkmaidrecipes *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣
ingredients: 2-3 tbsp Ghee | 1 kg chilled Cashew nuts, paste | 1 ½ tin Nestlé MILKMAID | Prepared kaju katli mixture | ¼ cup Rose syrup | 1 ¼ cup Desiccated coconut
instructions: For Kaju Katli Base | ● In a non-stick pan or wok, add ghee, once it's hot, add cashew nuts paste and cook it for a while until it's cooked well or until doughy consistency. | ● Add Nestlé MILKMAID and cook it for 5 minutes. | ● Transfer the mixture in a greased tray and spread it evenly. | ● Refrigerate it for 2-3 hours until set well. | For Shahi Kaju katli | ● In a non-stick kadai, add prepared kaju katli mixture, rose syrup, desiccated coconut and give it a good mix. | ● Cook it for 4-5 minutes on low flame. | ● Transfer the mixture in a greased tray and spread it evenly. | ● Garnish it with silver vark, golden wark and refrigerate it for 2-3 hours to set well. | ● Demold the mixture and cut in any desired shape. | ● Transfer it to a serving platter, garnish it with pistachios and fresh rose petals. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Milkmaid hai na! 😎 #collab #kajukatli #DiwaliMithai #ranveerbrar #shahikajukatli #milkmaidrecipes *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Gulab Jamun - Anjeer Rolls - *********************** SHAHI KAJU KATLI Preparation time 5-10 minutes (set time 2 hrs) Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 7-8 pieces each Ingredients For Kaju Katli Base 2-3 tbsp Ghee 1 kg chilled Cashew nuts, paste 1 ½ tin Nestlé MILKMAID For Shahi Kaju Katli Prepared kaju katli mixture ¼ cup Rose syrup 1 ¼ cup Desiccated coconut For Garnish Silver vark Golden vark Pistachios, chopped fresh Rose petals Process For Kaju Katli Base ● In a non-stick pan or wok, add ghee, once it's hot, add cashew nuts paste and cook it for a while until it's cooked well or until doughy consistency. ● Add Nestlé MILKMAID and cook it for 5 minutes. ● Transfer the mixture in a greased tray and spread it evenly. ● Refrigerate it for 2-3 hours until set well. For Shahi Kaju katli ● In a non-stick kadai, add prepared kaju katli mixture, rose syrup, desiccated coconut and give it a good mix. ● Cook it for 4-5 minutes on low flame. ● Transfer the mixture in a greased tray and spread it evenly. ● Garnish it with silver vark, golden wark and refrigerate it for 2-3 hours to set well. ● Demold the mixture and cut in any desired shape. ● Transfer it to a serving platter, garnish it with pistachios and fresh rose petals. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Bay leaf, तेज़ पत्ता 3 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 ½ large Onions, sliced, प्याज Prepared masala mixture, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला मिश्रण 3 medium Tomatoes, chopped, टमाटर Fried potatoes, तले हुए आलू ¼ cup Water, पानी 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च ½ cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Fried Eggs, तले हुए अंडे For Masala Mixture 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ¼ cup Water, पानी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Frying ● In a non-stick kadai, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add potatoes and fry them until golden brown or until cooked well. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside. ● Add boiled eggs and fry them for a while until golden brown. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Dimer Kosha ● In the same kadai, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add bay leaf, dry red chillies, cumin seed and let it splutter well. ● Add onions and saute it for a while until golden in color. ● Add prepared masala mixture and cook it for 2-3 minutes. ● Add tomatoes, fried potatoes, water, green chillies, cover it with the lid and cook for a while until the tomatoes are mushy. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, salt to taste, fried eggs and give it a quick boil. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with paratha or steam rice. For Masala Mixture ● In a bowl, add coriander powder, cumin powder, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, ginger garlic paste, water and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #dimkosha #eggcurry #ranveerbrar #dimerkosha #spicyeggmasala #andacurry

description: ALOO TAMATER PYAAZ KI SABJI - It can't get more basic than this!! This Aloo sabji is the SIMPLEST you can find and cook! *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz
ingredients: ¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ़ | ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई | 7-8 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने | A pinch of asafoetida, हींग | 3 medium Onions, roughly diced, प्याज | 3 medium Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर | 1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 heaped tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | 6 medium Potatoes (peeled & cut into diced) आलू | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 cups Water, पानी | Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का | 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता | 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी | 3-4 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च | 1 large Tomato, cut into diced, टमाटर | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार
instructions: For Aloo Pyaz Tamatar Ki Sabji | ● In a pressure cooker, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, small mustard seeds, black peppercorns and let it splutter well. | ● Add a pinch of asafoetida, onions and cook for a while. | ● Add tomatoes and cook it for a while, add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, potatoes, salt to taste, water and give it a good mix. | ● Cover it with the lid and pressure cook it for 1-2 whistles or until cooked well. | ● Finish it with prepared tadka, fresh coriander leaves and mix well. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. | ● Serve hot with roti. | ● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add dry red chillies and fry them for a while. | ● Add tomato, salt to taste and toss them for a minute. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 3 medium Onions, roughly diced, प्याज 3 medium Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर 1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 heaped tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 6 medium Potatoes (peeled & cut into diced) आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 cups Water, पानी Prepared Tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Tadka 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 3-4 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 1 large Tomato, cut into diced, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Aloo Pyaz Tamatar Ki Sabji ● In a pressure cooker, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, small mustard seeds, black peppercorns and let it splutter well. ● Add a pinch of asafoetida, onions and cook for a while. ● Add tomatoes and cook it for a while, add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, potatoes, salt to taste, water and give it a good mix. ● Cover it with the lid and pressure cook it for 1-2 whistles or until cooked well. ● Finish it with prepared tadka, fresh coriander leaves and mix well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti. For Tadka ● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add dry red chillies and fry them for a while. ● Add tomato, salt to taste and toss them for a minute. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #aloorecipe #alootamatarkisabzi #ranveerbrar #pyaaztamatergravy #basicsabji #easysabjirecipe
