raw_text: PANEER KAJU MAKHANA SABJI /MASALA - A super simple dish with just a few pointers, bet you will love this! *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Dhaba Paneer Masala - https://youtu.be/jLkIi3x6t3w Matar Paneer - https://youtu.be/tYt9s6-5MLc *********************** PANEER KAJU MAKHANA SABJI Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Gravy 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 5-6 no. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 3 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & cut into diagonally) हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup Foxnuts, मखाने 10-12 no. Cashew nuts (soaked & cut into half) भीगे हुए काजू 1 cup Water, पानी For Soaking Cashew Nut Hot water as required, गरम पानी 10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, cut into half, काजू For Frying Foxnuts 1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ cup Foxnuts, मखाने Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Kaju Makhane Wala Paneer 2 tbsp Ghee, घी Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी 2-3 cups Water, पानी 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 800 gms Paneer, cut into medium size cubed, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 12-15 no. Cashew nuts (soaked & cut into half) भीगे हुए काजू 1 tsp Sugar (optional) चीनी For Garnish Fried foxnuts, तले हुए मखाने Fried cashew nuts, तले हुए काजू Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई Chili oil, मिर्च का तेल Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Gravy ● In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add garlic, onions and saute it for a while until translucent. ● Add curd, green chili, ginger garlic paste, coriander powder, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste and cook it for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. ● Add foxnuts, cashew nuts, water and mix it well. ● Cover it with a lid and allow it to cook for a while.. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. ● Transfer the mixture to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Soaking Cashew Nuts ● In a bowl, add hot water as required, add cashew nuts and keep it aside for a while. For Frying Foxnuts ● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add foxnuts, salt to taste, degi red chili powder and toss it well. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Kaju Makhane Wala Paneer ● In the same handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add prepared gravy, water and simmer it for 2-3 minutes. ● Add ghee, paneer, salt to taste, tender coriander stems and cook it for a while. ● Finish it with some cashew nuts, sugar and give it a quick boil. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fried foxnuts, fried cashew nuts, sprinkle some crushed dry fenugreek leaves, drizzle some fresh cream, chili oil and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti or paratha. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #kajupaneermasala #paneerrecipes #ranveerbrar #paneermakhani #makhanarecipe

raw_text: VRAT SPL MASALA DOSA with 2 TYPES CHUTNEY - I've come to love Vrat food and experimenting with it. Have you? *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Vrat ki Thali - https://youtu.be/hxqKMEATcac Vrat ki Aloo Tikki - https://youtu.be/UBfND20lqBc *********************** VRAT SPL MASALA DOSA with 2 TYPES CHUTNEY Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Roasting Millets 1 tbsp Ghee, घी ¼ cup Tapioca pearl, साबूदाना 1 cup Barnyard millet, समा चावल 1 tsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक For Batter ¾ cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 ½ cups Water, पानी ½ tsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक For Peanut Chutney 1 tbsp Ghee, घी ¾ cup Peanuts, मूंगफली 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Roasted cumin, भुना हुआ जीरा ½ tsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक 1 tbsp Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का For Tadka 1-2 tbsp Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल ¼ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते For Coconut Chutney 1 cup fresh Coconut, cut into bits, ताज़ा नारियल 2-3 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते 3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 tsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक ⅓ cup fresh Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता 1 tbsp Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल ½ tsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक For Dosa Batter Prepared batter, तैयार किया हुआ बैटर 1 ½ cup Water, पानी ¼ cup Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल For Aloo Sabji 2 tbsp Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ते 5-6 no. Cashew Nuts, roughly chopped, काजू 5-6 medium boiled Potatoes (peeled & roughly diced) उबले हुए आलू 1 ½ tsp Sendha namak, सेंधा नमक 2-3 tbsp Water, पानी 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च For Vrat Ka Dosa 1 tsp Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल Prepared batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रण 1 tsp Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल For 2nd Type Dosa 1 tsp Peanut oil, कच्ची मूंगफली का तेल Prepared batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रण Process For Roasting ● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add tapioca pearls and roast it for a while until it turns fluffy in texture. ● Add barnyard millet and roast it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a bowl, add sendha namak and keep it aside for further use. For Batter ● In the same bowl, add curd, water and sendha namak. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Peanut Chutney ● In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add peanuts and roast it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a bowl, add green chili, roasted cumin, sendha namak and peanut oil. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it to a coarse paste. ● Transfer the mixture in a bowl, add curd and give it a good mix. ● Add prepared tadka and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Tadka ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, cumin seeds, curry leaves and let it splutter well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Coconut Chutney ● In a bowl, add fresh coconut, curry leaves, green chillies, cumin seeds, lemon juice, sendha namak, fresh coriander leaves, peanut oil and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Transfer it to a bowl, add sendha namak, mix it well and keep it aside for further use. For Dosa Batter ● In a bowl, add prepared batter, water to adjust the consistency, peanut oil and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Aloo Sabji ● In a non-stick pan or tawa, add peanut oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, curry leaves and let it splutter well. ● Add cashew nuts, boiled potatoes, sendha namak and gently toss it for a minute. ● Add water, green chilli and let it cook for 3-4 minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it into the bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Vrat Ka Dosa ● In a non-stick tawa, add peanut oil, once it's hot, sprinkle some prepared batter and let it cook for a while until crispy and golden in color. ● Drizzle some oil and fold the dosa in a triangle shape or any desired shape. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, serve hot with prepared aloo sabji, peanut chutney and coconut chutney. For 2nd Type Dosa ● In a non-stick pan, add peanut oil, once it's hot, pour a ladleful of batter and let it cook for a while until crispy and golden in color. ● Drizzle some oil and fold the dosa in a triangle shape or any desired shape. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, serve hot with prepared aloo sabji, peanut chutney and coconut chutney *********************** #vratdosa #vratrecipes #ranveerbrar #vratkamasaladosa #navratrispecial #dosachutneyrecipe

Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग For Dal Dhungar 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ़ 1 no. Clove, लौंग 1 ½ medium Onions, finely chopped, प्याज ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Prepared Ginger Garlic Chutney, अदरक लहसुन की चटनी Cooked Dal, पकी हुई दाल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of sugar, चीनी Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का For Smoke Coal, कोयला 1 tsp Ghee, घी For Tadka 1 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 4-5 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च ¼ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Mirch Ka Pulao 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tbsp Oil, तेल A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 tsp Coriander seeds, crushed, कुटे हुए धनिये के बीज 1 heaped tsp Chili flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स ½ medium Onion, finely chopped (optional) प्याज 1 tsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, finely chopped, पुदीना पत्ता 2 cups Cooked rice, पका हुआ चावल For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Cooking Dal ● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies, toor dal, moong dal and saute it for a minute. ● Add salt to taste, turmeric powder, water, ghee and mix it well. ● Cover it with a lid and let it cook for 3-4 whistles. ● Turn off the flames and keep it aside to depressurise the cooker. ● Open the lid, mash the dal with the help of masher and keep it aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Chutney ● In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, degi red chili powder, a pinch of asafoetida and grind it into coarsely paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Dal Dhungar ● In a kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, clove and let it splutter well. ● Add onions, tender coriander stems and saute it for a while until translucent. ● Add prepared ginger garlic chutney and saute it for 3-4 minutes ● Add cooked dal, water as required, salt to taste, sugar and give it a quick boil. ● Take a steel bowl, place it into the kadai, add burnt coal, ghee and cover it with the lid. ● Remove the steel bowl and give it a good mix to dal. ● Finish it with prepared tadka and mix it well. ● Transfer it into a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with prepared mirch ka pulao. For Smoke ● Take a piece of coal, place it onto the gas burner and burn it for a while. ● Transfer it to the steel bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Tadka ● In a pan, add mustard oil, oil, once it's smoky hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies and fry them until crispy texture and dark in color. ● Turn off the flames, sprinkle some degi red chili powder and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Mirch Ka Pulao ● In a wok or non-stick kadai, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add a pinch of asafoetida, crushed coriander seeds, chili flakes and saute it for a minute. ● Add onions, tender coriander stems, salt to taste and saute it for a while translucent. ● Add fresh coriander leaves, fresh mint leaves, cooked rice and toss it well on a high flame. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with prepared dal dhungar. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #daltadka #dhungardal #ranveerbrar #dalchawal #mirchpulao #dalpulao #tadkadal

Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 7-8 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने A pinch of fennel seeds, सौंफ़ 2-3 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly chopped, पुदीना पत्ता ½ tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 3-4 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट For Chicken Pudina Handi 2 tbsp Remaining excess oil, बचा हुआ तेल 2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता ¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी Sauteed chicken, भुना हुआ चिकन Prepared Curd mixture, तैयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण fried Potatoes & onions, तले हुए आलू और प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 4 no. Green chillies, slit into middle, हरी मिर्च 2-3 tbsp Remaining oil, बचा हुआ तेल 2-3 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly torn, पुदीना पत्ता Other Ingredients Oil (for seasoning handi) तेल Dough (for dum) गुंधा हुआ आटा For Garnish Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Sauteing Chicken ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste and saute it for a while until half cooked. ● Transfer it to a tray or plate and keep it aside for further use. For Frying Potatoes ● In a handi or kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add potatoes and fry them for a while. ● Add onions and cook for 3-4 minutes until translucent. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Curd Mixture ● In a bowl, add curd, turmeric powder, coriander powder, degi red chili powder, cumin powder, green cardamom, black cardamom, black peppercorns, a pinch of fennel seeds, fresh mint leaves, tender coriander stems, curd, ginger garlic paste and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Pudina Handi ● In an earthen pot or handi, add remaining excess oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, sauteed chicken and saute it for a minute. ● Add prepared curd mixture, fried potatoes & onions, salt to taste and stir it well. ● Add green chillies, remaining oil, fresh mint leaves and mix it well. ● Take a dough and seal the edges of the pot, cover it with a lid and cook it for 20-25 minutes. ● Turn off the flames and let it rest for 5-6 minutes. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with mint sprig. ● Serve hot with roti or naan. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #handichicken #pudinachicken #ranveerbrar #chickenrecipe #chickencurry #dhabastylechicken

Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 2 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 2-3 tbsp Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida (optional) हींग 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 2 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही For Masala 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 heaped tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 5-6 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Dry fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी For Matar Paneer 2 tbsp Ghee, घी ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा Prepared Paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट 1 cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी 2-3 cups Water, पानी 1 tsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 cup Water, पानी 1 ¼ cup fresh Green peas, हरे मटर 700 gms Paneer, cut into cubed, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Paste ● In a pan, add oil, mustard oil, once it's hot, add onions, salt to taste and saute it for a while until translucent. ● Add garlic, ginger, green chillies, coriander leaves and saute it for 3-4 minutes. ● Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, a pinch of asafoetida, coriander powder, curd and cook it for a few minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it to the bowl and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Masala ● In a pan, add cumin seeds, black peppercorns, coriander seeds, green cardamom, salt to taste and roast them for a while until aromatic. ● Turn off the flames, add dry fenugreek leaves and toss it well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a fine powder. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Matar Paneer ● In a handi or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds and splutter it well. ● Add prepared paste and cook it for 5-6 minutes. ● Add fresh tomato puree and cook it for a while until it releases oil. ● Add water, tender coriander stems and simmer it for 5-6 minutes. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, green peas, paneer, salt to taste, cover it with a lid and cook it for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. ● Finish it with prepared masala, salt to taste and give it a quick boil. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti and salad. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #matarpaneer #paneerrecipes #ranveervbrar #matarpaneerrecipeinhindi #paneermatarmasala

Green chillies (less spicy & cut into diagonally) हरी मिर्च 1 heaped tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर 1 cup Water, पानी 2 tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Dal Dhoka Cooked dal, पकी हुई दाल Prepared tadka, तैयार किया हुआ तड़का Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता Fried dal vadi, तली हुई दाल की वड़ियाँ 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Other Ingredients Oil (for greasing) तेल For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Paste ● In a bowl, add soaked urad dal, soaked chana dal, ginger, green chillies, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida, fresh coriander leaves and salt to taste. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Dal ● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add a pinch of asafoetida, green chili, ginger and saute it for a minute. ● Add chana dal, salt to taste, turmeric powder, water, salt to taste and mix it well. ● Cover it with a lid and give it 2-3 whistles on medium to high flames. ● Turn off the flames and leave it aside to depressurise the cooker. ● Mash the dal with the help of a wooden spoon or masher and keep it aside for further use. For Steaming Dal Vadi ● Take steaming plates, grease it with some oil, pour a ladleful of prepared paste and spread it evenly. ● Transfer it to a steamer and cook it for 15-20 minutes on medium flames. ● Leave it aside to cool down the temperature. ● Demold the prepared Dal vadi and cut into a desired shape. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Frying Dal Dhoka ● In a non-stick kadai, add oil, mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add prepared dal vadi and fry them until golden brown. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Tadka ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, green chillies, degi red chili powder, dry mango powder and saute it for a minute. ● Add water, sugar, salt to taste and give it a quick boil. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Dal Dhoka ● In the same pressure cooker, add cooked dal and give it a quick boil. ● Add prepared tadka, salt to taste, fresh coriander leaves, fried vadi and let it boil for 5-6 minutes. ● Finish it with lemon juice and give it a good stir. ● Transfer it to a serving dish or bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with steam rice. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #dhokardalna #daldhokli #ranveerbrar #daldhoka #niramishrecipe #dalkidulhan

For Masala Mix ● In a pan, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, turn off the flames and leave it aside for 1-2 minutes. ● In a bowl, add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, turmeric powder, dry mango powder, asafoetida, garam masala powder, salt to taste and mix it well. ● Add mustard oil to masala and give it a good mix. ● Take marinated indian gourd, stuff it with prepared masala mix and keep it aside for 10-12 minutes to marinate. For Tinde Ki Sabji ● In a kadai, add smoked mustard oil, mustard oil, once it's hot, add a pinch of asafoetida, dry fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter well. ● Add curd, ginger green chili paste, ginger, green chillies and cook it for 3-4 minutes. ● Add remaining masala mix, salt to taste and give it a quick boil. ● Add stuffed tinde, cover it with a lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. ● Finish it with fresh coriander leaves, butter and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #tindamasala #tindeykisabji #ranveerbrar #sabjirecipe #tindaaloo

Cloves, लौंग 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 7-8 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक 1 no. Cashewnut, काजू 2 cups Water, पानी For Dry Masala Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 4-5 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 7-8 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 1 ½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग 2 tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 2-3 tbsp Dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी For Dhaba Paneer Masala 1 ½ cups Water, पानी Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी Prepared paneer masala, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर मसाला Remaining paneer, grated, बचा हुआ पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar (optional) चीनी 1-2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tbsp Ghee, घी For Sauteed Paneer Masala 2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 no. Green chili, slit, हरी मिर्च 1 medium Onion, finely chopped, प्याज 1 large Capsicum, finely chopped, शिमला मिर्च 1 medium Tomato, finely chopped, टमाटर 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Prepared dry masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 800 gms Paneer, cut into cubed, पनीर For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता ¼ tsp Dry fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई Process For Gravy ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add cloves, black cardamom, green cardamom, black peppercorns and let it splutter well. ● Add ginger, green chili, onions and cook it until translucent. ● Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and saute it for a minute. ● Add tomatoes, salt to taste, curd and let it cook for a while until tomatoes are mushy. ● Add cashew nuts, water, cover it with a lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it into the bowl and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. ● Transfer the mixture in a mixer grinder jar and grind it into smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Dry Masala ● In a pan, add salt to taste, black cardamom, green cardamom, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, black peppercorns, cloves, fennel seeds and dry roast it for 3-4 minutes on low flames until aromatic. ● Turn off the flames, add dry fenugreek leaves and toss it well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Dhaba Paneer Masala ● In the same handi, add water, prepare gravy and let it cook for a while. ● Add prepared paneer masala, remaining paneer, salt to taste, sugar and cook it for 5-6 minutes. ● Finish it with fresh coriander leaves, ghee and mix it well. ● Transfer it into a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig, dry fenugreek leaves and fresh cream. ● Serve hot with roti, naan or kulcha. For Sauteed Paneer Masala ● In a pan, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds and let it splutter. ● Add green chili, onion, capsicum, tomato, tender coriander stems and cook for 7-8 minutes on high flames. ● Add degi red chili powder, prepared dry masala, paneer and saute it well on medium flames. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #paneermasala #dhabastyleshahipaneer #ranveerbrar #paneerrecipes #shahipaneer

Sharing my memories and the recipe with you :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/3Xc0Iwz 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Aloo Do Pyaza - https://youtu.be/hcGrv_KX7qA Beans ki Sabji - https://youtu.be/ddqOv_77g7c *********************** GAVAR PHALI (CLUSTER BEANS) SABJI Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Sukhi Guar Ki Sabji 2-3 heaped tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ़ 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 2 medium Potatoes, roughly sliced, आलू 400 gms Guar beans (trim tip & tail, finely chopped) ग्वार फलियाँ Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 1-2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ½ tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर For Rasse Wale Guar Ki Sabji 2 heaped tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ़ A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 large Onion, roughly sliced, प्याज ½ inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) अदरक 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 medium Potatoes, roughly sliced, आलू 2 tsp Jaggery (optional) गुड़ 600 gms Guar beans (trim tip & tail, roughly chopped) ग्वार फलियाँ 1 ½ cups Water, पानी 1 large Tomato, roughly chopped, टमाटर 1-2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Sukhi Guar Ki Sabji ● In an iron kadai, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter well. ● Add onion, a pinch of asafoetida and saute for a minute. ● Add potatoes and cook it for 4-5 minutes on low flames until half cooked. ● Add guar beans, salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, ginger and saute it well. ● Cover it with a lid and let it cook for 7-8 minutes on low flames. ● Finish it with green chili, fresh coriander leaves, dry mango powder and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti. For Rasse Wale Guar Ki Sabji ● In a non-stick kadai, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter well. ● Add onion, ginger and saute for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. ● Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, curd, salt to taste and cook it for a while. ● Add potatoes, jaggery and let it cook until the potatoes are half cooked. ● Add guar beans, water, cover it with a lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. ● Finish it with tomato, fresh coriander leaves, sugar, dry mango powder and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #gawarkisabzi #gavarphali #ranveerbrar #guarphalikisabji #gawaralookisabji

Almonds, chopped 4-5 no. Cashew Nuts, chopped For Garnish fresh Rose petals Saffron water Desiccated coconut For Orange Mawa Modak 2 tbsp Ghee ¼ cup Orange crush ½ cup Rice flour ½ cup Water ½ can Nestlé MILKMAID 1 tsp Orange zest For Chocolate & Pista Stuffing 2-3 tbsp White chocolate, chopped 2 tbsp Pistachios, chopped For Garnish Mint sprig Cashew Nuts, chopped Desiccated coconut Orange zest Process For Mawa Modak ● In a bowl, add rice flour, ghee, water and mix it well. ● In a nonstick pan or kadai, add prepared mixture and cook it for 5-6 minutes on low flames. ● Add Nestlé MILKMAID,and let it cook until mixture turns into semi soft dough. ● Finish it with some ghee, cardamom powder and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a bowl, cover it with the lid and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. ● Take a modak mold, stuff with the prepared modak mixture and make a cavity in the middle. ● Stuff it with gulkand & nuts filling and seal the edges. ● Scrape out the excess mixture and press it well to get the perfect shape. ● Demold the modak and transfer it to a serving dish. ● Garnish it with fresh rose petals, saffron water and desiccated coconut. For Gulkand & Nuts Filling ● In a bowl, add gulkand, almonds, cashew nuts and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Orange Mawa Modak ● In a nonstick pan or kadai, add ghee, orange crush, rice flour, water and cook it 4-5 minutes on low flames. ● Add Nestlé MILKMAID, and let it cook until mixture turns into semi soft dough. ● Finish it with some ghee, orange zest and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a bowl, cover it with the lid and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. ● Take a modak mold, stuff with the prepared modak mixture and make a cavity in the middle. ● Stuff the modak with chocolate & pista filling and seal the edges. ● Scrape out the excess mixture and press it well to get the perfect shape. ● Demold the modak and transfer it to a serving dish. ● Garnish it with mint sprig, cashew nuts, desiccated coconut and orange zest. For Chocolate & Pista Stuffing ● In a bowl, add white chocolate, pistachios and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

raw_text: CHEESY MEXICAN PIZZA RICE - Mexican rice में Pizza ka mazaa 😋 For all Tex Mex and Cheese lovers, this recipe is a must try! *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Nachos and Salsa - Mexican Tokri Chaat - *********************** CHEESY MEXICAN PIZZA RICE Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serves 2-4 Ingredients For Mexican Rice 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 ½ large Onions, roughly sliced, प्याज 1 tbsp dry Oregano, ऑरेगैनो 1 heaped tbsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स 1 ½ cups fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी ¼ cup Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप 2 no. Green chili (less spicy & cut into diagonally) हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 cups Sella Basmati rice (soaked for 30 minutes) सेला बासमती चावल 1 ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ cup Kidney beans, boiled, राजमा ½ cup Black Eyed Beans, boiled, लोबिया ⅓ cup Sweet corn kernels, भुट्टे के दाने 4-5 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1-2 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल For Salsa 3 medium Tomatoes, chopped, टमाटर 1 large Onion, chopped, प्याज 3 no. Green chili, chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ¼ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी ⅓ cup Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 no. Garlic clove, grated, (optional) लहसुन For Mexican Spice Mix 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 2 tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 1 heaped tbsp dry Oregano, ऑरेगैनो 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Garlic powder, गार्लिक पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Layering Prepared mexican rice, तैयार किया हुआ मेक्सिकन राइस Prepared salsa, तैयार किया हुआ साल्सा Pizza cheese blend, चीज़ Prepared mexican spice mix, तैयार किया हुआ मैक्सिकन मसाला Prepared salsa, तैयार किया हुआ साल्सा Nachos, नाचोज़ For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Mexican Rice ● In a sauce pot, add oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute it for 3-4 minutes until translucent. ● Add oregano, chili flakes, tomato puree, tomato ketchup and cook it for a while until it thickens. ● Add green chili, salt to taste, sugar, sella basmati rice, degi red chili powder and mix it well. ● Add kidney beans, black eyed beans, sweet corn kernels, water, salt to taste, sugar and give it a good mix. ● Cover it with the lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes on low flames. ● Finish it with tender coriander stems and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Salsa ● In a bowl, add tomatoes, onion, green chili, fresh coriander leaves, fresh tomato puree, tomato ketchup, salt to taste, garlic and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Mexican Spice Mix ● In a bowl, add coriander powder, cumin powder, dry oregano, degi red chili powder, garlic powder, salt to taste and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Layering ● In a serving dish or bowl, add prepared mexican rice, prepared salsa, pizza cheese blend and bake it in the oven at 180°C for 4-5 minutes until the cheese melts. ● Sprinkle some prepared mexican spice mix and top it up with prepared salsa, nachos and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #mexicanricerecipe #mexicanpizza #ranveerbrar #nachosrecipe #mexicanfood

Garlic cloves, roughly sliced, लहसुन | 2 medium Onions, roughly chopped, प्याज | 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 3 medium Tomatoes, cut into quarter, टमाटर | 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही | 6 no. Papad, पापड़ | Water as required, पानी | Prepared paneer pasanda, cut into half, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर पसंदा | Prepared paneer pasanda, cut into half, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर पसंदा | 2-3 tbsp Refined flour, मैदा | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | Water as required, पानी | 1 tsp Oil, तेल | 4-5 no. Papad, पापड़
instructions: ● In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, garlic, onions and saute it until translucent. | ● Add ginger garlic paste, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and saute it for a while. | ● Add tomatoes, curd and cook it until tomatoes are mushy. | ● Add cashew nuts, salt to taste, water and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. | ● Transfer it to a bowl and let it cool down at room temperature. | ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth fine paste. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | For Paneer Stuffing | ● In a bowl, add paneer crumble, tender coriander stems, green chillies, dry fenugreek leaves, degi red chili powder, dry mango powder, roasted cumin powder, salt to taste and give it a good mix. | ● keep it aside for further use. | For Paneer Pasanda | ● Take paneer, cut into medium slabs, stuff it with the prepared paneer stuffing, cover it with another slab of paneer and shape it like a sandwich. | ● Sprinkle some salt to taste, a pinch of degi red chili powder on both the sides. | ● Cut it into halves and keep it aside for further use. | For Finishing Gravy | ● In the same handi, add prepared gravy, water as required and let it simmer for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. | ● Add dry fenugreek leaves, garam masala powder, salt to taste, sugar and give it a good mix. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish, place prepared fried paneer pasanda, garnish it with fresh cream, and coriander sprig. | ● Serve hot with roti or naan. | For Crispy Papad Roll | ● Take papads, apply some water, place paneer pasanda onto the papad and seal the edges from all sides. | ● Take a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place prepared papad rolls and fry them until golden brown. | ● Transfer to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. | For Roasting | ● Roast the papad, crush it and transfer it to a tray. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | For Roasted Papad Roll | ● Take prepared paneer pasanda and dip it into prepared slurry. | ● In a tray, add crushed papad, add paneer pasanda and coat it well. | ● Take a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place prepared papad rolls and fry them until golden brown. | ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. | ● In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, water as required and give it a good mix. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | ***********************
raw_text: SHAHI PANEER PATIALA - One of the most interesting Paneer recipes I have ever tried..and you should too :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Dhaba Handi Paneer - https://youtu.be/92niKgS_4_I Paneer Korma - https://youtu.be/b3bWUfclA_s *********************** SHAHI PANEER PATIALA Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-3 Ingredients For Gravy 3 tbsp Ghee, घी 3 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 2 no. Garlic cloves, roughly sliced, लहसुन 2 medium Onions, roughly chopped, प्याज 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 3 medium Tomatoes, cut into quarter, टमाटर 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 6 no. Cashew nuts, काजू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 cups Water, पानी For Paneer Stuffing 200 gms Paneer, crumble, पनीर 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 3 no. Green chillies, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp dry Mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर ½ tsp Roasted cumin powder, भुना हुआ जीरा पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Paneer Pasanda 500 gms Paneer, cut into slab, पनीर Prepared stuffing, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Finishing Gravy Prepared gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी Water as required, पानी 1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी A pinch of Garam masala powder, गरम मसाला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी For Crispy Papad Roll 5-6 no. Papad, पापड़ Water as required, पानी Prepared paneer pasanda, cut into half, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर पसंदा For Roasted Papad Roll Roasted Papad, crumble, भुना हुआ पापड़ का चूरा Refined flour slurry, मैदा का घोल Prepared paneer pasanda, cut into half, तैयार किया हुआ पनीर पसंदा For Slurry 2-3 tbsp Refined flour, मैदा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Water as required, पानी Other ingredients Oil for shallow frying, तलने के लिए तेल 1 tsp Oil, तेल 4-5 no. Papad, पापड़ For Garnish Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Gravy ● In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, garlic, onions and saute it until translucent. ● Add ginger garlic paste, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and saute it for a while. ● Add tomatoes, curd and cook it until tomatoes are mushy. ● Add cashew nuts, salt to taste, water and cook it for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a bowl and let it cool down at room temperature. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth fine paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Paneer Stuffing ● In a bowl, add paneer crumble, tender coriander stems, green chillies, dry fenugreek leaves, degi red chili powder, dry mango powder, roasted cumin powder, salt to taste and give it a good mix. ● keep it aside for further use. For Paneer Pasanda ● Take paneer, cut into medium slabs, stuff it with the prepared paneer stuffing, cover it with another slab of paneer and shape it like a sandwich. ● Sprinkle some salt to taste, a pinch of degi red chili powder on both the sides. ● Cut it into halves and keep it aside for further use. For Finishing Gravy ● In the same handi, add prepared gravy, water as required and let it simmer for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. ● Add dry fenugreek leaves, garam masala powder, salt to taste, sugar and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, place prepared fried paneer pasanda, garnish it with fresh cream, and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti or naan. For Crispy Papad Roll ● Take papads, apply some water, place paneer pasanda onto the papad and seal the edges from all sides. ● Take a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place prepared papad rolls and fry them until golden brown. ● Transfer to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Roasting ● Roast the papad, crush it and transfer it to a tray. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Roasted Papad Roll ● Take prepared paneer pasanda and dip it into prepared slurry. ● In a tray, add crushed papad, add paneer pasanda and coat it well. ● Take a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place prepared papad rolls and fry them until golden brown. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Slurry ● In a bowl, add refined flour, salt to taste, water as required and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** #shahipaneer #paneerpatiala #papadpaneer #ranveerbrar #paneerrecipes #paneercurryrecipe #paneergravy

description: GOAN Spl ROS/ ROSS OMELETTE - My humble attempt to replicate my favourite Ros Omelette , that I tasted at a Goan street stall some years ago :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C
ingredients: 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता | 2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | ½ tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज | 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने | 4 no. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन | ⅓ cup fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता | 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 ¼ cups Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट | 1 ½ cups Water, पानी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी | 2 tsp Oil, तेल | 4 no. whole Eggs, अंडे | 3 no. Ladi pav, लादी पाव
instructions: ● In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cumin seeds and let it splutter. | ● Add coriander seeds, black peppercorns, black cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick and saute it for a minute until aromatic. | ● Add onions, salt to taste and cook for a while until translucent. | ● Add garlic, ginger, fresh coriander leaves, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder and saute it well. | ● Transfer it to a bowl and let it cool down at room temperature. | ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | ● In the same kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add prepared paste and cook it for a while until it leaves the sides of the pan. | ● Add water to adjust the consistency, salt to taste, sugar and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes on low flames. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. | ● Serve hot with prepared omelet, salad and ladi pav. | For Omelette | ● In a bowl, crack the whole eggs, add green chillies, tender coriander stems, salt to taste and give it a good mix. | ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, pour the egg mixture and cook it for 2-3 minutes on both the sides on medium flames. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedge. | ● Serve hot with prepared ross, salad and ladi pav. | ● In a bowl, add onion, tomatoes, green chili, tender coriander stems, fresh coriander leaves, oil, salt to taste, lemon juice and give it a good mix. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: GOAN Spl ROS/ ROSS OMELETTE - My humble attempt to replicate my favourite Ros Omelette , that I tasted at a Goan street stall some years ago :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Egg Curry - https://youtu.be/CbZxp8bwErM Ande ka Funda - https://youtu.be/XW8CyQbIdN4 *********************** GOAN Spl ROS/ ROSS OMELETTE Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Paste 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 4 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग ¼ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 3 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 3-4 no. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक ⅓ cup fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Ros 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 1 ¼ cups Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट 1 ½ cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी For Omelette 2 tsp Oil, तेल 4 no. whole Eggs, अंडे 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Salad 1 large Onion, roughly chopped, प्याज 2 medium Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर 1 Green chili (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता ½ tsp Oil, तेल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1-2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस Other Ingredients 2 no. Ladi pav, लादी पाव For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Process For Paste ● In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cumin seeds and let it splutter. ● Add coriander seeds, black peppercorns, black cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick and saute it for a minute until aromatic. ● Add onions, salt to taste and cook for a while until translucent. ● Add garlic, ginger, fresh coriander leaves, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder and saute it well. ● Transfer it to a bowl and let it cool down at room temperature. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Ros ● In the same kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add prepared paste and cook it for a while until it leaves the sides of the pan. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, salt to taste, sugar and let it simmer for 7-8 minutes on low flames. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with prepared omelet, salad and ladi pav. For Omelette ● In a bowl, crack the whole eggs, add green chillies, tender coriander stems, salt to taste and give it a good mix. ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, pour the egg mixture and cook it for 2-3 minutes on both the sides on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedge. ● Serve hot with prepared ross, salad and ladi pav. For Salad ● In a bowl, add onion, tomatoes, green chili, tender coriander stems, fresh coriander leaves, oil, salt to taste, lemon juice and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #RosOmelette #omeletterecipe #ranveervbrar #Goanomelettecurry #eggcurry #streetstyleomelette #masalaomelette

Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 1 no. Green chili, roughly torn, हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Curd Mixture 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 3 cups Water, पानी 2 ½ tbsp Gram flour, बेसन 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ cup water, पानी Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए 10-12 no. Cloves, लौंग Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Punjabi Chicken curry ¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 3 large Onions chopped, प्याज 2 no. Green Chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन 1 ½ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़ा टमाटर की प्यूरी 2 cups Water, पानी 4 tbsp Prepared Punjabi Garam Masala, तैयार किया हुआ पंजाबी गरम मसाला 2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Chicken Marination ● In a large bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, ginger Garlic paste, mustard oil and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Tomato Pappu Dal Tadka ● In a non-stick pan, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, curry leaves, dry fenugreek seeds, dry kashmiri red chillies, button chillies and saute it until aromatic. ● Add tomatoes, a pinch of asafoetida, salt to taste, fresh tomato puree, degi red chili powder and cook for 7-8 minutes until tomatoes get mushy. ● Add ginger, cooked dal, water and give it a quick boil. ● Switch off the flames and transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with fried button chillies and chili oil. ● Serve hot with steam rice. For Palak Dal Tadka ● In a non-stick pan, add oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, garlic, a pinch of asafoetida and saute it for a while or until garlic gets light golden brown in color. ● Add onion, salt to taste and cook until translucent. ● Add spinach, water and let it cook all together for 4-5 minutes on medium flames. ● Now, add cooked dal, water, green chili and let it simmer for a while. ● Switch off the flames and transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with roti or steam rice. For Gujarati Dal Tadka ● In a non-stick pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add a pinch of asafoetida, dry fenugreek seeds, small mustard seeds, clove and saute it until aromatic. ● Add curd and cook for 2-3 minutes. ● Add cooked dal, curd, salt to taste, green chili and let it boil for 4-5 minutes on medium flames. ● Switch off the flames and transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with a lemon slice with gently sprinkle some garam masala powder and chaat masala. ● Serve hot with phulka,roti or steam rice. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

ingredients: ¾ cup Milk powder | 8 tbsp Refined flour | 1 tsp Baking powder | A pinch of salt | 2 tbsp Ghee | 1 ½ cup Sugar | 2 cups Water | 1 no. green Cardamom pod, crushed (optional) | Prepared Gulab Jamun | ⅓ cup Nestlé MILKMAID
instructions: For Gulab Jamun | ● In a bowl, add milk powder, refined flour, baking powder, ghee, Nestlé MILKMAID and knead it into a soft dough. | ● Roll the dough and divide it into lemon size balls. | ● Transfer it to a tray, cover it with a muslin cloth and keep it aside for further use. | ● Heat oil in a kadai, drop the prepared balls and gently fry it until golden in color on medium flames. | ● Transfer it to the prepared sugar syrup and allow it to rest for 10-15 minutes. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with almond slivers, silver vark and fresh rose petals. | For Sugar Syrup | ● In a saucepan, add water, sugar, cardamom pods and cook it until reduced to half or until it thickens. | ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside to cool at room temperature. | For Baked Gulab Jamun | ● In a baking dish, add prepared gulab jamun, milkmaid and place it in the oven. | ● Bake it for 7-8 minutes at 180°c until golden in color. | ● Garnish it with silver var and rose petals. | ● Serve hot. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

For Sugar Syrup ● In a saucepan, add water, sugar, cardamom pods and cook it until reduced to half or until it thickens. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside to cool at room temperature. For Baked Gulab Jamun ● In a baking dish, add prepared gulab jamun, milkmaid and place it in the oven. ● Bake it for 7-8 minutes at 180°c until golden in color. ● Garnish it with silver var and rose petals. ● Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Green chili, roughly chopped, हरी मिर्च For Frying Bhindi 3-4 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 1 no. dry Red chili, roughly torn, सूखी लाल मिर्च 200 gms Ladyfinger (trim the head, tale & chopped) भिंडी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Raita 1 ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही Fried Bhindi, तली हुई भिंडी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Home Style Bhindi In an iron kadai, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add onion, potatoes and fry them for a while until golden in color. Let it cook for 10-12 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti and prepared raita. For Frying Bhindi In a non-stick pan, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add dry red chili, lady finger and saute it until golden brown. Add salt to taste, degi red chili powder and toss it for a minute. Keep it aside for further use. For Raita In a serving bowl, add curd, top it up with fried bhindi and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve with prepared chatpati bhindi aloo ki sabji and roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #aloobhindirecipe #bhindimasala #ranveervbrar #bhindimasalafry #bhindirecipeinhindi #bhindikisabji

Green chili (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 7-8 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने For Masala 2 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 5 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 1 heaped tbsp Dry fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी For Ginger Garlic Paste 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल 7-8 no. Garlic cloves,लहसुन For Onion Paste 2 no. medium Onions, roughly diced, प्याज For Lahori Chole 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 no. dry Red chili, सूखी लाल मिर्च ¼ tsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा Prepared Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Prepared onion paste, तैयार किया हुआ प्याज का पेस्ट 2 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताज़ा टमाटर की प्यूरी 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Cooked chole, पके हुए छोले Remaining cooked chole, mashed, बचे हुए पके हुए छोले 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी 2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 heaped tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला For Garnish Ghee, घी Tomato, wedge, टमाटर Green chili, slit into middle, हरी मिर्च Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Ginger, julienned, अदरक के लच्छे Lemon, wedge, नींबू की फांक Process For Cooking Chole ● In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add ginger, green chillies, garlic and saute it for a minute. ● Add chickpeas, salt to taste, ghee, water as required, black cardamom, black peppercorns and mix it well. ● Cover it with a lid and give it 3-4 whistles until cooked well on medium flames. ● Leave it aside for 8-10 minutes to depressurise the cooker. ● Divide the cooked chole into two separate bowls and keep it aside for further use. For Masala ● In a mixer grinder jar, add black peppercorns, black cardamom, dry fenugreek leaves and grind it into fine powder. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Paste ● In a mixer grinder jar, add green chillies, ginger, tender coriander stem, garlic and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Onion Paste ● In a mixer grinder jar, add onions and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Lahori Chole ● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add dry red chili, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, prepared ginger garlic paste and saute it for a minute. ● Add onion paste and cook it for 4-5 minutes until golden brown on medium flames. ● Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, fresh tomato puree, curd and cook it for a while until cooked well. ● Add salt to taste, cooked chole, remaining mashed cooked chole, sugar and let it simmer for a while until thick. ● Finish it with fresh coriander leaves, prepared masala and give it a quick boil. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with ghee, tomato wedge, green chili, coriander sprig, ginger julienned and lemon wedge. ● Serve hot with roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #cholerecipeinhindi #lahorichole #ranveerbrar #cholebhaturestreetfood #cholebhature #cholerecipe

Garlic cloves, sliced, लहसुन 1 medium Onion, chopped, प्याज 1 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ cups fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी 1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी ½ cup Sweet corn kernels, भुट्टे के दाने 1 medium Tomato, chopped, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन 2 cups Water, पानी 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 tsp dry Oregano, ओरिगैनो ½ tsp Chilli flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स 2 cups Penne pasta, पेने पास्ता For Garlic Butter 2-3 no. Garlic cloves, crushed, लहसुन 2-3 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Garlic Bread 6 no. Bread slice, ब्रेड स्लाइस 1 tbsp Garlic Butter, गार्लिक बटर A pinch of dry oregano, ओरिगैनो A pinch of chili flakes, चिली फ्लेक्स 3 no. Cheese slice, चीज़ For Toasting Bread 1 tsp Garlic butter, गार्लिक बटर ½ tsp Olive oil, ऑलिव ऑयल For Finishing Pasta ¼ cup Tomato ketchup, टोमॅटो केचप 2-4 tbsp Olive oil, ऑलिव ऑयल 2-3 no. Basil leaves, roughly torn, बेसिल की पत्तियां For Garnish Cheese, grated, चीज़ dry Oregano, ओरिगैनो Basil leaf, बेसिल की पत्तियां Process For Cooker Wala Pasta ● In a pressure cooker, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, garlic and saute it for a minute. ● Add onion, butter, salt to taste and saute it until translucent. ● Add fresh tomato puree and cook for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. ● Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder and saute it for a minute. ● Add sugar, sweet corn kernels, tomato, salt to taste, butter, water, tender coriander stems, oregano, chili flakes, penne pasta and mix it well. ● Cover it with a lid, cook it for a whistle and leave it aside to depressurize the cooker. ● Finish it with prepared tomato ketchup mixture and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with grated cheese, dry oregano and basil leaf. ● Serve hot with prepared garlic bread. For Garlic Butter ● In a mortar pestle, add garlic and crush it coarsely. ● Add butter and mix it well. ● Transfer it into a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Garlic Bread ● Take bread slices, apply prepared garlic butter on each side, sprinkle some dry oregano, chili flakes, place cheese slices and cover it with another bread slice. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Toasting Bread ● In a non-stick pan, add garlic butter, olive oil, once it's hot, place prepared garlic breads and toast them for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and serve hot with prepared pasta. For Finishing Pasta ● In a bowl, add tomato ketchup, olive oil, basil leaves and give it a good mix. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #tomatosaucepasta #pastarecipe #ranveerbrar #lunchboxrecipe #lunchboxideas #cookerwalapasta

For Tawa Fry ● In the same tawa, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated fish and cook it for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with prepared salad, lemon wedge, sprinkle some degi red chili powder and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot. For Banana Leaf Fry ● Take the banana leaf, place the marinated fish, wrap it from all sides and seal the edges. ● Place onto the tawa and fry it for 4-5 minutes on each side on medium flames until cooked well. ● Remove the banana leaf and transfer the fish onto a serving dish. ● Garnish it with prepared salad, lemon wedge, sprinkle some degi red chili powder and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #fishfry #bhetkipaturi #ranveerbrar #macherjholrecipe #rawafishfry #macchifry

Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च ¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Dahi Wali Chutney 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट For Moonglet 2 no. medium Carrots (peeled & grated) गाजर 4-5 no. Green chillies, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च ¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवायन 2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता Prepared batter, तैयार किया हुआ मिश्रण For Stuffing 2 no. Green chillies, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च 3-4 tbsp Processed cheese, grated, चीज़ 1 tbsp Prepared amchur chutney, तैयार की हुई आमचूर की चटनी 2-3 tbsp Paneer, grated, पनीर Other Ingredients 2 tsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन Process For Batter ● In a large bowl, add ginger, green chilies, garlic cloves, yellow moong dal, salt to taste and sugar. ● Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind it to a smooth paste. ● Keep aside for further use. For Amchur Mixture ● In a bowl, add water, dry mango powder and mix well. ● Keep aside for further use. For Amchur Chutney ● In a sauce pot, add oil, once it is hot, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter well. ● Add asafoetida, prepared amchur mixture, salt to taste, sugar and boil it well for a while until thickens. ● Serve it with a prepared moonglet. For Paste ● In a mortar pestle, add garlic cloves, ginger, green chillies, salt to taste, coriander leaves, salt to taste and grind it smoothly. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Dahi Wali Chutney ● In a bowl, add curd, add prepared paste and give it a good mix. ● Serve chilled with a prepared moonglet. For Moonglet ● In a bowl, add carrot, green chili, carom seeds, coriander leaves, prepared batter and mix it well. Keep it aside to rest for 20-25 minutes. ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add a ladleful of batter and cook it for 3-4 minutes until golden in color. ● Top it up with green chillies, processed cheese, prepared amchur chutney, paneer and cover it with a ladleful of batter. ● Flip it, add butter and cook it for 4-5 minutes until crispy and golden brown. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with dahi wali chutney and amchur chutney. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #moonglet #vegomeletterecipe #ranveerbrar #moongdalchillarecipe #moongletrecipe #streetfood

raw_text: DAL KHICHDI - After a long week sometimes all we need is some TLC and Dal Khichdi. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: 4 Types Masala Khichdi - https://youtu.be/5RZxRtqZ184 Lucknowi Masala Pulao - https://youtu.be/5AP5nBL5r2w *********************** DAL KHICHDI with KADDU SABJI Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Soaking Dal Rice 2 cups Yellow Moong dal, washed, मूंग की दाल 2 cups short Grain rice, चावल 2-3 cups Water, पानी For Pumpkin Sabji ½ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 8-9 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 1 ½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tsp Onion seeds, कलौंजी 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ¼ tsp dry Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 1 small Pumpkin, cut into large pieces, कद्दू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Water, पानी 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped, crushed) अदरक ¼ cup jaggery, roughly chopped, गुड़ ⅓ cup Tamarind paste, इमली का पेस्ट Little Water, पानी 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च For Dal Khichdi 2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी ½ tbsp Cumin seeds,जीरा Soaked Dal Chawal, भीगे हुए दाल चावल 6-7 cups Water, पानी ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Ghee, घी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Ghee, घी For Batter 1 ½ cups Gram flour, बेसन ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा 1 cup Water, पानी Other ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए 10-12 no. Pumpkin flowers, कद्दू के फूल 2-3 no. Papad, पापड़ For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Ghee, घी Roasted papad, पापड़ Green chili, हरी मिर्च Process For Soaking Dal Rice ● In a bowl, add yellow moong dal, short grain rice and rinse it well. ● Add water as required and keep it aside for 20-25 minutes. For Pumpkin Sabji ● In a handi, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add dry red chillies, cumin seeds, onion seeds, fennel seeds, dry fenugreek seeds and let it splutter well. ● Add pumpkin, salt to taste and cook it for a while until half cooked. ● Add degi red chili powder, a pinch of asafoetida, turmeric powder, water and mix it well. ● Add ginger, jaggery, tamarind paste and give it a good mix.. ● Cover it with a lid and let it cook for 20-25 minutes on medium flames. ● Finish it with a little water, green chillies and mix it gently. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with prepared dal khichdi, pumpkin fritters and roasted papad. For Dal Khichdi ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, soaked dal rice and saute it for a minute. ● Add water, turmeric powder, a pinch of asafoetida, a pinch of degi red chili powder, water, salt to taste, ghee and give it a good. ● Cover it with the lid and let it cook for 15-20 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. ● Finish it with salt to taste, ghee and give it a gentle mix. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with ghee, roasted papad and green chillies. ● Serve hot with prepared pumpkin sabji. For Batter ● In a bowl, add gram flour, ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder, rice flour, water and make a smooth batter. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Frying ● Take the pumpkin flowers, dip into the batter and drop in hot oil. ● Fry them for 4-5 minutes until it's golden brown and crispy ● Transfer it to a tray or absorbent paper and serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #dalkhichdi #khichuri_recipe #ranveerbrar #kumrofulerbora #kumroborabhaja

title: ये बटर चिकन बनाएं बाकी सब भूल जाएंगे | Butter Chicken | Tandoori Chicken bonus recipe | Chef Ranveer
description: BUTTER CHICKEN - I'm told this is one of the most searched recipes on the net! And not just Butter chicken, I'll show you how to make Tandoori chicken too. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C
ingredients: For 1 st Marination | 2 Whole Chicken, cut into half, चिकन | 2 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | For 2 nd Marination | 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | 1 ¼ cup Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही | 2 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tbsp Roasted gram flour, भुने चने का बेसन | 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च | 1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल | 2 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी | 2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता | 3 no. large Onions, roughly chopped, प्याज | 6 no. large Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर | 1 tbsp Oil, तेल | ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 2 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 cup Water, पानी | 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही | 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची | 2 cups Water, पानी | 10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू | 2 tbsp Ghee, घी | Prepared Gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी | 1 cup Water, पानी | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 2 tbsp Honey, शहद | 3-4 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | ¼ cup Fresh cream, ताजा मलाई | 2-3 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन | 1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी
instructions: For 1st Marination | ● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, lemon juice, ginger garlic paste and apply generously all over the chicken . | ● Keep it aside to marinate for 15-20 minutes. | For 2nd Marination | ● In a bowl, add mustard oil, hung curd, degi red chili powder, roasted gram flour, crushed black peppercorns, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, mustard oil and mix it well. | ● Add marinated chicken and marinate it well. | ● Keep it aside for further use, | ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, onions and saute it for a while until golden brown. | ● Add tomatoes, oil, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, salt to taste and saute it for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. | ● Add water, curd and cook it well for a while. | ● Add green cardamom, water, cashew nuts, let it cook for 10-12 minutes until mushy and cooked well. | ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | For Cooking Chicken | ● In a grill pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place marinated chicken and grill it for 5-6 minutes on each side until half cooked. | ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. | For Butter Chicken | ● In the same handi, add prepared gravy, water to adjust the consistency, salt to taste, honey, butter and give it a quick boil. | ● Add salt to taste, cooked chicken, fresh cream, butter and cook it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. | ● Finish it with fenugreek leaves and mix it well. | ● Place a small steel bowl in the middle, add burnt coal, butter, cover it with a lid and give it smoke for 2-3 minutes. | ● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves and coriander sprig. | ● Serve hot. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 3 no. large Onions, roughly chopped, प्याज 6 no. large Tomatoes, roughly chopped, टमाटर 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 cup Water, पानी 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2 cups Water, पानी 10-12 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू For Cooking Chicken 2 tbsp Ghee, घी Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन For Butter Chicken Prepared Gravy, तैयार की हुई ग्रेवी 1 cup Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Honey, शहद 3-4 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Cooked chicken, पका हुआ चिकन ¼ cup Fresh cream, ताजा मलाई 2-3 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन 1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी For Smoke Coal, कोयला Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Garnish Fresh cream, ताजा मलाई dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For 1st Marination ● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, lemon juice, ginger garlic paste and apply generously all over the chicken . ● Keep it aside to marinate for 15-20 minutes. For 2nd Marination ● In a bowl, add mustard oil, hung curd, degi red chili powder, roasted gram flour, crushed black peppercorns, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, mustard oil and mix it well. ● Add marinated chicken and marinate it well. ● Keep it aside for further use, For Gravy ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, onions and saute it for a while until golden brown. ● Add tomatoes, oil, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, salt to taste and saute it for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. ● Add water, curd and cook it well for a while. ● Add green cardamom, water, cashew nuts, let it cook for 10-12 minutes until mushy and cooked well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into a smooth paste. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Chicken ● In a grill pan, add ghee, once it's hot, place marinated chicken and grill it for 5-6 minutes on each side until half cooked. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Butter Chicken ● In the same handi, add prepared gravy, water to adjust the consistency, salt to taste, honey, butter and give it a quick boil. ● Add salt to taste, cooked chicken, fresh cream, butter and cook it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. ● Finish it with fenugreek leaves and mix it well. ● Place a small steel bowl in the middle, add burnt coal, butter, cover it with a lid and give it smoke for 2-3 minutes. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with fresh cream, dry fenugreek leaves and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #butterchicken #tandoorichicken #ranveerbrar #dhababutterchicken #chickenrecipe #chickencurry

description: CORN MANCHURIAN - It's Bhutta season! How can we not have a Corn recipe?? :) Here's my recipe for a perfect Corn Manchurian. What's more, I have shown techniques for both Manchurian Dry and Gravy styles. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C
ingredients: 4 cups Sweet corn kernels, भुट्टे के दाने | 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल | 2 no.
