Garlic cloves, finely chopped, लहसुन | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी | ¾ cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च | ¼ cup Refined flour, मैदा | 2-3 tbsp Rice flour, चावल का आटा | 1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर | 1 tsp Vinegar, सिरका | ½ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा | 2-3 tbsp Dark soy sauce, डार्क सोया सॉस | 2 tsp Vinegar, सिरका | 1 heaped tbsp Green chili sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस | 1 heaped tbsp Schezwan sauce, शेज़वान सॉस | 2-3 heaped tbsp Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप | 1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर | ⅓ cup Water, पानी | 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी | 2 tbsp Oil, तेल | 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक | 1 no. Garlic cloves, finely chopped, लहसुन | 2 no. Green chillies, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च | 2 medium Onions, chopped, प्याज | ¼ cup Boiled corn kernels, भुट्टे के दाने | Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार | Prepared sauce mix, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस मिश्रण | ⅓ cup Water, पानी | 2-3 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्नस्टार्च घोल | 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता | 2 tbsp Spring onion, finely chopped, हरी प्याज | Prepared corn manchurian balls, तैयार किए हुए कॉर्न मंचूरियन बॉल्स
instructions: For Corn Manchurian Balls | ● In a bowl, add sweet corn kernels, tender coriander stems, green chillies, ginger, salt to taste and sugar. | ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind into a smooth paste. | ● Transfer it to a bowl, add cornflour, refined flour, rice flour, black pepper powder, vinegar, baking soda and give it a good mix. | ● In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, drop a spoonful of mixture and fry it until golden brown on medium flames. | ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | For Manchurian Sauce Mix | ● In a medium bowl, add dark soy sauce, vinegar, green chili sauce, schezwan sauce, tomato sauce, black pepper powder, water, sugar and mix it well. | ● Keep aside for further use. | For Corn Manchurian Gravy | ● In a shallow pan, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, garlic, green chili and saute it for a minute. | ● Add onion and saute it on medium flame until translucent. | ● add sweet corn, salt to taste and saute it for 2-3 minutes. | ● Add prepared sauce mix and mix well. | ● Add water, cornstarch slurry and give it a quick boil until thickens. | ● Finish it with some coriander leaves, spring onions, fried corn manchurian balls and toss it well. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with spring onions and coriander sprig. | ● Serve hot with manchurian sauce. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Garlic cloves, finely chopped, लहसुन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी ¾ cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च ¼ cup Refined flour, मैदा 2-3 tbsp Rice flour, चावल का आटा 1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Vinegar, सिरका ½ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तलने के लिए तेल For Manchurian Sauce Mix 2-3 tbsp Dark soy sauce, डार्क सोया सॉस 2 tsp Vinegar, सिरका 1 heaped tbsp Green chili sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस 1 heaped tbsp Schezwan sauce, शेज़वान सॉस 2-3 heaped tbsp Tomato ketchup, टमाटर केचप 1 tsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर ⅓ cup Water, पानी 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी For Corn Manchurian Gravy 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 1 no. Garlic cloves, finely chopped, लहसुन 2 no. Green chillies, finely chopped, हरी मिर्च 2 medium Onions, chopped, प्याज ¼ cup Boiled corn kernels, भुट्टे के दाने Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Prepared sauce mix, तैयार किया हुआ सॉस मिश्रण ⅓ cup Water, पानी 2-3 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्नस्टार्च घोल 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 tbsp Spring onion, finely chopped, हरी प्याज Prepared corn manchurian balls, तैयार किए हुए कॉर्न मंचूरियन बॉल्स For Garnish Spring onion, finely chopped, हरी प्याज Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Corn Manchurian Balls ● In a bowl, add sweet corn kernels, tender coriander stems, green chillies, ginger, salt to taste and sugar. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind into a smooth paste. ● Transfer it to a bowl, add cornflour, refined flour, rice flour, black pepper powder, vinegar, baking soda and give it a good mix. ● In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, drop a spoonful of mixture and fry it until golden brown on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Manchurian Sauce Mix ● In a medium bowl, add dark soy sauce, vinegar, green chili sauce, schezwan sauce, tomato sauce, black pepper powder, water, sugar and mix it well. ● Keep aside for further use. For Corn Manchurian Gravy ● In a shallow pan, add oil, once it's hot, add ginger, garlic, green chili and saute it for a minute. ● Add onion and saute it on medium flame until translucent. ● add sweet corn, salt to taste and saute it for 2-3 minutes. ● Add prepared sauce mix and mix well. ● Add water, cornstarch slurry and give it a quick boil until thickens. ● Finish it with some coriander leaves, spring onions, fried corn manchurian balls and toss it well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with spring onions and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with manchurian sauce. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #CornManchurian #cornpakodarecipe #ranveerbrar #manchuriangravy #manchuriandry #sweetcornrecipes

Green chillies (spicy & slit into middle) हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Assembling Garlic chutney, लहसुन की चटनी Green chutney, हरी चटनी Butter, soften, मक्खन Potato mixture, तयार किया हुआ आलू का मिश्रण Besan ka chura, तले बेसन का चुरा Fried Green chillies, तली हुए हरी मिर्च Process For Garlic Green Chilli Paste ● In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, garlic cloves and grind it coarsely. ● Keep aside for further use. Find the Butcher's Twine in my Amazon Store. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Chicken Rogan Josh - https://bit.ly/ChickenRoganJoshbyRB Hyderabadi Chicken - https://bit.ly/HydChickenbyRB *********************** MURGH MUSALLAM Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 35-40 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For 1st Marination 1 medium whole Chicken without skin, चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Chicken Marination 2 tsp lemon juice, ½ cup Curd, beaten 1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Stuffing 1 cup Chicken mince ¼ cup Fried onions 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) ½ inch Ginger (peeled & chopped) 3-4 no. Almonds, chopped 3-4 no. Cashew Nuts, chopped 1 tsp Ginger Garlic paste ½ tsp Degi red chili powder Salt to taste, 1 tsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped For Searing and Simmering Chicken 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन 2 cups Water, पानी 1 ½ no. Mace, जावित्री 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग For Gravy 3 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 3 no. large Onions, finely chopped, प्याज 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Chicken broth, चिकन का यखनी For Murgh Mussallam 1 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी 1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी Prepared Gravy, तयार की हुई ग्रेवी 1 ½ cups Water, पानी 1 ½ tbsp Cashew Nuts paste, काजू का पेस्ट ½ tsp Kewra water, केवड़ा जल ½ tsp Rose water, गुलाब जल ½ tsp Mace & Cardamom powder, जावित्री और इलायची का पाउडर Cooked Chicken, पका हुआ चिकन Other ingredients Coal, कोयला Dough, गुंधा हुआ आटा For Garnish Silver vark, चांदी का वर्क Almonds, sliver, बादाम Boiled eggs, sliced, उबले हुए अंडे Tomato, wedges, टमाटर Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Coriander spring, धनिया पत्ता Saffron strands, केसर Process For Chicken Marination ● In a bowl, add lemon juice, curd, ginger garlic paste, degi red chili [powder, coriander powder, cumin powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste and give it a good mix. ● Add chicken and coat it well with marination. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Stuffing ● In a bowl, add chicken mince, fried onions, green chillies, ginger, almonds, cashew nuts, degi red chili powder, salt to taste, tender coriander stems and mix it well. ● Stuff the prepared stuffing in the marinated chicken and truss it with the thread. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Searing and Simmering Chicken ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and sear it from all sides until half cooked. ● Add water, mace, green cardamom, cloves and simmer it for a minute. ● Cover it with a lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes or until cooked well on low flames. ● Transfer it to a tray and leave it aside for further use. ● Strain the chicken broth and keep it aside for further use. For Gravy ● In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute it until golden brown. ● Add ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, curd and cook it for a while. ● Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and saute for a minute. ● Add chicken broth and cook it for 4-5 minutes. ● Strain the gravy and keep it aside for further use. For Murgh Mussallam ● In a handi, add ghee, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, prepared gravy and mix it well. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, add cashew nuts paste and let it cook for 7-8 minutes on low flames. ● Add kewra water, rose water, mace & cardamom powder and give it a good mix. ● Add the cooked chicken, seal the edges with dough, cover it with the lid, add burnt coal on the lid and cook it for 7-8 minutes on low flames. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with silver vark, almonds, boiled eggs, tomato, minty sprig, coriander sprig and saffron strands. ● Serve hot with roti or naan. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #murgmusallam #stuffedchicken #ranveerbrar #chickenrecipe #मुर्गमुसल्लम

Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 3 large Onions, chopped, प्याज 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 6-7 no. large Potatoes (peeled & cut into half) आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये का डंठल 1 ½ tbsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च 2 cups Curd, beaten, दही 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी Prepared Masala Mixture, तैयार किया हुआ मसाले का मिश्रण For Masala 1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 5-6 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 2 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 5-6 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी For Masala Mixture 2 heaped tbsp Prepared masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला ¼ cup Refined flour slurry, मैदे का घोल ½ cup Water, पानी 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च Process For Dum Aloo Kali Mirch ● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, cinnamon stick, bay leaf, onions, ghee and saute it for a while. ● Add ginger garlic paste and saute for a minute. ● Add potatoes, salt to taste, tender coriander stems, black peppercorns and cook it until potatoes are half cooked. ● Add curd, cover it with the lid and let it cook for 10-12 minutes until cooked well. ● Finish it with sugar, prepared masala mixture and cook for 2-3 minutes on low flames. ● Transfer it to a serving dish or bowl, garnish it with coriander sprig and crushed black peppercorns. ● Serve hot with paratha or roti. For Masala ● In a pan, add cumin seeds, fennel seeds, cloves, coriander seeds, black peppercorns, black cardamom, salt to taste and dry roast for 2-3 minutes until aromatic. ● Add dry fenugreek leaves and roast it for a minute. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind into fine powder. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Masala mixture ● In a bowl, add prepared masala, refined flour slurry, water, fresh coriander leaves and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #dumaloo #alookalimirch #ranveerbrar #aloodumrecipe #kalimirchaloo #aloosabji

Garlic cloves, लहसुन ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Tomato Chutney 2 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ¼ tsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी ¼ tsp dry Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना ¼ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 6 no. small Tomatoes, roughly diced, टमाटर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ cup Jaggery, गुड़ 1 cup Water, पानी ½ cup raw Mango (peeled & chopped) कच्चा आम For Prawns Curry 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल Prepared Paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट Little water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 cups Water, पानी ⅓ cup Tender coconut, roughly diced, नारियल की मलाई ½ cup raw Mango (peeled & roughly diced) कच्चा आम ½ cup Water, पानी 1 ½ cups Coconut milk, नारियल का दूध Marinated Prawns, मैरीनेटेड झींगे 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & slit into middle) हरी मिर्च 1 no. Green chili, slit into middle, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्नस्टार्च घोल For Prawns Marination 500 gms Prawns (clean & deveined) झींगे Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Garnish Tender coconut, julienned, नारियल की मलाई Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Paste ● On a mortar pestle, add onions, green chili, ginger, garlic, cumin seeds, coriander seeds and grind it coarsely. ● Transfer it to a tray, add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Tomato Chutney ● In a saucepan, add oil, once it's hot, add cinnamon stick, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, nigella seeds, dry fenugreek seeds, small mustard seeds and let it splutter. ● Add ginger, tomatoes, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, jaggery, water and simmer it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames. ● Add raw mango and cook it for a while until mushy. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl, serve hot with prepared prawns curry and steam rice. For Prawns Curry ● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add prepared paste, salt to taste and cook it well for a while. ● Add water, tender coconut, raw mango and let it cook for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, coconut milk, marinated prawns, green chillies and give it a quick boil. ● Add cornstarch slurry and simmer it for a minute. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with tender coconut and coriander sprig. ● Serve hot with steam rice and prepared tomato chutney. For Prawns Marination ● In a bowl or tray, add cleaned prawns, salt to taste, lemon juice and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #prawnmasala #prawncurry #ranveerbrar #prawnrecipe #prawncleaning #shrimp #jheenga #seafoodrecipes

ingredients: ⅓ cup Oil, तेल | 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी | 3 no. large Onions, finely chopped, प्याज | 1 ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट | ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर | 1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | 2-3 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर | 10-12 no. raw_text: PANEER KORMA - For all of you who never get tired of Paneer recipes..or stop binging on Fried Paneer, here's an irresistible recipe :) 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Paneer Bhuna Masala - https://youtu.be/5mMwSPlovr8 Chutney wala Paneer - https://youtu.be/SUDW5m1rjQk *********************** PANEER KORMA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Paneer Korma ⅓ cup Oil, तेल 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी 3 no. large Onions, finely chopped, प्याज 1 ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2-3 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 10-12 no. Cashew nuts, काजू 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 ½ cups Water, पानी ½ cup Water, पानी 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी ½ tbsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर ½ tsp Kewra water, केवड़ा जल ½ tsp Rose water, गुलाब जल For Frying Paneer ¼ cup Oil, तेल 800 gms Paneer, medium cubed, पनीर For Masala 12-15 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 7-8 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 10-12 no. Cloves, लौंग 2 no. Mace, जावित्री For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Fried Cashew Nut, तले हुए काजू Fried Foxnut, तले हुए मखाने Process For Paneer Korma ● In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add onions and saute it for 7-8 minutes until golden brown. ● Add ginger garlic paste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and cook it well. ● Add cashew nuts, curd, salt to taste and cook for a while until oil releases from the sides of the handi. ● Grind it to a smooth fine paste with the help of a hand blender. ● Transfer it to the same handi, add water and simmer it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames. ● Add water to adjust the consistency, sugar, prepared masala, tender coriander stems, fried paneer and cook it for a while. ● Finish it with some kewra water, rose water and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish or bowl, garnish it with coriander sprig, fried cashew nuts and fried fox nuts. ● Serve hot with roti or paratha. For Frying ● In a non-stick pan, add oil, once it's hot, add paneer and shallow fry it for 2-3 minutes from all sides until golden in color. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Masala ● In a tray, add green cardamom, black cardamom, cloves and mace. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind into a fine powder. ● Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #paneerrecipe #paneerkorma #ranveerbrar #paneercurryrecipe #paneergravy #matarpaneer #shahipaneer

Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 3 medium Tomatoes, finely chopped, टमाटर 2-3 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ cup Water, पानी For Dry Masala 3 heaped tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 3 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tbsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर For Sauteing Green Peas ⅓ cup fresh Green peas, ताजी हरी मटर 1 tbsp Ghee,घी ¼ cup Water, पानी For Sauteing Chicken 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन For Chicken Tawa Pulao 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन 1 large Green capsicum, roughly chopped, हरी शिमला मिर्च 1 large Red bell pepper, roughly chopped, लाल शिमला मिर्च 4 cups Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल Sauteed Green peas, भूने हुए हरे मटर Prepared tawa masala, तयार किया हुआ तवा मसाला Sauteed chicken, भुना हुआ चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Little water, पानी ½ tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन ½ cup Spring onion, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज 3-4 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Garam masala, optional, गरम मसाला For Garnish Tomato, sliced, टमाटर Cucumber, sliced, ककड़ी Onions, sliced, प्याज Cabbage, shredded, पत्ता गोभी Boiled eggs, sliced, उबले अंडे Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Green chillies, slit into half, हरी मिर्च Ginger, julienned, अदरक Butter, cubed, मक्खन Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Chicken Marination ● In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, oil, lemon juice, ginger, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder and marinate it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. Garlic cloves, grated, लहसुन 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Pickle oil, अचार का तेल For Aam Ka Achaar 7-8 no. Raw mangoes, cut into diced, कच्चे आम Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 heaped tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Asafoetida, हींग 1 tsp Split Yellow mustard seeds, पीली सरसों के बीज 1 ⅓ cups Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ½ tsp dry Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना ½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tbsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ½ tbsp Nigella seeds, कलौंजी 1 cup Vinegar, सिरका 1 cup Jaggery, गुड़ 4-5 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च For Dal Paratha Prepared Paratha, तयार किया हुआ पराठा 1 tsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Pickle oil, अचार का तेल Other Ingredients Ghee (for greasing) घी Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Garnish Butter, cubed, मक्खन 0nion, cut into quarters, प्याज Green chillies, हरी मिर्च Curd, दही Prepared mango pickle, तयार किया हुआ आम का अचार Process For Dough ● In a parat, add leftover dal, whole wheat flour and knead it well. ● Add ginger, garlic, fresh coriander leaves, pickle oil and knead it until soft. ● Cover it with a muslin cloth and keep it aside to rest for a while. For Aam Ka Achaar ● In a parat, add raw mango, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, asafoetida, split mustard seeds and give it a good mix. ● In a kadai, add mustard oil, once it's smoky hot, add fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds,mustard seeds, nigella seeds and let it splutter for a minute. ● Add vinegar, jaggery, kashmiri red chillies, marinated raw mangoes and mix it well. ● Cover it with a lid and cook it for a while until soft. ● Transfer it to an airtight container and store it well. ● Serve it with prepared dal paratha. For Dal Paratha ● Take a lemon size ball and flatten it well. Add pickle oil and close it again. ● Roll it in any desired shape and keep it aside for further use. ● In a tawa, add oil, once it's hot, add paratha and cook it well from both the sides until golden brown. ● Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with butter. ● Serve hot with onion, green chillies, curd and prepared pickle. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #aamkaacharrecipe #paratharecipe #ranveerbrar #dalparatharecipe #parathaachaar #acharrecipe #aamkamurabba #aamkilaunji

raw_text: KOREAN CHICKEN BURGER - Binge on K-series and K-pop this weekend with this perfect K-burger 😋 *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Korean Chicken - https://youtu.be/HuaPY7w6xLU Veg Korean Fried Rice - https://youtu.be/pr-uZxNkjYk *********************** KOREAN CHICKEN BURGER Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Chicken Marination 2 cups Buttermilk, छाछ Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 kg Chicken thighs (boneless) चिकन For Instant BBQ sauce 15-20 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies (desed & soaked) सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च 8-9 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 1 inch Ginger (peeled) अदरक 1 ½ tbsp Sugar, चीनी ¼ cup Dark soy sauce, सोया सॉस 3 tbsp Red chili sauce, रेड चिली सॉस ¼ cup Vinegar, सिरका ¼ cup Tender coriander stems (with roots & roughly torn) धनिये के डंठल और जड़ें For White Kimchi 1 small Cabbage, cut into diagonally, पत्तागोभी 1 medium Cucumber, sliced, ककड़ी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp Sugar, चीनी 3-4 no. Garlic cloves, grated, लहसुन 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 heaped tbsp Vinegar, सिरका ¼ cup Spring onion, chopped, प्याज़ पत्ता For Purple Kimchi 1 small Purple cabbage, cut into diagonally, पर्पल कैबेज 1 no. large Onion, roughly sliced, प्याज 2 heaped tbsp Vinegar, सिरका Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 inch Ginger (peeled & grated) अदरक 2-3 tbsp Sugar, चीनी 2 tsp Chilli flakes, चिल्ली फलैक्स 1 ½ tbsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल For Korean Sauce 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल ⅓ cup Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप Prepared instant bbq sauce, तयार किया हुआ बारबेक्यू सॉस 2 cups Water, पानी For Dry Coating ¼ cup Rice flour, चावल का आटा ½ cup Refined flour, मैदा ½ cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च 1 tbsp Onion powder, अनियन पाउडर 1 tbsp Garlic powder, गार्लिक पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Assembling Burger buns, बर्गर बन्स Mayonnaise, मेयोनेज़ White kimchi, सफ़ेद किमची Purple kimchi, पर्पल किमची Prepared sauce, तयार किया हुआ सॉस Fried chicken, तला हुआ चिकन Cheese slice, optional, चीज़ Purple kimchi, पर्पल किमची Prepared sauce, तयार किया हुआ सॉस Process For Chicken Marination ● In a bowl, add buttermilk, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, chicken and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Instant Bbq Sauce ● In a bowl, add soaked dry kashmiri red chillies, garlic, ginger, sugar, dark soy sauce, red chili sauce, vinegar, tender coriander stems and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. ● Keep it aside for further use. For White Kimchi ● In a bowl, add cabbage, cucumber, salt to taste, sugar, garlic, green chillies, vinegar and give it a good mix. Leave it aside for further use. ● Squeeze out the water from the kimchi and transfer it to the bowl. ● Add spring onion and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Purple Kimchi ● In a bowl, add purple cabbage, onion, vinegar, salt to taste, ginger, sugar and give it a good mix. Leave it aside for further use. ● Squeeze out the water from the kimchi and transfer it to the bowl. ● Add chili flakes, white sesame seeds and mix it well. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Korean Sauce ● In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add white sesame seeds and saute it for a minute. ● Add tomato ketchup, prepared instant bbq sauce, water and give it a good mix. ● Simmer it well for 20-25 minutes on low flames. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Dry Coating ● In a plastic container, add rice flour, refined flour, cornstarch, onion powder, garlic powder, salt to taste and give it a good mix. ● Add marinated chicken and coat it well on all sides. ● Transfer it to a tray and Keep it aside for further use. For Frying ● In a non-stick kadai, add oil, once it's hot, place the strainer, add chicken and fry it until half cooked. ● Refry the chicken in hot oil and cook for 1-2 minutes on high flame until golden brown. ● Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Assembling ● Coat the chicken with prepared sauce with the use of a brush or spoon. ● Take burger buns, cut into half, apply mayonnaise, place white kimchi, purple kimchi, coated chicken, cheese slice, purple kimchi, pour some prepared sauce and cover it with another slice of the bun. ● Serve hot with prepared sauce and fries. *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickenrecipe #kimchi #ranveerbrar #koreanchicken

Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च ¼ cup fresh Green peas, हरी मटर Prepared Batter, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण For Tadka Idli 1 tsp Ghee, घी 1 ½ tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Chana dal, चना दाल 1 tsp White urad dal, उड़द दाल ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 3-4 no. Dry red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 2-3 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ता A pinch of turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Prepared Batter, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण Prepared Tadka, तयार किया हुआ तड़का For Kaju Idli Prepared Batter, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण 9-10 no. Cashew nuts, half, काजू For Thatte Idli Prepared Batter, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण For Garnish 1 tsp Ghee, घी A pinch of Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of Malgapodi, मालगापोडी For IDli Upma 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ¼ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 no. Dry red chillies, broken into half, सूखी लाल मिर्च ¼ tsp White urad dal (optional) उड़द दाल A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 sprig Curry leaves, कड़ी पत्ता Cooked IDli, पकी हुई इडली 3-4 tbsp Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही For Garnish 1 tsp Ghee, घी Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Other Ingredients Oil for greasing, तेल Banana leaf, केले का पत्ता Process For Rava Idli Batter In a bowl, add semolina, poha, salt to taste, sugar, curd, ghee, water, oil and mix it well. Keep it aside to rest for 10-15 minutes. Add water to adjust the consistency, add baking soda, oil and give it a gentle mix. Keep it aside for further use. For Vegetable Idli In a bowl, add carrot, ginger, green chillies, green peas, prepared batter and give it a good mix. Grease the idli mold, pour a ladleful of batter in a mold and steam for 8-10 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. Turn off the flames and leave it aside to cool down at temperature. Demold the idli, transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with coconut chutney. For Tadka Idli In a pan, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, chana dal, urad dal, small mustard seeds, cumin seeds and saute them for a minute. Add a pinch of asafoetida, dry red chillies, curry leaves, turmeric powder and saute it well. Transfer it to a bowl, add prepared batter and give it a good mix. Grease the idli mold, pour a ladleful of batter into the mold and steam for 8-10 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. Turn off the flames and leave it aside to cool down at temperature. Demold the idli, transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with coconut chutney. For Kaju Idli Grease the idli mold, pour a ladleful of batter and place a cashew nut on it. Steam for 8-10 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. Turn off the flames and leave it aside to cool down at temperature. Demold the idli, transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with coconut chutney. For Thatte Idli Place a banana leaf on a steel plate and grease it with some oil. Pour a ladleful of batter and steam for 8-10 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. Turn off the flames and leave it aside to cool down at temperature. Demold the idli, transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with some ghee, sprinkle a pinch of degi red chili powder, malgapodi and coconut chutney. For Upma Idli In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, cumin seeds, dry red chillies, white urad dal, a pinch of asafoetida, ginger, green chillies, curry leaves and saute for a minute. Add remaining idli, water, salt to taste, sugar, curd and cook it for 4-5 minutes on high flames until cooked mushy. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot. #ravaidli #soojiidli #ranveerbrar #rawaidli #idlirecipe

instructions: For Ginger Garlic Paste | ● In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, green chillies, salt to taste and grind it coarsely. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | For Chicken Marination | ● In a bowl, add prepared ginger garlic paste, chicken thighs, degi red chili powder, oil and marinate it well. | ● Keep it aside for 10-15 minutes. | ● In a pan, add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds, black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, mace, salt to taste and roast them for a while until aromatic. | ● Transfer it to a tray, add dry fenugreek leaves, cinnamon stick and mix it well. | ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. | ● Keep it aside for further use. | For Sauteing Chicken | ● On a cast iron tawa or pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and saute it for a while until half cooked on medium to high flame. | ● Transfer it into the dish or tray and keep it aside for further use. | For Tawa Chicken | ● On the same tawa, add remaining excess oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, onions and cook for 4-5 minutes until translucent. | ● Add turmeric powder, coriander powder, degi red chili powder and cook it for a minute. | ● Add tomatoes, water and cook it for 2-3 minutes until soft. | ● Add butter, tender coriander stems, sauteed chicken and cook it well for 7-8 minutes. | ● Finish it with some prepared masala, coriander leaves, green chillies and mix it well. | ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fried cashew nuts, lemon wedge, coriander sprig and ginger. | ● Serve hot with ladi pav. | *********************** | For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: | 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid | 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS | *********************** | 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: | ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com | ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ | ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ | ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar
raw_text: TAWA CHICKEN MASALA - From the lanes of Mohammad Ali road in aamchi Mumbai, comes this popular dish - Tawa/ Tava Chicken Masala *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/44Wmo3C 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Paneer Bhuna Masala - https://youtu.be/5mMwSPlovr8 Tawa Pulao - https://youtu.be/c0BeFR-wMi4 *********************** TAWA CHICKEN MASALA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Ginger Garlic Paste 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 8-10 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Chicken Marination Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 kg Chicken thighs (boneless & cut into strips) चिकन 2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tbsp Oil, तेल For Masala ½ tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 1 tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना 1 ½ tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग 3 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2 no. Mace, जावित्री Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी For Sauteing Chicken 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन For Tawa Chicken Remaining excess oil, बचा हुआ तेल 2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 3 no. large Onions, chopped, प्याज ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 3 no. large Tomatoes, chopped, टमाटर ¼ cup Water, पानी 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Sauteed Chicken, भुना हुआ चिकन 2 tbsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला 2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च For Garnish Fried Cashew Nuts, तले हुए काजू Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Ginger, julienned, अदरक Process For Ginger Garlic Paste ● In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic, green chillies, salt to taste and grind it coarsely. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Marination ● In a bowl, add prepared ginger garlic paste, chicken thighs, degi red chili powder, oil and marinate it well. ● Keep it aside for 10-15 minutes. For Masala ● In a pan, add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds, black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, mace, salt to taste and roast them for a while until aromatic. ● Transfer it to a tray, add dry fenugreek leaves, cinnamon stick and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Sauteing Chicken ● On a cast iron tawa or pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and saute it for a while until half cooked on medium to high flame. ● Transfer it into the dish or tray and keep it aside for further use. For Tawa Chicken ● On the same tawa, add remaining excess oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, onions and cook for 4-5 minutes until translucent. ● Add turmeric powder, coriander powder, degi red chili powder and cook it for a minute. ● Add tomatoes, water and cook it for 2-3 minutes until soft. ● Add butter, tender coriander stems, sauteed chicken and cook it well for 7-8 minutes. ● Finish it with some prepared masala, coriander leaves, green chillies and mix it well. ● Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fried cashew nuts, lemon wedge, coriander sprig and ginger. ● Serve hot with ladi pav. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #tawachicken #tavamasala #ranveerbrar #mumbaitawachicken #tawapulaorecipe #chickenmasala #chickenrecipe

raw_text: GHUGNI CHAAT RECIPE - Sookhe Matar/ dried Peas/ Safed Vatana transform into this beautiful, nutritious chaat. 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use -https://amzn.to/4dlmoOc 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Muradabadi Chaat - https://youtu.be/lzb7zT3EbUA Sabudana Tikki Chaat - https://youtu.be/pcbXCRWHo_c *********************** GHUGNI CHAAT Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Boiling White Peas 500 gms White Peas (soaked overnight) सफेद वटाना Water as required, पानी 1 large Onion, sliced, प्याज 2 large Potatoes, peeled, आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Water as required, पानी 1 cup Water, पानी For Ginger Garlic Paste 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 4-5 no. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 1 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Bhaja Masala Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ cup Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 1 tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 5-6 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची For Frying Coconut 2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल ½ tbsp Ghee, घी ¼ cup fresh Coconut, bits, ताजा नारियल For Ghugni Remaining Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 2 large Onions, sliced, प्याज 2 medium Potatoes (peeled & small Diced) आलू Prepared Ginger Garlic Paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 medium Tomato, diced, टमाटर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 ½ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर Boiled vatana, उबला हुआ वटाना Boiled Potato, उबले हुए आलू ½ cup Water, पानी 1 cup Water, पानी For Garnish ¼ cup Raw Mango (peeled & chopped) कच्चा आम 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च Nylon sev, सेव Fried Coconut, तला हुआ नारियल Bhaja Masala, भाजा मसाला ½ medium Onion, chopped, प्याज Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Boiling White Peas ● In a large pot, add white peas, water as required and get it to a roaring boil. ● Add onions, potato, salt to taste, turmeric powder, cover it with the lid and cook for 20-25 or until soft. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Ginger Garlic Paste ● In a mortar pestle, add ginger, garlic cloves, green chili, salt to taste and grind it coarsely. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Bhaja Masala ● In a pan, add salt to taste, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, green cardamom and dry roast on medium flame for 4-5 minutes. ● Transfer it to a grinder jar and grind into fine powder. For Frying Coconut ● In a handi, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add fresh coconut bits and fry until golden brown. ● Transfer it to a plate or tray and keep it aside for further use. For Ghugni ● In a handi, add remaining mustard oil, once it's hot, add onions, potatoes and fry until golden brown. ● Add ginger garlic paste, tomato and saute it for a minute. ● Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder and saute for a while. ● Add boiled vatana, boiled potato, water, cover it with the lid and cook for 7-8 minutes on medium flames. ● Add water to adjust the consistency and give it a quick boil. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish. ● Garnish it with raw mango, green chili, nylon sev, fried coconut, bhaja masala, onion, lemon wedge, coriander sprig. ● Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #ghugnirecipe #ঘুগনি #ragdarecipe #ranveerbrar #safedvatana #ghugnichaat #streetfood #chaatrecipe

For Mutton Curry ● In a handi, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add dry red chillies, fennel seeds, cumin seeds, prepared ginger garlic paste and saute for a minute. ● Add mutton with bones, onions, salt to taste and saute it for 10-15 minutes on medium flames. ● Add curd, degi red chili powder, coriander powder and cook it well for a while. ● Add salt to taste, tender coriander stems, water as required and cover it with the lid. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 ½ tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज ½ tbsp White sesame seeds, सफेद तिल 4 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 5-6 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 1 tsp Stone flower, पत्थर का फूल 6-7 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 5-6 no. Cloves, लौंग ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही For Chicken Marination 1 kg Chicken with leg, चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट For Hyderabadi Chicken Masala Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन ¼ cup fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता 2 no. Green chillies, slit into half, हरी मिर्च 2-3 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Prepared Paste, तयार की हुई पेस्ट 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon sliced, नींबू Onion, rings, प्याज के लच्छे Process For Paste ● In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add garlic, ginger, cumin seeds, coriander seeds, white sesame seeds and saute it for a minute. ● Add onions, salt to taste and saute it until golden brown. ● Add black cardamom, stone flower, green cardamom, cloves, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, curd and cook it for a while. ● Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Marination ● In a bowl, add chicken leg, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, curd, ginger garlic paste and mix it well. ● Keep it aside to marinate for 10-15 minutes. For Hyderabadi Chicken Masala ● In the same handi, add marinated chicken, fresh mint leaves, green chillies, cover it with the lid and cook for 7-8 minutes. ● Add water, salt to taste and give it a quick boil. ● Add prepared paste, tender coriander stems and cook for 10-12 minutes on medium flames. ● Transfer it to a serving dish or bowl, garnish it with coriander sprig, lemon sliced and onion rings. ● Serve hot with roti or naan. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickencurry #hyderabadichickenmasala #ranveerbrar #chickenmasala #chickenlababdar #chickenrecipe

Agar ye nahin khaya to kya kiya :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Mango Kulfi & Falooda - https://youtu.be/J1dJITMfei8 Mango Custard - https://youtu.be/2nSvGN5LH6k *********************** MANGO SHRIKHAND with POORI Preparation time 15-20 minutes Cooking time 10-15 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Mango Pulp 3 no. Mangoes (peeled & roughly chopped) आम ½ cup Sugar, चीनी 1 ½ tbsp Water, पानी For Mango Shrikhand 600 gms Hung curd, टंगा हुआ दही Prepared Mango Pulp, तयार किया हुआ आम का रस For Dough 1 cup Whole wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Semolina, सूजी A pinch of Powder sugar, चीनी 1 tsp Ghee, घी Chilled Water as required, पानी Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Garnish A pinch of cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर Mangoes, small cubes, आम Pistachios (blanched & sliver) पिस्ता Almonds, sliver, बादाम fresh Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Mango Pulp ● In a pan, add mangoes, sugar, water and cook for 5-6 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. ● Turn off the flames and grind it smoothly with the help of a hand blender. ● Cook it for 2-3 minutes on low to medium flames until thickens. ● Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside in the refrigerator to chill for 30-35 minutes. ● Keep it aside for further use. For Mango Shrikhand ● In a bowl, add hung curd and whisk it well until smooth. ● Add prepared mango pulp and give it a good mix. ● Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with a pinch of cardamom powder, mangoes, pistachios, almonds and fresh mint sprig. ● Serve chilled. For Dough ● In a parat, add wheat flour, salt to taste, semolina, a pinch of powdered sugar, ghee and mix it well. ● Add chilled water and knead it into a semi soft dough, cover it with the muslin cloth and keep it aside for further use. ● Take a small lemon size ball and roll it. ● Heat oil in a kadai, once it’s medium hot, add prepared puri and fry until golden in color. ● Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use.. ● Serve hot with prepared mango shrikhand. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Here's another of your favourite and much requested recipe :) *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Mango Kulfi & Falooda - https://youtu.be/J1dJITMfei8 Mango Kalakand - https://youtu.be/-WUwguUE_3g *********************** MANGO CUSTARD & TRIFLE PUDDING Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Mango Custard 1 liter Milk, दूध 100 gms Sugar, चीनी Prepared Slurry, तयार किया हुआ मिश्रण 1 tsp Saffron color, केसर का रंग 1 cup Mango, diced, आम For Slurry 3 ½ tbsp Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च 1 ½ tsp Rice flour, चावल का आटा ¼ cup Water, पानी ⅓ cup Warm milk, गरम दूध For Pancake Batter 1 ½ cups Refined flour, मैदा 1 tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा ¾ cup Water, पानी 1 tsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Beetroot color, चुकंदर का रंग ½ tsp Vinegar, सिरका Other Ingredients 1 tsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Sugar, चीनी For Assembling Mango, diced, आम Prepared pancake, cut into diced, तयार किया हुआ पैनकेक ½ tsp Granulated sugar, चीनी Digestive biscuits, crumb, बिस्कुट का चूरा Prepared Custard, तयार किया हुआ कस्टर्ड For Garnish Whipped cream, व्हीप्ड क्रीम Pomegranate pearls, अनार दाना Mango, diced, आम Digestive biscuits, crumb, बिस्कुट का चूरा Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Mango Custard In a saucepot, add milk and give it a quick boil. Add sugar and simmer it for 2-3 minutes until sugar is dissolved. Gently add prepared slurry and whisk it well on low flame until lumps free mixture. Add saffron color and mix it well. Turn off the flames, add mango and blend it with the help of a hand blender. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside to chill in the refrigerator for 1-2 hours. For Slurry In a bowl, add cornstarch, rice flour, milk and mix it well. Add warm milk and give it a good mix. Keep it aside for further use. For Pancake Batter In a bowl, add refined flour, baking soda, water and make a lump free batter. Add ghee, beetroot color, vinegar and whisk it well. Keep it aside to rest for 5-6 minutes. In a nonstick pan, add ghee, once it's hot, pour a ladle full of batter, cook it well from both the sides. Sprinkle sugar and cook until it's caramelized. Transfer it to a plate, dice the pancakes and keep it aside for further use. For Assembling In a serving glass, add mango, prepared pancake, granulated sugar, digestive crumb, prepared custard and layer it properly. Garnish it with whipped cream, pomegranate pearls, mango, digestive biscuits and mint sprig. Serve chilled. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #mangocustardrecipe #mangophirnirecipe #ranveerbrar #mangorecipe #mangopudding #mangotrifle #egglesscustard #triflepudding

Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 3-4 no. Cloves, लौंग 5 no. large Onions, roughly sliced, प्याज 1 ½ kg Mutton with bones, मटन 2 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 2 heaped tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tbsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 3-4 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 2 cups Curd, beaten, दही 3-4 cups Water, पानी 1 tbsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Masala 2 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2-4 Cloves, लौंग 3 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 1 no. Mace, जावित्री 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 12-15 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 1 tsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवायन For Garnish 1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienne) अदरक 2 no. Add mutton with bones and saute for a while until onions are cooked well. Add coriander powder, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder and cook it for a while. For Masala In a pan, add black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, mace, cumin seeds, green cardamom, fennel seeds, coriander seeds, salt to taste and roast them for a while until it's aromatic. French beans, cut into diagonally, फ्रेंच बीन्स 1 large Yellow bell pepper, cut into julienne, पीली शिमला मिर्च 1 large Green capsicum, cut into julienne, हरी शिमला मिर्च 2-3 tbsp Prepared Chow Mein Sauce, तयार किया हुआ चाउमीन मिक्स Boiled Noodles, उबले हुए नूडल्स 2 heaped tbsp Prepared Chow Mein Mix, तयार किया हुआ चाउमीन मिक्स ¼ cup Spring onion bulbs, cut into diagonally, हरी प्याज For Garnish Spring onion, हरी प्याज For Egg Chowmein (type 1) Prepared egg omelet, cut into strips, तयार किया हुआ अंडे का ऑमलेट Prepared veg chow mein, तयार किया हुआ वेज चाउमीन For Garnish Spring onion, हरी प्याज For Egg Chow mein (type 2) 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ medium Onion, sliced, प्याज 2 tbsp Prepared Chow Mein Mix, तयार किया हुआ चाउमीन मिक्स 2-3 tbsp Water, पानी Prepared egg omelet, cut into strips, तयार किया हुआ अंडे का ऑमलेट few Spring onion, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज Prepared veg chow mein, तयार किया हुआ वेज चाउमीन For Garnish Spring onion, हरी प्याज Process For Boiling Noodles In a sauce pot, add water, salt to taste, oil and get it to roaring boiled. Keep it aside for further use. For Chow mein Sauce In a bowl, add ginger, tender coriander stems, schezwan sauce, green chili sauce, tomato ketchup, dark soy sauce, vinegar, red chili sauce, oil and give it a good mix. Transfer it to an airtight container and keep it aside for further use. For Egg Mixture In a bowl, add eggs, salt to taste, water, oil and whisk it well. Cut it into thin strips and keep it aside for further use. For Veg Chowmein In a wok, add oil, once it's smoky hot, add onions, carrots and toss it for a minute. Add cabbage, salt to taste, french beans, yellow bell pepper, green capsicum and toss it well on high flames. Add prepared chow mein sauce, boiled noodles and mix it gently. Finish it with prepared chow mein sauce, spring onion bulbs and toss it for a minute. Transfer it to a serving bowl and garnish it with spring onion. Serve hot. For Egg Chow mein (type 1) In a wok or pan, add prepared omelet strips, veg chow mein and toss it on high flame for a minute. Transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with spring onion. Serve hot. For Egg Chow mein (type 2) In a wok or pan, add oil, once it's hot, add onion, prepared chow mein sauce and saute it for a minute. Add water, prepare omelet strips and toss it well. Pour the prepared sauce onto the veg chowmein and garnish it with spring onion. Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar . . . . . . . . #eggchowmeinrecipe #eggrecipe #ranveerbrar #noodles #chinese #eggnoodlesrecipe #streetfood

Add fresh tomato puree, coriander powder and cook it for a while until it thickens. Add water and give it a quick boil. Add marinated potatoes and cook for 2-3 minutes on low flames. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti or thepla. For Raita In a bowl, add boiled potato trimmings, tomato, green chillies, carrot, fresh coriander leaves, curd, salt to taste, sugar and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with degi red chili powder and coriander sprig. Serve with prepared lasaniya batata and roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #aloosabji #lasaniyabatata #ranveerbrar #aloorecipe #alookisabjirecipe #kathiyawadifood #kathiyawadialoosabji

Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 1 inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक 3 large Onions, sliced, प्याज 1 tbsp Gram flour, बेसन 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 4 medium Tomatoes, roughly diced, टमाटर ½ tbsp Black pepper powder, काली मिर्च पाउडर ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही For Frying Paneer 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल 800 gms Paneer, cut into medium cube, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Paneer Bhuna Masala 2 tbsp Ghee, घी Remaining Fried Paneer oil, तेल Prepared Paste, तयार किया हुआ पेस्ट 1 medium Onion, diced, प्याज 1 large Green bell pepper, diced, हरी शिमला मिर्च 1 large Red bell pepper, diced, लाल शिमला मिर्च ½ cup Water, पानी Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर 1 tsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Process For Paste In a deep pan or kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, cumin seeds, black peppercorns, cloves and let it splutter well. Add coriander powder, salt to taste, cumin powder, tomato, black pepper powder, curd, cover it with a lid and cook it well for a while until cooked well. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Frying Paneer In a non-stick pan, add oil, once it's hot, add paneer and fry it for 2-3 minutes from all sides until golden in color. Finish it with salt to taste, degi red chili powder and toss it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Paneer Bhuna Masala In a handi, add ghee, remaining fried paneer oil, once it's hot, add prepared paste and cook it well for 4-5 minutes until thicken. Add onions, green bell pepper, red bell pepper and saute for a few minutes. Add water and let it simmer for a minute. Add fried paneer and cook it well. Milk, दूध 10-12 no Ice cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े 1 ½ tbsp soaked Basil seeds, सब्जा बीज 1 cup Watermelon juice, तरबूज़ का रस 2-3 tbsp Rose syrup, गुलाब का शरबत For Garnish Watermelon, तरबूज Rose syrup, गुलाब का शरबत soaked Basil seeds, सब्जा बीज For Sugar Syrup 1 cup Sugar, चीनी 1 ½ cups Water, पानी For Cumin Powder 2 heaped tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Ginger Mint Paste ½ inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक ¼ cup fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता For Chaas 10-12 no. For Lassi In a bowl, add ice cubes, curd, prepared sugar syrup, cardamom powder, rose water and mix it well. Keep aside to chill in the refrigerator for a while. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन 3-4 cups Warm water, गुन गुना पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 4 cups Sella basmati rice (soaked for 30 minutes) सेला बासमती चावल 1 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी For Chutney 6-7 no. Keep it aside for further use. For Lahori Paneer In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add cloves, black cardamom, onions and saute it for a while. Add coriander powder, degi red chili powder, ginger garlic paste, curd and cook for 2-3 minutes on high flames. Add fresh tomato puree and cook it well for a while on medium flame. Add prepared masala and saute it for a minute and transfer excess oil in a bowl. Add tender coriander stems, water and get a quick boil. Finish it with fried paneer, dry fenugreek leaves and give it a good mix. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fresh cream, green chillies and coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti. For Masala In a tray or bowl, add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, and salt to taste. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Keep it aside for further use. For Frying Paneer In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, place marinated paneer and fry it until golden in color. Garlic cloves, लहसुन 4-5 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly torn) हरी मिर्च Prepared fried onions, तले हुए प्याज For Masala 1 ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 2-3 heaped tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 5-6 no. Cloves, लॉन्ग 5-6 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 1 ½ no. Mace, जावित्री 7-8 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2 tbsp Stone flower, पत्थर का फूल For Mutton Curry Remaining onion oil, बचा हुआ प्याज का तेल 2-3 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 2-3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 1 kg Mutton with bones, मटन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Prepared Paste, तयार किया हुआ पेस्ट 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही 2 heaped tbsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला 2 cups Warm water, गुन गुना पानी 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 inch Ginger (peeled & julienned) अदरक 1 no. Green chili, roughly diced, हरी मिर्च 2-3 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Frying Onions In a handi, add mustard oil, oil, once it's hot, add onions and saute until golden in color. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Paste In a bowl, add coriander leaves, ginger, garlic, green chillies and prepared fried onions. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Keep it aside for further use. For Masala In a bowl or tray, add cumin seeds, coriander seeds, black peppercorns, cloves, black cardamom, mace, green cardamom and stone flower. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Keep it aside for further use. For Mutton Curry In a pressure cooker, add remaining onion oil, once it's hot, add dry red chillies, bay leaf, cinnamon stick and let it splutter. Add mutton with bones, salt to taste and saute for a while. Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, tender coriander stems and saute for a minute. Add prepared paste, curd and cook for 2-3 minutes on high flames. Add prepared masala and let it simmer for a minute. Add warm water, cover it with a lid and cook the mutton until 6-7 whistles on medium to high flames or until cooked well. Let it rest for a few minutes until cool at room temperature. Finish it with ghee, ginger, green chili, coriander leaves and get a quick boil. Add lemon juice and mix well. Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with steam rice or roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #muttoncurry #muttonrecipe #ranveerbrar #muttoncurryincooker #muttonbiryani #muttonkorma

raw_text: BALUSHAHI - One of my favourite mithai, why? Basic ingredients, super simple to make & swaad duniya bhar ka! :) ********************* 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Gujiya - https://youtu.be/NcO_HZuFI5c Kalakand - https://youtu.be/VFiZMxvupWM *********************** BALUSHAHI Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-30 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Dough 1 ½ cups Refined flour, मैदा 2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी A pinch of salt, नमक ½ tsp Baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही ¼ cup Chilled water, ठंडा पानी ¼ cup Refined flour, ​​मैदा 3-4 tbsp soften Butter, cubed, मक्खन ¼ cup Refined flour, ​​मैदा For Sugar Syrup 2 cups Sugar, चीनी 2 cups Water, पानी few Saffron strands, केसर ¼ tsp Cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर 5-6 no. Green cardamom pods, हरी इलायची 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 2 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Coating Icing sugar & Saffron color, चीनी और केसर का रंग Little Water, पानी For Garnish Almonds, sliver, बादाम Pistachios (blanched & sliver) पिस्ता Silver wark, चाँदी का वर्क Process For Dough In a parat, add refined flour, ghee and mix it well until it has a crumbly texture. Add a pinch of salt, a pinch of baking soda, curd, chilled water and knead a semi hard dough. Add softened butter and knead it in soft dough. Divide the dough into layers and keep it aside to rest for 15-20 minutes. Take a lemon size ball, make a cavity and give it a desired shape. Keep it aside for further use. For Frying In a kadai, add oil, once it's medium hot, add balushahi and fry for 10-12 minutes until golden in color. Transfer it to a prepared sugar syrup and let it soak for a while. Keep it aside for further use. For Sugar Syrup In a kadai or sauce pot, add sugar, water, saffron strands, cardamom powder, green cardamom and cook for 15-20 minutes or until 1 string consistency. Add saffron water and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Coating In a bowl, add icing sugar, saffron color, water and mix it well. Sprinkle it on the balushahi and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with almonds, pistachios and silver vark. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #balushahirecipe #badusharecipe #ranveerbrar #holispecial #halwaistylerecipe #balushahigharpar

Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ tsp Saffron strands, केसर For Chicken Second Marination 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला Half Cooked Chicken, आधा पका हुआ चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Searing Chicken 2 tbsp Oil, तेल Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन For Assembling Cooked Rice, पके हुए चावल Seared Chicken, पका हुआ चिकन Almonds (blanched & sliver) बादाम For Garnish fresh Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Chicken Pulao In a handi, add ghee, oil, once it's hot, add cinnamon stick, bay leaf, black peppercorns and let it splutter. Add onion and saute it for 3-4 minutes until golden in color. Add salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, cumin powder and saute it for a minute. Add tomato puree, salt to taste and cook it well for a while. Add marinated chicken and mix it well. Cover it with a lid and cook it for a while until half cooked. Add water and simmer it well. Transfer the cooked chicken in a tray and keep it aside for further use. Add raisins, sella basmati, carrots, prepared masala, cover it with a lid and cook it for a while until cooked well. Finish it with some remaining chicken oil, tender coriander stems and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with almond slivers and mint sprig. Serve hot with seared chicken . For Chicken Marination In a tray, place chicken, add salt to taste and marinate it well. Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Masala In a pan, add salt taste, black peppercorns, green cardamom, cloves, cinnamon stick, mace, black cardamom and dry roast it for a minute. Add saffron strands and transfer it to a mixer grinder jar. Grind into fine powder and keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Second Marination In a bowl, add oil, ginger garlic paste, curd, degi red chili powder, prepared masala, cooked chicken, salt to taste and mix it well. Keep it aside to marinate for a while. In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken and sear it until golden brown. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickenpulao #kabsachicken #ranveerbrar #arabianchickenkabsa #pulaorecipe #chickenrecipe

Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 3 no. large Onions, chopped, प्याज 1 no. Green chilli (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 2-3 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 2 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 2 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 2 no. large Tomatoes, chopped, टमाटर Soaked fenugreek leaves, भीगी हुई कसूरी मेथी 1 cup Water, पानी Cooked Dal, पकी हुई दाल 2 tbsp Jaggery, roughly chopped, गुड़ Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Soaking Fenugreek Leaves ¼ cup dry Fenugreek leaves, कसूरी मेथी 1 ½ cup Water, पानी For Jowar Khichdi 2-3 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी A pinch of small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ½ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा Prepared Jowar powder, तयार किया हुआ ज्वार का पाउडर 2-3 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 cups Water, पानी For Frying Chillies 2 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी 5-6 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Garnish Fried chili, तली हुई मिर्च Ghee, घी Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Washing & Soaking Jowar In a bowl, add jowar, water and wash it well. Add water and keep it aside to soak for 10-15 minutes. Strain the jowar, transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Soaking & Cooking Dal In a bowl, add Akkha masoor, toor dal, water and wash it well. Add water and keep it aside to soak for 5-10 minutes. In a pressure cooker, add soaked dal, water, salt to taste, cover it with a lid and cook it until 2-3 whistles. Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. For Nagori Dal In an earthen pot or handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add dry red chillies, asafoetida, ginger, garlic, onion and saute it well until translucent. Add green chillies, tender coriander stems and saute for a minute. Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, tomatoes, soaked dry fenugreek leaves and cook for a while on medium flame. Add water, cook dal and let it simmer for 15-20 minutes on low flames. Add jaggery, salt to taste and give it a quick boil. Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish, garnish it with fried chili and coriander sprig. Serve hot with prepared jowar khichdi and fried chili. For Jowar Khichdi In a pressure cooker, add ghee, once it's hot, add jowar, salt to taste, water and stir well. Cover it with a lid and cook it until 2-3 whistles until cooked well. Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish, garnish it with fried chili and coriander sprig. Serve hot with prepared dal and fried chili. For Soaking Fenugreek Leaves In a bowl, add dry fenugreek leaves, add water and soak it for 10-15 minutes. Keep it aside for future use. For Frying Chili In a pan, add ghee, once it's hot, add dry red chillies and fry it for a minute. Add degi red chili powder, turn off the flames and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. ********************* For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #daltadka #nagoridal #ranveerbrar #dhabadal #rajasthanidaltadka #nagauridal #daltadkaranveerbrar

For Masala In a pan, add white sesame seeds, cashew nuts, black peppercorns, coriander seeds, cumin seeds, cloves, black cardamom, green cardamom, mace, bedgi red chillies and dry roast it on medium flames for 2-3 minutes until aromatic. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into fine powder. Keep it aside for further use. For Tadka In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add dry red chillies and roast for a minute until crispy. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar Track Used: Nothing Makes Sense Anymore (Epidemic music commercial license) - https://www.epidemicsound.com/track/ohvViGa76B/ #dumaloo #CookerAlooDum #ranveerbrar #easyDumaloo #dumaloorecipeinhindi #dumalooranveerbrar

Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन ¼ inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च ⅓ cup Spring Onion bulbs, roughly diced, प्याज़ पत्ता 1 large Onion, diced, प्याज 1 large Red bell pepper, diced, लाल शिमला मिर्च 1 large Green bell pepper, diced, ग्रीन बेल पेपर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ cup Prepared Mushroom stock, तयार किया हुआ मशरूम स्टॉक Prepared Sauce Mixture, तयार किया हुआ सॉस का मिश्रण 2 tsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस 1 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्नस्टार्च घोल Fried Mushrooms, तले हुए मशरूम 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल ¼ cup Spring onion, roughly chopped, हरी प्याज For Batter 1 tbsp Vinegar, सिरका ½ cup Refined flour, मैदा ½ cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of Sugar (optional) चीनी Water as required, पानी For Dry Coating ¼ cup Refined flour, मैदा ¼ cup Cornstarch, कॉर्नस्टार्च ½ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Sauce Mixture 1 tbsp Tomato ketchup, टोमेटो केचप 1 tbsp Red chili sauce, रेड चिली सॉस ½ tbsp Green chili sauce, ग्रीन चिली सॉस ¼ tsp Dark soy sauce, सोया सॉस 1 tsp Light soy sauce, सोया सॉस 2 tbsp Prepared Mushroom stock, तयार किया हुआ मशरूम स्टॉक 1 tsp Vinegar, सिरका For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Boiling Mushroom In a wok, add water as required, salt to taste, vinegar, button mushrooms and boil it for 4-5 minutes. Strain the water and keep it aside for further use. For Stock In a small saucepan, add water, mushroom stems and boil it for 10-15 minutes on medium flames. Keep it aside for further use. For Mushroom Chilli In a wok, add oil, once it's hot, add dry red chillies, ginger, garlic, ginger, green chillies and saute it for a minute on high flames. Add spring onion bulb, onion, red bell pepper, green bell pepper, salt to taste and toss it well. Add prepared mushroom stock, prepared sauce mixture and cook it on high flame for 2-3 minutes. Add light soy sauce, cornstarch slurry, fried mushrooms, tender coriander stems, spring onion and toss it for a minute until thick. Transfer it to a serving bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Batter In a bowl, add vinegar, refined flour, cornstarch, salt to taste, a pinch of sugar, water as required and make it a dripping consistency batter. Add dry coated mushrooms and coat it well. Drop in hot oil, fry until crispy and golden in color. Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Dry Coating In a bowl, add refined flour, cornstarch, black peppercorns, salt to taste and mix it well. Add boiled mushroom and toss it well. Transfer it to a tray or plate and keep it aside for further use. For Sauce Mixture In a bowl, add tomato ketchup, red chili sauce, green chili sauce, dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, prepared mushroom stock, vinegar and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #mushroomchilli #mushroomrecipe #ranveerbrar #Chilimushroom #paneerchillirecipe #chilichicken #mushroomstirfry #schezwansaucerecipe
