It takes just as much finesse and technique as a Biryani :) Like this one.. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/BiryaniPulaorecipesbyRB *********************** SHAHI MATAR PULAO Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 30-35 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Besan ke Kofte 2-3 no. Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 ½ cups Gram flour, बेसन 3 heaped tbsp Curd, beaten, दही 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 50 gms Paneer, crumble, पनीर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Ghee, घी For Shahi Matar Pulav 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 no. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 1 no. Mace, जावित्री 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 ½ cup fresh Green peas, हरी मटर ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 4 cups Sella basmati rice (soaked for 30 minutes) सेला बासमती चावल Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर 1 cup fresh Green peas, हरी मटर 2-3 tbsp Fried onion, तला हुआ प्याज 2-3 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी 1 no. Green chili (less spicy & diagonally sliced) हरी मिर्च 6-7 cups Warm Water, गुनगुना पानी ¼ cup fresh Green peas, हरी मटर Water Mixture, पानी का मिश्रण Fried Kofta, तले हुए कोफ्ते 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 2-3 tbsp Fried onions, तला हुआ प्याज For Water Mixture 1 tbsp Sugar, चीनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 cups Warm water, गुनगुना पानी 2 tbsp Ghee, घी For Garnish Fried Cashew Nut, तले हुए काजू Fried Raisins, तली हुई किशमिश Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Silver vark, चांदी का वर्ख Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता For Matar Ka Raita 1 tbsp Oil, तेल A pinch of asafoetida ½ tsp Cumin seeds 1 cup fresh Green peas Salt to taste ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) ½ tsp Chilli flakes 2-3 tbsp Water 1 cup Curd, beaten Salt to taste 1 tsp Sugar Fried Kofta, chopped For Garnish A pinch of roasted cumin powder A pinch of degi red chili powder Sauteed Matar Fried kofta, crushed Coriander sprig Other Ingredients Oil for greasing Oil for frying 400 gms Paneer, cut into diamond shape Process Besan Ke Kofte In a bowl, add green chillies, gram flour, curd, ginger garlic paste, paneer, salt to taste, a pinch of asafoetida, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder and mix it well. Add a little oil and make a semi thick dough. Transfer the mixture into a greased tray and keep it aside for further use. Apply oil on the palm, take a coin size small ball and give it a desired shape. Heat oil in a kadai, add prepared balls and fry until golden brown. Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use. Take the remaining mixture and flatten it like a puri. Transfer it to the hot oil, fry until golden and crispy. Transfer it to an absorbent sheet and keep it aside for further use. In the same hot oil, add paneer and fry until golden brown. Keep it aside for further use, For Shahi Matar Pulav In a handi, add ghee & oil, once it's hot, add bay leaf, green cardamom, black cardamom, mace, cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add fresh green peas and saute well for 2-3 minutes. Add curd, ghee, salt to taste and saute it for a while. Layer it with 1st batch sella basmati rice, fried paneer, fried onion and saffron water. Add the 2nd batch of sella basmati rice, green chili, warm water, fresh green peas, water mixture, fried kofta and cover it with silver foil. Cook it on low flames for 10-15 minutes until cooked well. Finish it with some ghee, coriander leaves, ginger, fried onion and give it a gentle mix. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with, fried cashew nuts, fried raisins, pomegranate pearls, silver vark and coriander sprig. Serve hot with prepared matar ka raita. For Water Mixture In a bowl, add salt to taste, sugar, warm water, ghee, and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Matar Ka Raita In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add asafoetida, cumin seeds and let it splutter well. Add green peas, salt to taste, ginger, chili flakes and saute it for 2-4 minutes. Add water and cook it for 2-4 minutes until cooked well. In a bowl, add curd, salt to taste, sugar and mix it well. Add fried kofte and mix well. In a serving bowl, add sweetened curd, Sprinkle a pinch of roasted cumin powder and a pinch of degi red chili powder. Add prepared matar mixture, fried kofta and garnish it with coriander sprig *********************** #matarpulao #koftapulao #ranveerbrar #shahipulao #matarpaneer #paneerpulav #pulavrecipe #pulaorecipe #vegpulao

No goodness is wasted, sirf pure Dal, जिससे बने badhiya Dal :) #collab #Dalrecipe #Daltadka #ranveerbrar #dalnizami #MoongDaltadka #TataSampannDal #unpolishedDal *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Pakode wali Kadhi - https://youtu.be/RgoKkuVhp4o Dal Tadka & Jeera Rice - https://youtu.be/2u3H7JoAm_U Dal Makhani - https://youtu.be/dOiwccflDkY *********************** DAL NIZAMI / MIXED DAL TADKA Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Washing Dal ½ cup whole Green Moong (washed & soaked) हरी मूंग दाल 1 cup Chana Dal (washed & soaked) चना दाल 1 cup Toor dal (washed & soaked) तूर दाल Water as required, पानी For Boiling Dal 4-5 cups Water, पानी 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Onion Coriander Paste 2 large Onions, cut into half, प्याज 2 no. Green chillies (less spicy & broken into half) हरी मिर्च ¼ cup fresh Coriander leaves, roughly torn, धनिया पत्ता Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Oil, तेल ½ inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक For Tempering 2 tbsp Oil, तेल Prepared Onion Coriander Paste, तयार किया हुआ प्याज धनिये का पेस्ट ¼ tsp Asafoetida, हींग 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of cumin powder, जीरा पाउडर 2 tbsp Fried Onion, (optional) तले हुए प्याज Boiled Dal, उबली हुई दाल 1-2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Fried Onion, (optional) तले हुए प्याज ½ inch Ginger (peeled & julienned) अदरक 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता Prepared Tadka, तयार किया हुआ तड़का For Tadka 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 5-6 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा For Garnish Prepared Tadka, तयार किया हुआ तड़का Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Fried Onions, तले हुए प्याज Process For Washing Dal In a bowl, add green green moong dal, chana dal, toor dal and wash it well. Add water for soaking and leave it aside for 10-15 minutes. For Boiling Dal In a pressure cooker, add water, ghee, salt to taste, turmeric powder, soaked TATA SAMPANN green moong dal, chana dal and toor dal. Cover it with a lid and cook it until 3-4 whistles. Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. Mash it well with a masher and keep it aside for further use. For Paste In a mixer grinder jar, add onions, green chillies, fresh coriander leaves, salt to taste, oil, ginger and grind it smoothly . Keep it aside for further use. For Tempering In a handi, add oil, once it's hot, add prepared onion coriander paste and saute it for 5-6 minutes until golden brown. Add asafoetida, coriander powder, turmeric powder, curd and saute it well. Add degi red chili powder, a pinch of cumin powder, fried onions, boiled dal, ghee and cook it well for 4-5 minutes. Finish it with some fried onion, ginger, coriander leaves, prepared tadka and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with prepared tadka, coriander sprig and fried onions. Serve hot with roti or naan. For Tadka In a pan, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add dry red chillies, cumin seeds and splutter well. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

Cashew nuts, काजू ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी For Sauteing Chicken 2-3 tbsp Oil, तेल Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन For Chicken Lazeez 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 heaped tbsp Ghee, घी 2 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 1 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची Prepared Onion Paste, तयार किया हुआ प्याज का पेस्ट 1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2 tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Ghee, घी ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च ½ cup fresh Tomato puree, ताजे टमाटर की प्यूरी 1 Green chili, slit into middle, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 cup Water, पानी 1 ½ tbsp Ghee, घी Sauteed chicken, भुना हुआ चिकन 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी 1 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Butter, cubed, मक्खन dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी Process For Chicken Marination In a bowl, add chicken, curd, ginger garlic paste, salt to taste, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder and mix it well. Keep it aside to marinate for 10-15 minutes. For Boiling In a handi, add water, salt to taste, ghee, onions, green chillies, garlic, cashew nuts, sugar and give it a quick. Strain the excess water, transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Keep it aside for further use. For Sauteing Chicken In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, add marinated chicken pieces and saute it for 3-4 minutes on both sides until tender. Transfer it to a bowl or tray and keep it aside for further use. For Chicken Lazeez In the same handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add bay leaf, green cardamom, black cardamom and let it splutter. Add prepared paste, ginger garlic paste and saute it for a while. Add coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi chili powder, ghee and mix it well. Add curd, black peppercorns crushed and cook it well. Add fresh tomato puree, green chili, tender coriander stems and give it a good mix. Cover it with a lid and allow it to cook for 5-6 minutes on medium flames. Add water to adjust the consistency, add ghee, sauteed chicken, sugar and cook it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames. Finish it with dry fenugreek leaves, butter and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish, garnish it with coriander sprig, butter and dry fenugreek leaves. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 2 medium Onion, finely chopped, प्याज 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stem, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 2 large winter Carrot (peeled & chopped) गाजर ½ small Cauliflower, roughly chopped, फूलगोभी ½ small Cabbage, chopped, पत्ता गोभी 2 tbsp Butter, cubed, मक्खन 6-7 no. Button Mushroom, roughly sliced, मशरूम 1 liter Water, पानी ½ cup fresh Green peas, ताजी हरी मटर Fresh Flat Noodle, नूडल्स 1 inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, काली मिर्च के दाने 3-4 tbsp Cornstarch slurry, कॉर्नस्टार्च का घोल For Chilli Oil 1 ¼ cup Oil, तेल ¼ cup Sesame oil, तिल का तेल 4-5 no. Garlic cloves, chopped, लहसुन 2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 no. Star anise, चक्र फूल ⅓ cup Chilli flakes, कुटी हुई लाल मिर्च 1 tbsp White Sesame seeds, सफेद तिल 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Fresh Rolled Dough 1 cup Whole Wheat flour, गेहूं का आटा Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Water as required, पानी 1 tsp Oil (after kneading) तेल For Assembling 1 cup fresh Spinach, roughly chopped, पालक Prepared Soup, तयार किया हुआ सूप Chili oil, तैयार किया हुआ चिली आयल Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Vegetable Winter Soup In a sauce pot, add butter, oil, bay leaf, ginger, onion and saute until golden in color. Add tender coriander stems, winter carrot, cauliflower, cabbage, butter, button mushroom and saute it for a minute. Add water, cover it with the lid and boil it for 20-30 minutes on medium flames. Add green peas, fresh flat noodles, ginger, coriander leaves, black peppercorns, cornstarch slurry and simmer it for 5-6 minutes until cooked well. Keep it aside for further use. For Chilli Oil In a small saucepan, add oil, sesame oil, once it's slightly hot, add garlic, cloves, star anise, chili flakes, white sesame seeds, degi red chili powder and mix it well. Cook it in low flames for 15-20 minutes until aromatic . Keep it aside for further use. For Fresh Rolled Dough In a bowl, add whole wheat flour, salt to taste, water as required and knead a semi soft dough. Apply oil and cover it with wet cloth. Keep it aside to rest for 10-15 minutes. Take lemon size dough and flatten with the help of a rolling pin. Trim the edges, cut it into desired shape and keep it aside for further use. For Assembling In a serving bowl, add spinach, pour ladleful prepared soup, drizzle some prepared chili oil, garnish it with lemon wedge and coriander sprig. Cashew Nuts, काजू For Maharaja Style Mutton Curry Remaining oil & ghee, तेल और घी 4-5 medium Onions, sliced, प्याज 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलाइची 2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 no. Green Cardamom, हरी इलायची ¼ inch Mace, जावित्री ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 1 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 1 kg Mutton, मटन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 heaped tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 ½ tbsp Jaggery, roughly chopped, गुड़ 1 ⅓ cup Curd, beaten, दही few Saffron strands, केसर 2-3 cups Water, पानी 1 tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च few Saffron strands, केसर 2 tsp Black peppercorns & Black cardamom powder, काली मिर्च और बड़ी इलायची का पाउडर 2 tbsp Fried cashew nuts paste, काजू का पेस्ट 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Smoke Coal, कोयला 2-3 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 tsp Ghee, घी For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Ginger, julienned, अदरक Saffron strands, केसर Process For Frying Cashew Nuts In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add cashew nuts and fry until golden in color. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar, add little water and grind it smoothly. Keep it aside for further use. For Maharaja Style Mutton Curry In a handi, add remaining oil & ghee, once it's hot, add onions and saute it well until golden brown. Add black cardamom, cloves, green cardamom, mace, cinnamon stick, bay leaf, mutton, salt to taste and saute it well until half cooked. Add degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder, jaggery and mix it well Add curd, saffron strands and let it simmer for a while. Add water to adjust the consistency, cover it with a lid and let it cook for 30-40 minutes on medium flames. Add black peppercorns, saffron strands, black peppercorns & black cardamom powder, fried cashew nuts paste and give it a quick boil. Place a small steel bowl, add burnt coal into the bowl, add cloves, pour little ghee and cover it with the lid. Keep it aside for 7-8 minutes. Finish it with some coriander leaves, lemon juice and transfer it to a serving bowl. Garnish it with the coriander sprig, ginger and saffron strands. Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 1 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 1 large Tomato, diced, टमाटर ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर A pinch of garam masala, गरम मसाला पाउडर Fried Potatoes, तले हुए आलू ¼ cup Water, पानी 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी 1 cup fresh Green peas, ताजी हरी मटर Sauteed Green Peas Paste, भूने हुए हरे मटर का पेस्ट 2-3 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 no. Green chillies, chopped, हरी मिर्च For Pickle Masala 1 tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 10-12 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना A pinch of asafoetida, हींग Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज ½ tsp Carom seeds, अजवायन A pinch of Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Onion seeds, कलौंजी ¼ tsp Dry mango powder, आमचूर पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Pickle ¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 6-7 no. Broad beans (Sem) (blanched & roughly chopped) सेम 1 medium Potato (boiled, peeld, diced) आलू 2-3 tbsp Prepared Pickle Masala, तयार किया हुआ अचार का मसाला For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Green chili, slit into half, हरी मिर्च Tomato, wedge, टमाटर Process For Frying Potatoes & Green Peas Paste In a mixer grinder jar, add fresh green peas and grind it coarsely. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. In a handi or kadai, add mustard oil, oil, once it's hot, add potatoes and fry until golden in color. Transfer it to the tray and keep it aside for further use. In the same handi or kadai, add fresh green peas paste and saute for 4-5 minutes on medium flames. Transfer it to a bowl and keep it aside for further use. For Nimona In a handi or kadai, add mustard oil, oil, once it's hot, add cumin seeds, green chillies, tender coriander stems, coriander leaves, asafoetida, ginger garlic paste, tomato and saute it for a minute on medium flames. Add degi red chili powder, coriander powder, turmeric powder, garam masala, fried potatoes and saute it well. Add water, sugar, fresh green peas and cook for 4-5 minutes until the green peas get half cooked. Add sauteed green peas paste, water, salt to taste, cover it with the lid and cook well. Finish it with some green chillies and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with the coriander sprig, green chili and tomato. Serve hot with prepared achaar and roti. For Pickle Masala In a pan, add fennel seeds, cumin seeds, black peppercorns, fenugreek seeds, asafoetida, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, coriander seeds and dry roast for a minute on medium flames. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it coarsely. In a bowl, add prepared masala, carom seeds, turmeric powder, onion seeds, dry mango powder, salt to taste and mix it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Pickle In a pan, add mustard oil, once it's hot, turn off the flame and transfer it to a bowl. Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. Add broad beans, potato, prepared pickle masala and give it a good mix. Transfer it to a serving dish, serve with prepared nimona and roti. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #matarnimona #matarrecipes #ranveerbrar #matarkanimona #harematarkirecipe #mataraloo #aloomatarsabji

Dal Chawal might be one of the simplest dishes around, but when you cook it with love, it becomes a symphony.. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/DalRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** HOME STYLE DAL CHAWAL Preparation time 5-10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Pudina Chai 2 cups Water, पानी 1 tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ 1 ½ tbsp Jaggery, गुड़ 2 tsp Tea leaves, चाय पत्ती 4-5 Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता 1 lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक For Ginger Green Chilli Paste 1 ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Cooking Dal 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Onion seeds, कलौंजी 1 tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी के बीज 2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा ½ tsp small Mustard seeds, राई Prepared Ginger green chili paste, तयार किया हुआ अदरक हरी मिर्च का पेस्ट ½ cup Toor dal, washed, तूर दाल ¼ cup Moong dal, washed, मूंग की दाल ½ tsp Asafoetida, हींग 2 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 ½ cups Water, पानी ½ Raw Mango (peeled & roughly chopped) कच्चा आम 1 ½ tbsp Jaggery, गुड़ For Cooking Rice 3 cups Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 2 cups Short grain rice (Ambemohar), washed, चावल For Frying Chillies ¼ cup Oil, तेल 2 tbsp Ghee, घी 5-6 no. Dry red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च For Garnish Fried chillies, तली हुई लाल मिर्च Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Pudina Chai In a kettle, add water, fennel seeds, jaggery, tea leaves and let it boil for 5-6 minutes. In a cup, add mint leaves, lemon wedge and prepared chai and mix well. Serve hot. For Ginger Green Chilli Paste In a mortar pestle, add ginger, green chillies, salt to taste and grind it into coarsely paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Dal In a handi, heat ghee & oil, add onions seeds, fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds, small mustard seeds, prepared ginger green chili paste and let it saute for a minute. Add toor dal, moong dal and saute it very well. Add asafoetida, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, salt to taste, water and mix it well. Cover it with the lid and cook it for 20-25 minutes on medium flame. Add raw mango, jaggery and cook it for 2-3 minutes. Transfer it on a serving dish along with prepared rice and garnish it with fried red chillies, lemon wedge and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Cooking Rice In a handi, add water, salt to taste, green cardamom, short grain rice and mix it well. Cover it with the lid and cook it for 10-15 minutes on low to medium flame. Open the lid and transfer it to the serving dish or bowl along with prepared cooked dal. Serve hot. For Frying Chillies In a pan, heat oil & ghee, add dry red chillies and fry them for 2-3 minutes or until it's crispy. Remove it on a plate or tray and keep it aside for further use. #dalchawal #dalfrytadka #daltadka #ranveerbrar #daltadkaranveerbrar #dalrecipe #moongdalrecipe

Green chillies, roughly chopped, हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 ½ cups Water, पानी ½ cup fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता ½ tbsp Black cardamom & Black peppercorns powder, काली इलायची और काली मिर्च का पाउडर 1 tbsp Fried onions & cashew nuts paste, तले हुए प्याज और काजू का पेस्ट For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Boiled Egg, उबला हुआ अंडा Process For Boiling In a sauce pot, add water, once it's roaring boiled, add salt to taste, sugar, onions, cover it with the lid and cook it for 7-8 minutes until cooked well. raw_text: KASHMIRI LAL PANEER MASALA - This recipe is my ode to the wonderful treasures of Kashmiri cuisine and culture. *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/PaneerRecipesbyRB *********************** KASHMIRI LAL PANEER MASALA Preparation time 5-10 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Cooking Paneer 2-3 ltr Water, पानी ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 800 gms fresh Paneer, पनीर For Yakhni 1 ltr Water, पानी ⅓ cup Fried Onions, roughly chopped, तले हुए प्याज ½ tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ cup Ghee, घी A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग 2-3 no. Bay leaf, तेज पत्ता 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 2 no. Black Cardamom, बड़ी इलाइची Fried Paneer, तला हुआ पनीर Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला 2-3 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Frying ¼ cup Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल Cooked Paneer, cut into slab, पका हुआ पनीर For Masala 2 tbsp Remaining mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 1 ½ cups fresh Tomato puree, ताज़े टमाटर की प्यूरी ½ tbsp Kashmiri red chili powder, कश्‍मीरी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Sugar, चीनी ½ tbsp dry Ginger powder, सौंठ का पाउडर ½ tbsp Fennel seeds powder, सौंफ का पाउडर 2-3 tbsp Fried onions paste, तले हुए प्याज का पेस्ट For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Cooking Paneer In a handi, add water, turmeric powder, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, paneer and simmer it for 7-8 minutes on medium flames until cooked well. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Yakhni In a handi, add water, fried onions, degi red chili powder, ghee, a pinch of asafoetida, bay leaf, cinnamon stick, black cardamom and let it simmer for a while. Add fried paneer and cook for 5-6 minutes. Add prepared masala and cook it well for a while. Finish it with some coriander leaves and mix it well. Transfer it into the serving bowl and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with steam rice. For Frying In a pan, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add paneer and fry on both sides until golden brown. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 ½ cups Curd, beaten, दही 900 gms Chicken (thigh with bone & drumstick) चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Chicken Double Masala 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी Marinated chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन ½ cup Water, पानी 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 tsp fresh Mint leaves, finely chopped, पुदीना पत्ता Prepared Onion Tomato Masala, तयार किया हुआ प्याज टमाटर मसाला 1 tsp dry Fenugreek leaves, crushed, कसूरी मेथी ¼ tsp Garam masala powder, गरम मसाला पाउडर For Onion Tomato Masala 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 8-10 no. raw_text: JEERA ALOO 3 TYPES - Continuing the celebration of Potatoes this month, here's an ode to the simple Aloo Jeera :) Which is your favourite? *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/PotatoRecipesbyRB *********************** ALOO JEERA 3 TYPES Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Hing Jeera Aloo 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 4-5 no. Dry fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा A pinch of asafoetida, हींग ½ tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल 3 medium Boiled Potatoes (peeled & cubed) आलू Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Lemon wedge, नींबू की फांक For Thecha 3 no. Green chillies (less spicy & roughly chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 inch Ginger (peeled & roughly chopped) अदरक 5-6 No. Garlic cloves, roughly chopped, लहसुन 2-3 tbsp Tender coriander stems, roughly chopped, धनिये के डंठल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Thecha Wale Aloo 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp small Mustard seeds, छोटी राई ½ tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 3-4 medium Boiled Potatoes (peeled & diced) आलू Prepared Thecha, तयार किया हुआ ठेचा 1 tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Green chili, slit, हरी मिर्च For Pahadi Aloo 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 2 no. dry Red chillies, सूखी लाल मिर्च 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 3-4 Boiled Potato (peeled & diced) आलू A pinch of Asafoetida, हींग ¼ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ¼ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ¼ tsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1-2 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता For Frying 2 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल 4 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च For Garnish Fried kashmiri red chillies, crushed, तली हुई कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Hing Jeera Aloo In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add dry fenugreek seeds, cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add a pinch of asafoetida, tender coriander stems, boiled potatoes, salt to taste and saute it for a while. Add degi red chili powder and toss it gently. Finish it with some lemon juice, coriander leaves and toss it well. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and lemon wedge. Serve hot with roti. For Thecha In a mortar pestle, add green chillies, ginger, garlic, tender coriander stems, salt to taste and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Thecha Wale Aloo In a kadai, add oil, once it's hot, add small mustard seeds, cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add boiled potatoes and shallow fry it on high flames for a minute until golden in color. Add prepared thecha and mix it well. Cover it with the lid and cook it for 3-4 minutes on low flames. Finish it with some lemon juice and toss it gently. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with coriander sprig and green chili. Serve hot with roti or chapati. For Pahadi Aloo In a kadai, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add dry red chillies, cumin seeds and let it splutter. Add boiled potatoes, a pinch of asafoetida and saute it for a minute. Add turmeric powder, degi red chili powder, coriander powder, salt to taste and toss it gently. Finish it with coriander leaves and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with fried kashmiri red chillies and coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti or paratha. For Frying In a pan, add mustard oil, once it's hot, add dry kashmiri red chillies and fry it well. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #aloojeera #aloorecipes #ranveerbrar #aloojeerekisabji #aloosabji #aloofry #bhunaaloo #aloogobi #alookegutke #dhaniyawalealoo #spicyaloo

ingredients: 100 gm Jaggery | 2-3 tbsp Water | 250 gms Butter, salted | ¼ cup Dessicated coconut | ¼ tsp Each Mixed spice powder (cinnamon, nutmeg, clove) | ¼ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed | ¼ cup Tutti Frutti | ¼ cup black Raisins, chopped | ½ tbsp Orange, rind | 300 gms Refined flour | 1 tin Nestlé MILKMAID | ¼ cup Cashew nuts, chopped | ¼ cup Orange juice | 1 tbsp Tutti frutti | 1 tbsp black Raisins | ½ tsp Baking soda | ½ tsp Baking powder | 1 ½ tbsp Tutti frutti

Baaki, recipe dekh लीजिए 😎 #collab #Christmascake #ChristmasFruitcake #condensedmilkcake #egglesschristmascake 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/4ar57BI 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: Eggless Plum Cake - https://youtu.be/XcQQALrJd84 Eggless Chocolate Truffle Cake - https://youtu.be/w-yg_Ik84j8 Gingerbread House - https://youtu.be/aHOK9WtA_SY ********************** KERALA STYLE CHRISTMAS CAKE Preparation time 15 minutes Cooking time 35-40 minutes at 170°c Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Caramelized Jaggery 100 gm Jaggery 2-3 tbsp Water 250 gms Butter, salted For Kerala Christmas Cake ¼ cup Dessicated coconut ¼ tsp Each Mixed spice powder (cinnamon, nutmeg, clove) ¼ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed ¼ cup Tutti Frutti ¼ cup black Raisins, chopped ½ tbsp Orange, rind 300 gms Refined flour 1 tin Nestlé MILKMAID ¼ cup Cashew nuts, chopped ¼ cup Orange juice 1 tbsp Tutti frutti 1 tbsp black Raisins ½ tsp Baking soda ½ tsp Baking powder For Garnish 1 ½ tbsp Tutti frutti Icing sugar Dessicated coconut Candied cherry fresh Mint sprig Process For Caramelized Jaggery In a pan, add in jaggery, 2-3 tbsp water and caramelize it until it turns dark golden brown. Add butter and mix it well. Allow it to cool down and keep it aside for further use. For Kerala Christmas Cake In a bowl, caramelized jaggery, desiccated coconut, black peppercorns, tutti frutti , black raisins, orange rind and mix it well. Add flour, Nestlé MILKMAID, cashew nuts, orange juice and make a smooth batter. Fold in tutti frutti, black raisins, baking soda and give it a good mix. Transfer it to a greased baking tray and top it up with tutti frutti. Place it in a preheated oven and bake it for 35-40 minutes at 170°c until cooked well. Gently demold the cake and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with tutti frutti, icing sugar, candied cherries and mint sprig. Serve. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 1 no. Black cardamom, बड़ी इलायची 2 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ¼ cup Water, पानी Little water, पानी ½ tbsp Ginger garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट Prepared Curd Mixture, तयार किया हुआ दही का मिश्रण Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Marinated Chicken, मैरीनेटेड चिकन 1-2 cups Water, पानी 1 cup Water, पानी Prepared Cashew Nuts Paste, तयार किया हुआ काजू का पेस्ट Prepared Tadka, तयार किया हुआ तड़का Shredded Chicken, हड्डी रहित चिकन For Boiling Cashew Nuts Water as required, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 12 -15 no. Cashew Nuts, काजू For Marination 1 kg Chicken, चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1-2 tsp Oil, तेल 1 tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Curd Mixture 1 ¼ cup Curd, beaten, दही 1 heaped tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Dry Masala 1 heaped tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 3-4 no. Green chili, slit into half, हरी मिर्च 1 no. medium Onions, roughly sliced, प्याज ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर 1-2 tbsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला 1 tbsp Kewra water, केवड़ा जल 1 tbsp Rose water, गुलाब जल 1 ½ tbsp Dry fenugreek leaves, roasted, भुनी हुई कसूरी मेथी For Garnish Green chili, slit, हरी मिर्च Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Chicken Masala In a handi or sauce pot, ghee, oil, once it's hot, add green chillies, onions and saute it for a minute until translucent. Add bay leaf, cinnamon stick, black cardamom, green cardamom and saute it well. Add salt to taste, water and mix it well, cover it with the lid and cook it for 8-10 minutes on medium flames. Grind the onion with the help of a hand blender or steel spatula. Add water, add ginger garlic paste and saute it for a while. Add prepared curd mixture, salt to taste and cook it well for 5-6 minutes. Add tender coriander stems, marinated chicken, water and let it simmer for a while. Add water, prepared cashewnut paste and get it quick boil. Add prepared tadka, shredded chicken and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving bowl or dish, garnish it with green chili and coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti or naan. For Boiling Cashewnut In a pan, add water, salt to taste, add cashew nuts and get a quick boil. Strain and transfer it to a mixer grinder jar. Grind it to a smooth paste and keep it aside for further use. For Marination In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, oil, degi red chili powder, lemon juice and mix it well. Keep it aside to marinate for a while. For Curd Mixture In a bowl, add curd, coriander powder, turmeric powder, degi red chili powder and mix it well. Keep aside for further use. For Dry Masala In a pan, add black peppercorns, black cardamom, mace, green cardamom, salt to taste and dry roast it for 2-4 minutes on medium flame. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar, add roasted gram flour and grind it well. Keep it aside for further use. For Tadka In a pan, add oil, ghee, once it is medium hot, add green chili, onion and saute it for 2-4 minutes until translucent. Add degi red chili powder, prepared masala, kewra water, rose water, dry fenugreek leaves and saute it well. Keep it aside for further use. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickenmasala #chickenrecipe #ranveerbrar #lucknowchickenmasala #chickenkorma #awadhichicken #chickencurry

raw_text: AFGHANI CHICKEN BIRYANI - As with life, so with cooking, keep it simple :) Jaise ki ye simple, kam masaledaar se bani Chicken Biryani *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/BiryaniPulaorecipesbyRB *********************** AFGHANI CHICKEN BIRYANI Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 30-40 minutes Serve 3-4 Ingredients For Chicken Marination 1 ½ kg Chicken (drumstick & thigh with bones) चिकन Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2 tbsp Ginger Garlic paste, अदरक लहसुन का पेस्ट 2 Green chillies, broken into half, हरी मिर्च 1 ½ tbsp Oil, तेल 2 cups Curd, beaten, दही 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, roughly chopped, पुदीना पत्ता For Jhol 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 tsp Saffron strands, केसर 1 ½ cups Fresh cream, ताज़ा मलाई 3 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी 2-3 Green chillies (less spicy & slit into half) हरी मिर्च ⅓ cup Fried onion, तला हुआ प्याज 2 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता 2 tbsp fresh Coriander leaves, roughly chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 ½ tbsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला For Masala 10-12 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 2-3 no. Mace, जावित्री 2-4 no. Cloves, लौंग For Cooking Rice 3-4 ltr. Water, पानी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 3-4 no. Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता 1 inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 1,200 gms Sella Basmati Rice, soaked (for 30 minutes) सेला बासमती चावल For Afghani Chicken Biryani 1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल 2-3 tbsp Ghee, घी 2 no. Green chillies, broken into half, हरी मिर्च 2 large Onions, sliced, प्याज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Marinated Chicken, मैरिनेटेड चिकन 5-6 no. dried Apricot, roughly chopped, खुबानी 1-2 tbsp Fried onions, तले हुए प्याज 1-2 tbsp fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता 1 st batch of Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल Prepared jhol, तयार किया हुआ झोल Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 2nd batch of Cooked rice, पके हुए चावल Prepared jhol, तयार किया हुआ झोल few Saffron strands, केसर Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला For Garnish Green chili, slit, हरी मिर्च fresh Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता fresh Mint sprig, पुदीना पत्ता Process For Marination In a bowl, add chicken, salt to taste, ginger garlic paste, green chillies, oil, curd, fresh coriander leaves, fresh mint leaves and mix it well. Keep it aside to marinate for 15-20 minutes. For Jhol In a small saucepan, add ghee, once it's hot, add saffron strands, fresh cream, green cardamom, salt to taste, sugar and get a quick boil. In a bowl, add green chillies, fried onions, fresh mint leaves, coriander leaves, pour the prepared mixture and mix it well. Add prepared masala and give it a good mix. Keep it aside for further use. For Masala In a pan, add green cardamom, salt to taste, black peppercorns, mace, cloves and dry roast it for a minute on medium flames. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Keep it aside for further use. For Cooking Rice In a handi or sauce pot, add water, once it’s roaring boiled, add salt to taste, ghee, bay leaf, cinnamon stick, sella basmati rice, cover it with the lid and cook it for 4-5 minutes on high flame. Strain out the 60% cooked rice and transfer it to a tray for resting. Strain the 80% remaining cooked rice, transfer it to another tray and allow it to rest for a while. Keep it aside for further use. For Afghani Chicken Biryani In a handi, add oil, ghee, once it's hot, add green chillies, onions, salt to taste and saute it until translucent . Add marinated chicken and saute it well, cover it with the lid and cook it for 8-10 minutes on medium flames. Add dried apricot, fried onions, fresh mint leaves, 1st batch of cooked rice and gently layer it. Add prepared jhol, sprinkle prepared masala and layer the 2nd batch of cooked rice. Add prepared jhol, saffron strands, sprinkle prepared masala and seal the edges with the dough. Cover it with the lid and cook it for 15-20 minutes on low to medium flames. Turn off the flames and let it rest for a few minutes. Gently open the biryani from one side and transfer it to a serving dish. Garnish it with coriander sprig and mint sprig. Serve hot with green chutney. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #chickenbiryani #chickenrecipe #ranveerbrar

Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च | 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता | 1 ½ tbsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला | 2-3 tbsp Salted Boondi, crushed, बूंदी | 2 tbsp Dal Moth, दाल मोठ | ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर | ½ tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज | 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा | 10-12 no. raw_text: SABUDANA TIKKI CHAAT - Why just for Vrat, Chaat can be enjoyed any time of the year, right ? :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/ChaatRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** SABUDANA TIKKI CHAAT Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Sabudana Mixture 6 medium Potatoes (boiled, pelled, grated) आलू 2 cups Tapioca, soaked, भीगा हुआ साबूदाना 3-4 no. Green chillies (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 1 ½ tbsp Prepared Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला 2-3 tbsp Salted Boondi, crushed, बूंदी 2 tbsp Dal Moth, दाल मोठ ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Masala ½ tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 1 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 10-12 no. Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Chutney 1 tbsp Oil, तेल 4 no. Green chillies, roughly chopped, हरी मिर्च ½ inch Ginger (peeled & sliced) अदरक ⅓ cup Roasted peanuts (without skin) मूंगफली 1 sprig Curry leaves, करी पत्ता ¼ cup fresh Mint leaves, पुदीना पत्ता ½ cup fresh Coriander leaves, धनिया पत्ता 1 Green chili, हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Curd, beaten, दही For Seasoned Chutney ¼ cup Curd, beaten, दही Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी Prepared Chutney, तयार की हुई चटनी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Other Ingredients 1 tsp Oil, for greasing, तेल 1 tbsp Dal Moth, दाल मोठ Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Assembling Green chutney, हरी चटनी Sabudana Tikki, साबूदाना टिक्की Pomegranate pearl, अनार के दाने Nylon sev, सेव Tamarind chutney, इमली की चटनी Dal mooth, दाल मोठ Sweetened curd, दही Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Sabudana Mixture In a parat or bowl, add potatoes, tapioca, green chillies, ginger, coriander leaves, prepared masala, salted boondi, dal moth, degi red chili powder and mix it well. In a greased tray, sprinkle dal moth, add prepared mixture and flatten it well with the help of spatula. Refrigerate it for 20-30 minutes until chilled. Demold the mixture and cut it into desired shapes. Fry until half cooked and transfer it to an absorbent paper. Refry the tikkis until crispy and golden brown. Transfer it to a tray or plate and keep it aside for further use. For Masala In a pan, add coriander seeds, cumin seeds, black peppercorns, salt to taste and dry roast it for 2-3 minutes until aromatic. Transfer it to the mortar pestle and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Chutney In a pan, add oil, once it's hot, green chillies, ginger, roasted peanuts, curry leaves and saute it well. Transfer it to a bowl, add fresh mint leaves, coriander leaves, green chillies and curd. Transfer it to the mixer grinder jar and grind it into the smooth paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Seasoned Chutney In a bowl, add curd, salt to taste, sugar and mix it well. Add prepared chutney, salt to taste and give it a good mix. Keep it aside for further use. For Assembling Sabudana Tikki Chaat In a serving dish, add green chutney, place fried sabudana tikki, add pomegranate pearls, nylon sev, tamarind chutney, dal moth, sweetened curd and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #tikkichaat #sabudanatikki #ranveerbrar #chaatrecipe #sabudanavada #alootikki #tikkirecipe

title: Sarson wali Fish curry | सरसों वाली मच्छी | spicy Mustard Fish Masala | Chef Ranveer Brar
description: SARSON WALI /MUSTARD FISH CURRY - It's been a while since we made a Fish curry. This one's my personal favourite, do try it :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg

This one's my personal favourite, do try it :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/FishRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** MUSTARD WALI FISH Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Boiling Mustard Chilli Water, पानी 2-3 tbsp Mustard chili, Split, सरसों के बीज Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Paste 2 medium Onion, diced, प्याज 2-3 Green chillies (less spicy & cut into half) हरी मिर्च 2 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन ½ inch Ginger (peeled & roughly sliced) अदरक Boiled Mustard chili, split, उबले हुए सरसों के बीज 1 ½ tsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर ½ tsp Turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर 1 tbsp Coriander powder, धनिया पाउडर 1 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल For Marination 3-4 pcs King Fish, cut into darne, मछली Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार A pinch of turmeric powder, हल्दी पाउडर For Frying 2-3 tbsp Mustard oil, सरसों का तेल Marinated Fish, मैरिनेटेड मछली 2 medium Potato (peeled & sliced) आलू For Fish Curry 2-3 tbsp remaining Mustard oil, बचा हुआ सरसों का तेल ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना ¼ tsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ Prepared paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट ¼ cup Water, पानी 1 tbsp Tender coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिये के डंठल Fried Potatoes, तले हुए आलू Water as required, पानी 1 medium Tomato, diced, टमाटर ¼ tsp Sugar, चीनी 2 Green chillies (less spicy & slit into half) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता Fried Fish, तली हुई मछली 2 Boiled Eggs, cut into half, उबले हुए अंडे 1 ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Boiling Mustard Chilli In a pan, add water, mustard chili, salt to taste and let it boil for a few minutes. Strain the mustard chili, transfer it to the same pan, add water, salt to taste and give it a quick boil. Strain the mustard chili and keep it aside for further use. For Paste In a bowl, add onions, green chillies, garlic, ginger, boiled mustard chili, degi red chili powder, turmeric powder, coriander powder and mustard oil. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it into smooth paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Marination In a bowl or tray, place fish, add salt to taste, a pinch turmeric powder and marinate it well. Keep it aside for 10-12 minutes. For Frying In a pan, add mustard oil, once it's hot, place marinated fish and sear it well on both sides. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. In the same pan, add potatoes and fry until golden brown. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside for further use. For Fish Curry In a kadai or handi, add remaining mustard oil, once it's hot, add fenugreek seeds, fennel seeds and let it splutter. Add prepared paste and cook it for a while, add water and mix it well. Add tender coriander stems, fried potatoes, water and simmer it for 2-3 minutes. Add tomato, sugar, green chillies, coriander leaves, fried fish, boiled eggs and give it a quick boil. Finish it with lemon juice and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with steam rice. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #fishcurry #mustardfishcurry #ranveerbrar #shorshemaach #shorshe #sarsonwalifishcurry

Aur best chaat banenge Tata Sampann clean and pure Urad dal se.. #collab #Diwalirecipes #ranveerbrar #pakodichaat #dahibhalla *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/DiwaliSweetsbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** DIWALI SPL CHAAT Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients ½ kg Urad dal (soaked for 2-3 hours) उड़द की दाल For Masala 1 tbsp Black peppercorns, काली मिर्च के दाने 1 heaped tbsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tbsp Fennel seeds, सौंफ ¼ tsp Fenugreek seeds, मेथी दाना Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार For Pakodi Urad dal paste, उड़द दाल की पेस्ट ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 2-3 Green chillies (less spicy & finely chopped) हरी मिर्च 2 tbsp Soaked Urad dal, उड़द की दाल ¼ tsp Carom seeds, अजवाइन ½ tsp Degi red chilli powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर A pinch of asafoetida, हींग 1 tsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार Other Ingredients Oil for frying, तेल तलने के लिए For Garnish 2 no. Green chili, slit into half, हरी मिर्च Lemon wedge A pinch of degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर Coriander sprig For Pakodi Chaat Prepared Pakodi, तयार किया 1 tsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ tsp Lemon juice, नींबू का रस ½ tbsp Coriander leaves, chopped, धनिया पत्ता 2 no. Green chili (less spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च For Garnish Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Boondi, बूंदी Ginger, julienned, अदरक Tamarind chutney, इमली की चटनी Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता For Dahi Bhalla Urad dal paste, उड़द दाल की पेस्ट Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ½ inch Ginger (peeled & finely chopped) अदरक 2 no. Green chillies (less Spicy & chopped) हरी मिर्च 1 tbsp Coriander leaves, finely chopped, धनिया पत्ता A pinch of baking soda, बेकिंग सोडा For Soaking Bhalla ½ tbsp Tamarind chutney, इमली की चटनी Salt to taste ½ tsp Degi red chili powder 2 cups Water ½ tsp Prepared Masala, तयार किया हुआ मसाला Prepared Tadka, तयार किया हुआ तड़का 5-6 no. Ice cubes, बर्फ के टुकड़े Fried Bhalla, तले हुए भल्ले For Tadka ½ tbsp Oil, तेल ¼ tsp Cumin seeds A pinch of asafoetida Other Ingredients Oil for frying For Garnish Sweetened curd A pinch of prepared masala A pinch of degi red chili powder Soaked Ballas Masala Chana Dal A pinch of degi red chili powder Tamarind chutney, इमली की चटनी Green chutney, हरी चटनी Sweetened curd A pinch of prepared masala, A pinch of degi red chili powder Pomegranate pearls, अनार के दाने Ratlami sev, रतलामी सेव Ginger, julienned Coriander sprig Process For Masala In a pan, add black peppercorns, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, fenugreek seeds, salt to taste and dry roast it well for a while on medium flames. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Pakodi In a parat or bowl, add urad dal paste, and whisk it well. Once the batter is fluffy, add ginger, green chilies, soaked urad dal, carom seeds, degi red chili powder, asafoetida, prepared masala, salt to taste and give it a good mix. Drop the lemon size balls in the hot oil and fry until crispy and golden brown. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with green chili, lemon wedge, a pinch of degi red chili powder and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Pakodi Chaat In a bowl, add fried pakodi, add prepared masala, salt to taste, lemon juice, coriander leaves, green chillies and toss it well. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with boondi, pomegranate pearls, tamarind chutney, ginger and coriander sprig. Serve hot. For Dahi Bhalla In a parat or bowl, add urad dal paste and whisk it well. Once the batter is fluffy, add salt to taste, ginger, green chilies, coriander leaves, baking soda and mix it well. Take a lemon size batter, drop it in hot oil and fry until crispy and golden brown. Transfer it to an absorbent paper and keep it aside for further use. For Soaking Bhalla In a bowl, add tamarind chutney, salt to taste, degi red chili powder, water, prepared masala, prepared tadka, ice cubes and mix it well. Add fried bhallas and keep it aside to soak for 20-25 minutes. For Assembling Dahi Bhalla In a serving bowl, add sweetened curd, sprinkle prepared masala, degi red chili powder, soaked bhallas, masala chana dal, degi red chili powder, tamarind chutney, green chutney and sweetened curd. Garnish it with a pinch of prepared masala, a pinch of degi red chili powder, pomegranate pearls, ratlami sev, ginger and coriander sprig. Serve cold.

One of the easiest Mithai, it's super simple to make it at home :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/DiwaliSweetsbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** DIWALI SPL PEDA (2 TYPES) Preparation time 10 minutes (set time 10-15 minutes) Cooking time 20-25 minutes Serve 4-5 Ingredients For Besan Peda 1 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 cup Gram flour, बेसन ¼ cup Ghee, घी 1 cup Milk powder, मिल्क पाउडर ¼ cup Desiccated coconut (optional) नारियल का बुरादा ¾ cup Milk, दूध 2 tbsp Saffron water, केसर का पानी ½ cup Caster sugar, केस्टर शुगर 2 tbsp Milk, दूध ½ tsp Cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर For Muscovado sugar ½ cup Sugar, चीनी Little Water, पानी For Mawa Peda 2 tbsp Ghee, घी ½ kg Mawa, मावा ⅓ cup Muscovado sugar, powdered, कच्ची शक्कर For Coating Muscovado sugar, powdered, कच्ची शक्कर For Garnish Green cardamom, seeds, हरी इलायची के दाने Process For Besan Peda In a kadai or pan, add the, once it's hot, add gram flour and roast well for 7-8 minutes on low flame. Add ghee and mix it well, add milk powder, desiccated coconut and cook it for 2-3 minutes. Add milk in small batches and stir it with the help of whisk to avoid the lumps. Add saffron water, castor sugar and cook it for a while until it binds well. Finish it with the milk and cook it for a minute on medium flames. Transfer it to a bowl, add cardamom powder and mix it well. Keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. Divide the mixture into lemon size balls and give it a desired shape. Transfer it on a serving platter or dish. Serve. For Muscovado Sugar In a pan, add sugar, water and cook well until it turns grainy in texture. Transfer it to a bowl or tray and keep it aside to cool. Sieve the sugar with the help of a strainer and keep it aside for further use. For Mawa Peda In a kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add mawa and cook it well until mawa turns grainy or mixture starts leaving the pan. Transfer it to a tray and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. Transfer it to a parat and knead it well until smooth. Add prepared muscovado sugar and mix it well. Divide the mixture into lemon size balls and give it a desired shape. Make a thumb imprint on the peda and transfer it to a serving platter or dish. Garnish it with green cardamom seeds and serve. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #pedarecipes #mawapeda #ranveerbrar #diwalimithairecipe #besanpeda #mawakaisebanatehain #pedebananekatareeka #milkpeda #doodhpedarecipe

http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** DRY FRUIT MITHAI Preparation time 10-20 minutes Ingredients For Dry Fruit Mixture 3-4 tbsp Ghee, घी 1 ½ cups Foxnut, मखाने 200 gms Cashew Nut, काजू 200 gms Almonds, बादाम Dry Fruit Barfi Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients 2 tsp Ghee, घी 450 gms Mawa, मावा 1 cup Powdered Sugar, पिसी हुई चीनी 200 gms Mixed Dry Fruit Mixture, तयार किया हुआ मिक्स ड्राई फ्रूट का मिश्रण ½ tsp Cardamom powder, इलायची पाउडर 1 tsp Sugar, चीनी For Garnish Silver vark, चांदी का वर्ख Almonds, sliver, बादाम Pistachios (blanched & sliver) पिस्ता Dryfruit Ladoo Preparation time 10-15 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients 200 gms Mixed Dry Fruit Mixture, तयार किया हुआ मिक्स ड्राई फ्रूट का मिश्रण 100 gms Rainins, chopped, किशमिश A pinch of salt, नमक ¼ tsp Black peppercorns, crushed, कुटी हुई काली मिर्च ¼ tsp Dry ginger powder, सोंठ का पाउडर For Garnish Almonds, sliver, बादाम fresh Rose petals, ताजे गुलाब की पंखुड़ियाँ Dry Fruit Halwa Preparation time 10 minutes Cooking time 15-20 minutes Serve 2 Ingredients ¼ tsp Saffron strands, केसर 1 cup Water, पानी ¾ cup Sugar, चीनी 200 gms Mixed Dry Fruit Mixture, तयार किया हुआ मिक्स ड्राई फ्रूट का मिश्रण For Garnish Pistachios (blanched & sliver) पिस्ता Almonds, sliver, बादाम Saffron strands, केसर Process For Dry fruit Mixture In a kadai or shallow pan, add the, once it's hot, add TATA SAMPANN foxnuts and roast them for a while or until it's crispy. Transfer it to a parat or bowl and keep it aside for further use. In the same pan or kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add TATA SAMPANN cashew nuts, almonds and roast it well until golden in color. Transfer it to the same bowl and keep it aside to cool down at room temperature. Transfer the dry fruits to a mixer grinder jar and grind it coarsely. Keep it aside for further use. For Dry fruit Barfi In the same kadai, add ghee, once it's hot, add mawa and saute it well. Add powdered sugar and cook it for 7-8 minutes or until it reduces the moisture. Add mixed dry fruit mixture, cardamom powder and mix it well. Add sugar and mix well, transfer the mixture to the tray and keep it aside for 2-3 hours to cool down at room temperature. Demold the mixture and cut into desired shape. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with silver vark, almonds and pistachios. Serve. For Dry Fruit Ladoo In a bowl or parat, add mixed dry fruit mixture, TATA SAMPANN raisins, a pinch of salt, black peppercorns, dry ginger powder and mix it well. Divide the mixture into the small lemon size balls and give it a desired shape. Transfer it to a serving dish, garnish it with almonds and fresh rose petals. Serve. For Dry Fruit Halwa In the same kadai, add kesar, water and give it a quick boil. Add sugar and let it boil until sugar dissolves. Add mixed dry fruit mixture and cook until desired consistency. Transfer it to a serving bowl, garnish it with pistachios, almonds and saffron strands. Serve hot. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar

raw_text: VEG KOLHAPURI - One Masala and you can whip up any kolhapuri style dish that you are in the mood to cook :) *********************** 𝗔𝗠𝗔𝗭🥘𝗡 𝗦𝗛🍳𝗣 🔪Knives I use - https://amzn.to/41Z6eUg 🛒RB Store - https://www.amazon.in/shop/chefranveer 📟Kitchen Appliances - https://bit.ly/KitchenAppliancesIUse *********************** Let's help 𝘽𝙖𝙣𝙙𝙚𝙡 𝘾𝙝𝙚𝙚𝙨𝙚 get its GI Tag 𝗖𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲 𝘁𝗼 𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗻 𝗺𝘆 𝗽𝗲𝘁𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 - https://change.org/GITagforBandelCheese *********************** ⏩𝓒𝓵𝓲𝓬𝓴 𝓽𝓸 𝓢𝓾𝓫𝓼𝓬𝓻𝓲𝓫𝓮 : https://goo.gl/UE2pmL *********************** 𝗖𝗵𝗲𝗰𝗸 𝗼𝘂𝘁 𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀𝗲 𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗽𝗲𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝗼: https://bit.ly/MixedVegRecipesbyRB *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App 📲 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** VEG KOLHAPURI Preparation time 10-15 minutes Cooking time 25-30 minutes Serve 2-4 Ingredients For Dry Masala 2 heaped tbsp Coriander seeds, धनिये के बीज 2 tsp Cumin seeds, जीरा 1 tbsp Poppy seeds, खसखस 3-4 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 4-5 no. Cloves, लौंग 1 no. Star anise, चक्र फूल 1 ½ inch Cinnamon stick, दालचीनी 3-4 Bay leaf, तेजपत्ता ½ tbsp Stone flower, दगड़ फूल Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार 3-4 no. dry Kashmiri red chillies, सूखी कश्मीरी लाल मिर्च ¼ cup dry Coconut, sliced, सूखा नारियल 1 tbsp Degi red chili powder, देगी लाल मिर्च पाउडर For Vatan 1-2 tbsp Oil, तेल 10-12 no. Garlic cloves, लहसुन ¼ cup dry Coconut, sliced, सूखा नारियल 3 medium Roasted Onions (peeled & roughly chopped) भुना हुआ प्याज 2-3 tbsp Prepared Dry Masala, तैयार किया हुआ मसाला For Boiling Vegetables 1 cup Water, पानी 1 medium Carrot, diced, गाजर 1 medium Cauliflower, cut into florets, फूलगोभी Salt to taste, नमक स्वादअनुसार ⅓ cup Green peas, हरे मटर 10-12 no. French beans, roughly chopped, फ्रेंच बीन्स For Veg Kolhapuri 2 tbsp Oil, तेल 2 no. Green cardamom, हरी इलायची 1 no. Mace, जावित्री Prepared Paste, तैयार किया हुआ पेस्ट Water as required, पानी Boiled Vegetables, उबली हुई सब्जियां 200 gms Paneer, diced, पनीर 1 tbsp Tender Coriander stems, finely chopped, धनिया के डंठल For Garnish Coriander sprig, धनिया पत्ता Process For Dry Masala In a pan, add coriander seeds, cumin seeds, poppy seeds, green cardamom, cloves, star anise, cinnamon stick, bay leaf, stone flower, salt to taste and roast them for 2-3 minutes or until it's fragrant. Add dry kashmiri red chillies, dry coconut, degi red chili powder and mix it well. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it smoothly. Keep it aside for further use. For Vatan In a shallow pan, add oil, once it's hot, add garlic and saute it until golden brown. Add dry coconut, roasted onions, prepared dry masala and saute it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. Transfer it to a mixer grinder jar and grind it to a fine paste. Keep it aside for further use. For Boiling Vegetables In a saucepan or handi, add water and get a quick boil. Add carrots, cauliflower, salt to taste and cook it for 5-6 minutes. Add green peas, french beans and blanch for a while. Strain the vegetables and keep it aside for further use. For Veg Kolhapuri In a handi or sauce pot, add oil, once it's hot, add green cardamom, mace, prepared paste and saute it for 2-3 minutes on medium flames. Add water, boiled vegetables and simmer it for a while. Add paneer, coriander stems and mix it well. Transfer it to a serving dish and garnish it with coriander sprig. Serve hot with roti or steam rice. *********************** For more fantastic recipes, check out the Ranveer Brar App: 📲𝐀𝐧𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐢𝐝 - http://bit.ly/RBAppAndroid 📲𝗶𝗢𝗦 - http://bit.ly/RBAppiOS *********************** 🌎 Follow Ranveer Brar here too: ➡️ https://www.ranveerbrar.com ➡️ https://www.facebook.com/RanveerBrar/ ➡️ https://www.instagram.com/ranveer.brar/ ➡️ https://twitter.com/ranveerbrar #vegkolhapurirecipe #kolhapurimasala #ranveerbrar #mixedveg #diwanihandi #restaurantstylemixveg #kolhapurimisal #kolhapurispicemix #kolhapurichicken
